Name: Ultracargo
Description:
Somos uma empresa de soluções logísticas integradas que hoje movimenta combustíveis, biocombustíveis, químicos, petroquímicos e óleos vegetais, além de mantermos a posição de liderança entre as empresas independentes de armazenagem de granéis líquidos do país. 

Contamos com mais de 900 colaboradores e somamos mais de 58 anos de história. Fazemos parte do Ultra, um dos maiores grupos empresariais brasileiros.

Com mais de 1 milhão de metros cúbicos de capacidade estática, contamos com terminais de granéis líquidos em quatro regiões brasileiras e estamos conectados aos modais rodoviário, ferroviário, hidroviário e dutoviário. Nossos terminais estão localizados em Rondonópolis (MT) e nos Portos de Santos (SP), Rio de Janeiro (RJ), Aratu (BA), Suape (PE), Itaqui (MA) e Vila do Conde (PA). Temos 50% de participação na Opla, que opera um terminal de etanol em Paulínia (SP) e iniciamos a construção de um novo terminal em Palmeirante (TO).

Venha fazer parte do nosso time!

Name: TPC Logística Inteligente
Description:
Com mais de 24 anos de atuação no mercado, a TPC é um dos principais Operadores Logísticos do Brasil, presente em 24 estados do país e com  mais de 12.000 colaboradores.
Nossas 140 operações  contam com 850.000 m² de área de armazenagem, 3 milhões de entregas por ano, e 600 mil posições pallets.
A TPC Logística Inteligente possui a solução ideal para cada necessidade, focando sempre em Lean & Green Logistics.

Name: Bandeirantes Deicmar
Description:
A Bandeirantes Deicmar atua em operações de importação, exportação, transporte e distribuição de cargas. O grupo é composto por terminais marítimo e de contêineres, armazém alfandegado de importação e exportação, centro de distribuição e transporte rodoviário. Possui uma transportadora, com frota própria de caminhões, e serviços que englobam toda a cadeia logística, da importação à distribuição.

#juntossomosmaisfortes

Name: Ageo Terminais
Description:
Ser um terminal de excelência é o nosso maior propósito. E aqui tem gente de respeito, que atua com qualidade, colocando o Cliente no centro do negócio. Juntos, somos agentes de mudança, protagonistas, e queremos ir muito além da entrega. Queremos ouvir nossos Clientes, transformar suas sugestões, reclamações e elogios em ações concretas e entender que sempre é possível fazer melhor.

Queremos crescer, mas não sozinhos. O crescimento dos nossos terminais é representado pelo sucesso de todos que compartilham conosco esse propósito. Nossa essência é ousar sonhar com a conquista de objetivos ainda maiores. Sonhamos. Sonhamos muito. Sonhamos o tempo todo. E traçamos novas metas, objetivos e, enfim, conquistamos os nossos sonhos.

Quando iniciamos nossas operações ninguém acreditou que poderíamos nos tornar referência em terminais de granéis líquidos do Porto de Santos, o maior porto da América Latina. Fomos lá e conquistamos. Sonhamos em ter mais um terminal. Fomos lá e conquistamos. Sonhamos com a implementação do primeiro berço de atracação privativo. Conquistamos. Estávamos satisfeitos? Não! Então sonhamos com o terceiro terminal em operação. Se você entendeu a nossa essência, já sabe a resposta: conquistamos!

Tudo isso foi conquistado porque todos nós fazemos acontecer. Somos gente que acredita que dá para fazer mais e melhor, gente que quer voar longe, gente que olha para o horizonte e com confiança diz: “Eu quero chegar lá!” Nascemos para ser gigante. E quem nasce com essa essência não deixa de sonhar nunca. Nossa essência nos conduz!

Name: Cargoz.com
Description:
At Cargoz, we believe storage should be simple, flexible, and accessible — not complicated or rigid.

Since our launch in 2022, our primary goal has been to make warehouse space available to businesses of all sizes. Businesses do not need to learn complex logistics jargon to grow. They should be able to find the right space, at the right time, with clarity and confidence.

With us, businesses can:
 - Find and book warehouse space instantly by location, size, or type.
 - Pay only for what they use — no lock-ins, no hidden fees.
 - Scale storage up or down as their needs change.
 - Network of over 800+ verified warehouses across the UAE and KSA.
 - Rely on a transparent, flexible network of trusted partners.

Today, over 2,000 businesses trust Cargoz with their storage needs across more than 7 million square feet of available storage space — and it’s growing every day. From food-grade to dangerous goods, frozen to open yards, we provide the flexibility growing businesses want.

At Cargoz, flexibility meets empathy. We’re reimagining an industry long known for rigid terms into one built on trust, simplicity, and customer love.

But beyond storage, we have a deeper mission: we’re building the world’s most loved warehousing experience.

Warehouse

Name: SCDP (Cameroon Petroleum Depots Company)
Description: Cameroon Petroleum Depots Company (SCDP), was established in 1979 by the government of Cameroon to ensure the availability of petroleum products throughout the country and to promote the development of its economy. It ensures the storage and distribution of petroleum products throughout the country. It is the last stage in the petroleum chain, from exploration of oil wells to processing and storage of products.
Location: DOUALA- Rue de la Cité Chardy, Carrefour Agip, Littoral

Name: Comfrio - Inteligência em Soluções Logísticas
Description:
A Comfrio é a maior empresa brasileira de inteligência em soluções logísticas de frio para a cadeia de alimentos e agronegócios.  Com mais de 20 anos de história, desenvolve soluções para cuidar do alimento no Brasil desde a distribuição de sementes para o agronegócio até operações de restaurantes de cadeias de food service. Sempre pautada pelo compromisso com seus clientes, a empresa desenvolve suas atividades com qualidade superior para garantir que o alimento chegue à mesa dos brasileiros com integridade absoluta e para viabilizar o sucesso dos negócios de seus clientes.
Para isso, a Comfrio se vale da mais alta tecnologia e de infraestrutura que reúne 27 centros de distribuição em todas as regiões do Brasil e capacidade de armazenagem de mais de 1 milhão de metros cúbicos.
Seja bem-vindo, nós somos a COMFRIO.

A Superfrio é uma empresa de logística refrigerada que investe no resultado do cliente. O caminho que escolheu foi o da inovação. Você compra soluções logísticas para conseguir maior agilidade e alta profissionalização. A Superfrio entrega confiança.

A Superfrio é uma empresa jovem, dinâmica e com alta capacidade de investimento. Concentra recursos tanto em elevados padrões de qualidade quanto em novos projetos que antecipem o crescimento de seus clientes.

MISSÃO

através da gestão da cadeia de alimentos com temperatura controlada

VISÃO
TOP 5 mundial em infraestrutura logística de alimentos
50 CDs com 5 milhões m3 , 500 veículos e volume de 500 mil T/mês

VALORES

Integridade – Prezamos pela entrega de resultados e desempenho com conduta ética; sendo capazes de criar uma relação de respeito e confiança com os acionistas, clientes, colaboradores e comunidade.

Name: IndoSpace
Description:
IndoSpace is India’s largest investor, developer, and manager of Grade A industrial and logistics real estate. Since its inception in 2007, we have revolutionized the industry to meet India’s ever-rising demands around industrialization and the warehousing and supply chain ecosystem.

With over $3.2 bn in investment, we are the only pan-India industrial and logistics park developer with 52 operational and under development parks spread over 58 million square feet. Our logistics parks are equipped with world-class warehousing, industrial, and logistics facilities located in and around the major industrial corridors/consumption hubs.

We offer ready space and build-to-suit solutions and continuously add land parcels, providing clients with easy expansion options in prime locations that reduce total logistics costs.

IndoSpace Logistics Parks and warehouses are the first projects in India to be certified with the prestigious India Green Building Council (IGBC) Platinum rating. In addition, we are also the first company in India to be awarded the esteemed ‘Excellence in Design for Greater Efficiencies’ (EDGE) certification for our industrial parks.

Our award-winning warehousing and logistics parks have consistently set benchmarks for the industry. Our dedication to best practices has won us various awards, including being named ‘Best Developer of Industrial/Warehouse Real Estate in India’ by the reputed Euromoney magazine for seven consecutive years since 2015. Euromoney also ranks IndoSpace amongst the top two industrial park developers in India.

What makes IndoSpace the partner-of-choice for companies looking for warehouses and logistics parks in India, is the combination of our strategic land bank, world-class infrastructure and amenities, backed by our unwavering commitment to provide best-in-class solutions.

We specialize in two of the most important functions of logistics Warehousing & Distribution/Transportation business. 

We provide finest warehousing facilities. The warehouses are strategically located, closer to the port as well as the city. Most of our clients availing Warehouse services are also availing our Transport services.

We value your business…
Customers rely on us to help them run a smarter business. It's that simple, yet incredibly complex. We look for the advantages of structure, scale and integration. Maybe it involves only one of our core offerings. At Warehousing Express, it's never stopped us from striving for it in every facet of fulfilling the customer expectation.

At Warehousing Express we take outsourcing of warehousing operations
We can work at customer's premises with our standard operating processes
We can work at customer plant, factory or warehouse for fulfillment of overall supply chain needs

Description: Número 1 em infraestrutura flexível para armazenagem e cobertura. São mais de 3 milhões de m² de área instalada em todo Brasil.

Name: Welspun One
Description:
Welspun One is India’s leading integrated fund and development management platform focused on logistics and industrial real estate. Backed by the Welspun World group, the company is committed to developing high-quality, institutional-grade assets across key warehousing and industrial hubs. With a robust portfolio spanning major cities and marquee projects such as the WTC Nhava Sheva port-based logistics park and the World Trade Center, Thane, Welspun One continues to set new benchmarks in the Logistics & Industrial (L&I) sector.

Welspun One’s unique integrated offering allows it to mobilize capital from its investors by providing them with an opportunity to participate in, and profit from, the growth and development of the warehousing sector in India in a transparent and institutional manner and utilize this capital along with their in-house development expertise to deliver best-in-class warehousing infrastructure to its clients.

Name: Horizon Industrial Parks
Description:
At Horizon Industrial Parks, our purpose is to enable our customers to succeed by proactively delivering agile solutions for accelerated growth. 

We practice a unique consultative approach that is a combination of our local domain expertise and our unparalleled global experience thanks to our parent company Blackstone, a world leader in real estate investing. This dual advantage helps us offer end-to-end solutions to our customers for optimising design, controlling costs and improving efficiency.

Our integrated solutions for strategic land acquisition, park compliances and approvals, asset development and property management empower our customers to get a head start and focus on their core business. 

Each of our 18 Grade A industrial and logistics parks is built to world-class standards to serve the unique needs of each of our ambitious clients. Spread over 1000 acres and with a development potential of over 25 MSFT located in eight key markets in India, including Delhi-NCR, Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad, Nagpur, and Goa, our parks are home to leading global brands across sectors such as third-party logistics, e-Commerce, Automobile, Aerospace, Engineering, and Retail. 

Our commitment to ESG runs deep, working at multiple levels to tackle the different dimensions of sustainable development. From green initiatives to nurture the environment at our parks and embedding safe recycling practices to driving inclusivity as a key tenet of social development, we hold our vision of a cleaner, greener and safer tomorrow close to our hearts.

Our values underpin everything we do and serve as our everyday North Star. We are agile in our mindset, collaborative in our approach, and drive excellence in all spheres of our work.

To learn more, click on the website link below.

Name: Plaza Logística
Description:
En Plaza Logística, somos mucho más que una empresa. Somos una visión de excelencia en infraestructura
logística, impulsada por la innovación, la sustentabilidad y la gobernanza. Desarrollamos y operamos parques
logísticos estratégicamente ubicados bajo los más altos estándares de calidad, seguridad e higiene, y con un
fuerte compromiso con el medioambiente. Adoptamos estándares ambientales LEED y/o EDGE en el proceso de
construcción de nuestros parques y certificamos nuestra administración de acuerdo con las Normas ISO 9001,
ISO 14001 e ISO 45001.

Creemos en asociaciones de largo plazo, trabajando en estrecha colaboración con grandes clientes de retail, e-
commerce, consumo masivo, entre otros sectores. Como líderes del sector, nuestro enfoque es claro: crear un entorno ideal para que las empresas alcancen sus objetivos comerciales. En Plaza Logística, somos referentes a la hora de crear espacios que impulsen el crecimiento de nuestros clientes.

En términos de financiamiento, hemos desarrollado una sólida relación con organismos multilaterales de crédito
(BID | Invest, DFC), fuimos admitidos al Régimen de Oferta Pública en el mercado de capitales de Argentina en diciembre de 2017, y mantenemos relación con bancos internacionales y de capital nacional. En el año 2019, nos convertimos en la primera compañía privada en Argentina en emitir un Bono Verde, mediante el re-
etiquetamiento de un Bono emitido en el año 2017. En el año 2021, logramos ser la primera compañía privada
en Argentina en emitir un Bono Sostenible (verde + social).

Conocenos y descubrí cómo estamos transformando el mundo de la infraestructura logística!
Location: Comuna 1, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Cattalini Terminais Marítimos
Description:
Com larga experiência na movimentação de graneis líquidos, a Cattalini é considerada referência internacional no mercado e detém reputação de excelência por seus clientes, incluindo empresas nacionais e multinacionais de relevância nos setores de energia e agronegócio.

A Cattalini movimenta anualmente mais de 2 milhões de m³ de graneis líquidos e opera a partir de 2 terminais em Paranaguá, alfandegados e certificados como entrepostos aduaneiros. A Cattalini está certificada por órgãos internacionais e independentes como Bureau Veritas e CDI-T, além de ser considerada pela Conportos como instalação portuária padrão ISPS Code.

Name: Andreani Grupo Logístico Brasil
Description:
Desde 1945 desenvolvemos a mais ampla variedade de serviços logísticos, oferecendo soluções integrais para gestão e distribuição de encomendas industriais e comerciais.

Contamos com 80 anos de experiência em logística, oferecendo as melhores soluções nos serviços de armazenagem e distribuição de produtos de diversos segmentos na Argentina. Com uma carteira de mais de 800 clientes, somos considerados o principal operador logístico.

No Brasil desde 2001, mantivemos nosso foco na qualidade, oferecendo aos nossos clientes a forma mais flexível e eficaz de gerenciar seus produtos, criando um novo patamar de qualidade em serviços para empresas que precisam profissionalizar ou simplesmente otimizar sua logística, armazenamento e distribuição nacional.

O compromisso com o negócio de nossos clientes, interpretar suas necessidades logísticas e aprofundar os mercados em que participam e o nosso principal valor. A partir de uma relação de confiança mútua construímos vínculos de aliados estratégicos e acompanhamos o crescimento de nossos clientes contribuindo com soluções inovadoras para responder as expectativas de seus clientes finais.

Name: National Bulk Handling Corporation Pvt. Ltd
Description:
For over two decades, NBHC has been recognized for its commitment to service excellence, trusted risk management practices, and strong governance standards. We set industry benchmarks in the procurement, handling, storage, and upkeep of agri-commodities and collateral, serving clients across India’s major business and trade centres.

Corporates, traders, processors, millers, FPOs, banks, and financial institutions rely on our expertise to enhance operational efficiency and drive long-term growth. Through our diversified businesses—Professional Warehousing, Collateral Management, Trade Facilitation & Supply chain Solutions,  Procurement of Agri-Commodities, Pest Management & Fumigation, Audit & Accreditation, and technology-enabled value-added Data Services—we deliver tailored solutions that strengthen India’s agri-ecosystem.

Expanding our solutions portfolio, we now offer Quality Assaying & Inspection and Rake Management Services, ensuring reliable quality assurance throughout procurement, transit, storage, and dispatch. NBHC’s tech-driven Rake Management boosts efficiency and profitability, providing customers with real-time tracking, automated logs, and actionable insights to reduce delays and optimize stock movement.

As a knowledge-driven and technology-led organization, we continue to advance transformation in the agri sector. Our digital-first approach strengthens service lines, enables robust paperless operations, and upholds the highest standards of transparency and governance. The trust placed in us by our stakeholders remains central to our mission.

Backed by strong values, a proven 20-year track record, and the strategic support of True North, we are well-positioned for sustained growth. We remain committed to shaping the future of India’s agri-sector through innovation-led warehousing excellence and by delivering lasting value to all our stakeholders.

Name: Bidvest Tank Terminals
Description:
We pride ourselves on being the best stewards and handlers possible. Island View Storage (Pty) Ltd trading as Bidvest Tank Terminals was established in 1953 – and as the foremost independent bulk liquid and gas storage operator in South Africa, we are dedicated to every customer we serve.

We handle over three billion litres of our customers’ product every year. This includes chemicals, gases, fats and oils, base oils, lube oil additives and petroleum products.

With over seventy customers, we handle more than 150 types of product – stored in over 560-tanks at our Port of Durban, Port of Richard’s Bay, and Isando sites. This gives us an impressive storage capacity of approximately 868,000 cubic metres.

Name: United States Cold Storage, Inc.
Description:
USCS’s century of cold storage excellence in America is backboned by 42 world-class facilities across 13 states. Our purpose goes beyond industry-leading locations and services. USCS has over three thousand hardworking employees who love what they do, dedicated to keeping us at the top of the cold storage industry.  We’ll do whatever it takes for our partners to profitably reach their goals, whether it’s primary storage or fully integrated 3rd party logistics solutions.

United States Cold Storage is dedicated to being the leader in providing highly reliable and cost-effective logistics solutions to the frozen and refrigerated food industry, giving our customers the competitive edge they need to succeed in the ever-changing business environment.

Our world-class facilities are located in the following states: California, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Indiana, Nebraska, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, Texas, Utah and Virginia.

Name: Star Agriwarehousing & Collateral Management Ltd
Description:
StarAgri is one of Asia’s leading integrated agritech solutions companies. As an end-to-end agricultural value-chain services platform, we offer a comprehensive suite of services to optimize efficiency and value in the sector.

We work with farmers, FPO’s and agri-communities to help them solve some of their most pressing challenges like post-harvest loss, access to bank finances and poor links to markets. We do this by forging sustainable partnerships between farming communities and their customers - agri-procurers. This helps create a more efficient market, translates into better crop price realization for farmers, and lower intermediary costs for buyers. 

With a network of 2,204 warehouses across 19 states, 5.2 million+ tons of warehousing capacity and ₹180 billion worth of commodities stored across 403 collateral management locations, we aim to become a strategic link in the global agri commodities supply chain.

In addition to addressing farmers’ challenges, our integrated solutions create value for all stakeholders – banks and financial institutions, agri-processors, and commodity exchanges. We also offer a wide array of value-added services that include risk management, retailing, and logistics, to name a few.

StarAgri has received funding support from Temasek Holdings and IDFC Private Equity.

Name: Friozem
Description:
NOSSA HISTÓRIA 

A Friozem Armazéns Frigoríficos Ltda nasceu da  necessidade do Governo Federal de promover a armazenagem de carne congelada para a formação de estoques reguladores.

Segundo o fundador da empresa, Fábio Fonseca, em 1978, quando a Friozem iniciou suas operações em Jandira – SP, o Governo comprava carne bovina dos matadouros durante a safra e guardava o produto congelado nos armazéns frigoríficos.  Quando chegava a entressafra, vendia novamente o produto aos mesmos matadouros, pelo exato preço que comprara meses antes.

Os matadouros, por sua vez, faziam a distribuição da carne ao mercado sem alteração de preço, mantendo o valor de meses antes, o que contribuía para o controle da inflação.  A demanda por espaço frigorífico, desta forma, era bastante grande, já que o Governo, desde o ano 1971, tinha esta política de intervenção na economia e faltava espaço para armazenagem.

A Friozem nasceu portanto com o firme propósito de atender a esta necessidade de armazenagem de carne congelada mas sempre com o foco de estender sua atuação à preservação de todo e qualquer alimento perecível.  Para se instalar, escolheu o Município de Jandira, na região oeste da Grande São Paulo, mais precisamente na altura do KM 32 da Rodovia Castelo Branco, a apenas 15 minutos do Cebolão e das marginais Pinheiros e Tietê.

A empresa iniciou suas operações com 35 mil metros cúbicos e vem se expandindo ininterruptamente desde então, sendo que hoje esse número chega a 643 mil metros cúbicos, não apenas em Jandira, mas também em Recife, Fortaleza, Belo Horizonte, São Bernardo do Campo, Araraquara, Curitiba, Salvador, Porto Alegre e Rio de Janeiro.

Atualmente, todas as Unidades da Friozem operam como um Centro de Distribuição, fornecendo aos seus clientes uma ampla estrutura de serviços.

Name: TPL | Platinum Log
Description:
Toda empresa que cresce, passa por mudanças. Assim como nós. E neste constante movimento que é a nossa realidade, hoje somos TPL.

Estamos no jogo há mais de 10 anos transformando a logística. O movimento e a inovação fazem parte da nossa rotina. Como as maiores empresas de tecnologia, entendemos que a mudança é essencial para o crescimento. Adaptamos nossas estratégias, aprimoramos nossos processos e abraçamos a inovação.

Com uma visão firme de longo prazo, estamos nos consolidando como principal operador logístico - Fulfillment (B2B e B2C) do Brasil, contando com tecnologia própria (OMS, TMS e WMS) que proporciona a visualização, integração e gestão em tempo real de todas as etapas operacionais, transporte lotação e estruturas multi CD's localizadas estrategicamente em 4 estados nas regiões sul e sudeste.
 
A mudança de Platinum Log para TPL representa nossa evolução e nosso compromisso com a modernidade e a agilidade que o mercado exige.

Com Centros de Distribuição estrategicamente posicionados e uma equipe dedicada de +700 colaboradores, estamos prontos para atender todas as suas demandas de fulfillment, transporte e tecnologia logística, garantindo que você fique sempre à frente no mercado.

A Lachmann foi fundada em 1927, e desde então se destaca pelo constante aprimoramento de seus serviços. Atua em diversas etapas da cadeia logística do comércio exterior.

Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais altamente qualificados e com profundo conhecimento do mercado brasileiro. Seus modelos de negócios estão estruturados para oferecer flexibilidade e agilidade, para atender às necessidades dos clientes em todos os segmentos, de forma competitiva.

Name: Exportadora de Café Guaxupé Ltda.
Description:
Fundada em 1970 pelo Sr. Olavo Barbosa, a EXPORTADORA DE CAFÉ GUAXUPÉ se orgulha de ser uma família dedicada ao café.
Atua como elo entre produtores brasileiros, torradores e importadores de diversos países. Possui serviços especializados e uma equipe preparada para orientar seus parceiros com um forte compromisso de aproximar o produtor do mercado internacional, sempre respeitando às normas sociais, ambientais e comerciais que regem o setor.

Os armazéns da EXPORTADORA GUAXUPÉ tem capacidade para armazenar até 1 milhão de sacas de café, contando com tecnologia avançada para limpeza e preparação dos cafés separando-os por tamanho, densidade e cor.

Possui um rigoroso sistema de monitoramento de todas as etapas da operação, o que garante a qualidade e rastreabilidade total do café, da origem ao destino, de forma segura e confiável.

Também possui escritório comercial em Manhuaçu-MG que possibilita a comercialização das região das Matas de Minas e em São José do Rio Pardo-SP, município pertencente à região da média Mogiana.

Nossas Redes Sociais:

Instagram: @exportadoraguaxupe

Name: DARWISH BIN AHMED & SONS
Description:
The Darwish Bin Ahmed & Sons Group was founded in 1964 by the late Mr. Darwish Bin Ahmed. It is now successfully managed by his sons and grandsons and has enjoyed steady growth during this period by strategically investing and growing organically.
DBA & Sons has established its presence in a wide range of segments like Infrastructure, Material Handling, Oil & Gas, Quarry & Mining, Air Conditioning, Power Generation and Transportation with rental solutions also offered in these fields of operation. The Group Head Quarters in Mussafah, Abu Dhabi, seems to define the company. The imposing HQ building was designed and constructed by Saif Bin Darwish, the Construction and Civil Engineering Division and an integral part of the Darwish Bin Ahmed & Sons Group. 

DBA has been operating in the UAE for over 50 years and has left its calling card all over Abu Dhabi; from iconic landmarks such as the Sheikh Khalifa Bridge, the Sheikh Zayed Tunnel to the city’s buses. The Group has been nurturing the emirate from the beginning; focused on building a sustainable business incorporating family values.

Today DBA & Sons group is one of the leading business organizations in the UAE and has seen a year-on-year growth of more than 50% in both domestic and international businesses., now employing over 6,500 people. The Group is active in over 50 countries worldwide with offices in Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, Russia, Ukraine, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan and India, to name but a few and serving over 5,000 customers.

Name: Bluespace Self-Storage
Description:
Bluespace is the leading self-storage operator in Spain with over 50 centres in Barcelona, Madrid, Valencia, and Bilbao. In the rest of the country, we offer services and solutions through our excellent partners. In 2019 Bluespace arrives in Portugal with 2 centres in Lisbon and in 2020 to France with 2 centres in Paris, adding a total of 54 self-storage centres in 3 countries.
At Bluespace we aim to maintain our status as the best self-storage company in Spain. To achieve this, we have devised a 5-year expansion plan which will mean 100 centres and 400 employees.
Our mission is to deliver the highest quality self-storage experience to our customers by providing personalized care, quality facilities, customized transportation & logistic solutions all supported by state-of-the-art technologies.
Provide an excellent working environment and high integrity culture for our employees with opportunities to acquire valuable professional experiences and leadership skills, and with clear avenues for growth. Finally, deliver long-term value and top tier financial returns to our shareholders.
Our vision is to be the self-storage industry leader in both market share and customer satisfaction in the markets where we operate.  We continually strive to grow in our existing Spanish markets and to expand into new country markets.

Description:

From standard pallet rack systems, to complex pick-to belt towers, ASRS installations or Rack Supported Buildings, Frazier’s expert team helps each customer design the best, most cost-effective systems.
Frazier is an industry leader in manufacturing capabilities through the use of 10 fabrication facilities across North America, including Canada and Mexico. Strategically located, these manufacturing facilities reduce freight and installation costs, resulting in the most competitive prices. Each facility has the ability to produce thousands of pounds of racking per day, giving us the ability to meet your tight construction deadlines. In addition, Frazier boasts a staff of knowledgeable industry experts, including an experienced Project Management Team, dedicated Engineering Divisions for both Standard Products and ASRS and more. 
We have an extremely successful track record of addressing customers’ business and operational needs while also exceeding their expectations. Our extensive client base expands over fourteen major industry groups, including the Food, Beverage, Cold Storage, 3PL and Retail sectors.

Name: STAMH Group
Tippmann Group / Interstate Warehousing / Tippmann Construction
Description:
Tippmann Group offers more than 50 years of experience in the refrigeration industry, specializing in cold storage construction and management of refrigerated / frozen distribution centers. Tippmann Construction, also a Tippmann Group Company, provides a fast-track design / build option for construction of a new distribution center, or expansions and renovations to existing distribution facilities.  Tippmann Group and Interstate Warehousing developed the QFR Zone (Quick Freeze Racking Zone), a more efficient alternative to traditional blast freezing, which can save warehouses up to 50% on their blast freezing related expenses.

We strive toward building customer relationships and exceeding customer expectations with Tradition, Flexibility, Quality and Performance.

•Family-owned and operated for more than 50 years
•One of the largest Public Refrigerated Warehouse (PRW) companies in North America
•Strategically located state-of-the-art distribution facilities
•Superior customer service
•Refrigerated and frozen pool consolidation programs at multiple locations
•Multiple facilities with AIB/ASI/USDA inspection certifications
•Internet access to real-time inventory and shipping activity through Interstate's eView system

Name: NORDNIX
Description:
JSC Nordnix is a Lithuanian-owned company that has been in business since 1994. With an innovative and professional approach to business, we have been able to expand our warehouse space and grow into a large company specialising in dry and cold storage and logistics. 
The company owns 511 metres of railway sidings, of which 240 metres are located on our territory. We also operate two warehouses, one in the port and one in the centre, which are strategically located. 

● The port warehouse is located at 24 Nemuno St., on the territory of LLSC Klaipedos Smelte, next to the MSC container line terminal.
● The centre warehouse is located in the very centre of Klaipeda, on Silutes ave. 9, approximately 4 kilometres from the Port of Klaipeda and 3 kilometres from the motorway (Klaipeda - Kaunas - Vilnius). There is a customs post of the Republic of Lithuania on the territory of the company.

Our partners are leaders in production, trade and sales in Lithuania, in various countries or regions.

● 19 000 tonnes of refrigerators
● 4,300 m² of dry storage space
● 2,000 m² of administrative space

Name: Ports Francs et Entrepôts de Genève (PFEG)

Name: International Warehouse Group inc
Description:
International Warehouse Group is a leading 3rd party warehousing company that specializes in providing comprehensive logistics solutions to businesses of all sizes. With a reputation for excellence and reliability, IWG has been serving clients across industries for over 20 years.

IWG offers a wide range of services, including ecommerce shipping, store deliveries to major retailers, warehousing, kitting, ticketing, and more. IWG's commitment to customer satisfaction is unwavering, and their attention to detail and dedication to excellence sets them apart in the industry. Whether it's managing complex logistics requirements, handling high volumes of inventory, or providing value-added services like kitting and ticketing, IWG is the trusted partner for businesses seeking reliable and efficient warehousing and logistics solutions.

Choose International Warehouse Group for all your warehousing and logistics needs, and experience unparalleled service, reliability, and expertise in the industry.

Name: Smart Factory Solution
Description:
ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ Smart Factory!

สวัสดีครับ ยินดีต้อนรับเข้าสู่ Smart Factory แหล่งรวมข้อมูลและที่ปรึกษาด้านการนำ หุ่นยนต์ (Robot) และ ระบบอัตโนมัติ (Automation) ไปปรับใช้ในโรงงานของคุณ!

เรามุ่งมั่นที่จะช่วยให้โรงงานของคุณก้าวสู่ยุคอุตสาหกรรม 4.0 อย่างเต็มตัว ด้วยการให้คำปรึกษาที่ครบวงจร ตั้งแต่การประเมินความพร้อมของโรงงาน การเลือกเทคโนโลยีที่เหมาะสม การวางแผนการติดตั้ง ไปจนถึงการสนับสนุนหลังการขาย เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าการลงทุนของคุณจะเกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด

Smart Factory ช่วยอะไรคุณได้บ้าง?

ให้คำปรึกษาเบื้องต้นฟรี: ไม่ว่าคุณจะเพิ่งเริ่มต้นศึกษา หรือกำลังมองหาโซลูชันเฉพาะ เราพร้อมให้คำแนะนำเบื้องต้นเกี่ยวกับศักยภาพของหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติในการเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการผลิต ลดต้นทุน และยกระดับความปลอดภัยในโรงงานของคุณ

แนะนำโซลูชันที่เหมาะสม: เราจะช่วยวิเคราะห์ความต้องการเฉพาะของโรงงานคุณ และนำเสนอโซลูชันหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติที่ตอบโจทย์ ไม่ว่าจะเป็นหุ่นยนต์อุตสาหกรรม, Collaborative Robots (โคบอท), ระบบลำเลียงอัตโนมัติ (AGV/AMR), ระบบควบคุมอัตโนมัติ, หรือการบูรณาการระบบต่างๆ

ข้อมูลอัปเดตและเทรนด์ใหม่: ติดตามข่าวสาร เทคโนโลยี และเทรนด์ล่าสุดในอุตสาหกรรมหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติ เพื่อให้คุณไม่พลาดทุกความเคลื่อนไหวและสามารถนำไปปรับใช้กับธุรกิจได้ทันท่วงที

เปิดโอกาสสู่การร่วมมือ: เราเป็นพันธมิตรกับผู้เชี่ยวชาญและผู้ให้บริการชั้นนำในอุตสาหกรรม เพื่อให้คุณเข้าถึงโซลูชันและบริการที่มีคุณภาพสูงสุด

ไม่ว่าโรงงานของคุณจะมีขนาดเล็กหรือใหญ่ Smart Factory พร้อมเป็นส่วนหนึ่งในการขับเคลื่อนธุรกิจของคุณให้เติบโตอย่างยั่งยืน ด้วยนวัตกรรมและเทคโนโลยีอันทันสมัย

พร้อมยกระดับโรงงานของคุณแล้วหรือยัง?

หากคุณมีข้อสงสัย ต้องการคำแนะนำ หรือสนใจที่จะปรึกษาเกี่ยวกับการนำหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติมาใช้ในโรงงานของคุณ สามารถทักเข้ามาพูดคุยกับเราได้เลย! เรายินดีให้บริการและพร้อมเป็นที่ปรึกษาคู่คิดของคุณเสมอ

Description:

Our History:
Founded in 2007, Headzup Inc. began as a small warehouse design & permit expediting operation in Hackensack, NJ with just one employee and one mission: to provide outstanding customer service in an industry where this was far from the norm. This singular focus became the foundation upon which Headzup’s outstanding reputation was built. 

Over the course of those first few years, we developed a solid base of loyal customers, including several Fortune 1000 companies, and gradually expanded our product and service offerings in order to continuously add value to our clients. A decade later that small one-man operation has developed into one of the fastest growing material handling companies on the East Coast with offices in NY & NJ, and over 40 employees throughout the tri-state area.

Name: Acme Distribution
Description:
Acme's History

It all began with one small truck and one very big dream. Acme Delivery Service, Inc. was founded in Denver, Colorado in 1947 by the late Jack Grunwald who sought to provide the leading distribution and warehousing business in the country — and he did. From a single truck start, Grunwald partnered with his competitors in the mid 1960s to create a freight consolidation program, and shortly after, Acme welcomed a full national distribution center. In 1988, Acme Distribution was a one million square-foot facility providing Denver and the Rocky Mountain region with the most state of the art warehousing amenities.

Today, Acme Distribution provides customized service to more than 400 clients with four facilities country-wide that total 2.5 million square feet of warehouse storage, extensive transportation capabilities, and logistics services that suit the needs of more than a dozen different industries. It is size that allows Acme to service the greatest of shipment volumes, and it is acute attention to detail and exceptional customer service that allows Acme to claim its superior status in the logistics industry. Acme provides the peak level of shipping, trucking and freight handling needs. Customer satisfaction, profitability and value creation will be the foundations of our continued growth. Acme Distribution is committed to providing the highest possible level of customer service.

Name: FEDESSA - Federation of European Self Storage Associations
Description:
Established in March 2004 as a response to a fast growing self storage market in Europe, the Federation of European Self Storage Associations (FEDESSA) represents the different self storage associations across Europe. 

The federation consists of self storage associations across Europe and today FEDESSA represents 4,000 self storage facilities or more than 35% of the self storage facilities in Europe, including all the major operators. Our current members are the self storage associations of Belgium, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Norway, Portugal, Sweden, Switzerland, Spain, The Netherlands, Czech Republic and the United Kingdom.  We are also in close contact with existing and potential operators in Austria, Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Poland, Romania and Russia. 
Our main mission is to:
Provide a common voice for the industry throughout Europe.
Support the development of national associations and encourage countries where the industry is starting up to form their own national association. 
Position the self storage industry as a responsible partner and business sector.
Any self storage operator which is member of a European national self storage association is automatically a member of FEDESSA.

Are you a self storage operator in a European country with no self storage association, then you can become a member thanks to our Direct Affiliate membership.

Name: Coop. Agropecuaria Gral. Necochea Llda.
Description:
En honor al Gral. Mariano Necochea, prócer que combatió por la independencia de nuestro pueblo, el 29 de octubre de 1950 alrededor de 170 productores, reunidos en la Biblioteca Andrés Ferreyra fundaron la Cooperativa Agropecuaria Gral. Necochea Ltda.; allí eligieron el primer Consejo de Administración, nombrando como presidente a Roberto Laspiur.  
Inicialmente la cooperativa se centralizó en la ciudad de Necochea pues la mayoría de los productores interesados en formarla tenían sus campos en la zona. Su casa central estuvo ubicada en un galpón cedido por un socio en la esquina de calle 56 y 57 siendo su primer gerente Felipe Del Hoyo.   
Con el transcurso de los años la entidad fue creciendo, contando hoy día con mas de 650 socios, productores agropecuarios de explotaciones ubicadas en los Partidos de Necochea, Lobería, San Cayetano, Tres Arroyos, Gral. Alvarado, Gral. Pueyrredón y Balcarce. 
Actualmente cuenta con una capacidad de almacenaje de mas de 200.000 toneladas de cereales y oleaginosas, distribuidas en 7 plantas de acopio. 
Gracias a la contínua inversión en infraestructura y tecnología ya se han incorporado 8 filiales ubicadas estratégicamente en el sudeste de la provincia de Buenos Aires. 
Quequén /Energia /Lobería /San Agustín /Balcarce /Mechongué /Otamendi /La Ballenera  . 
La Cooperativa brinda diversos servicios y ofrece variedad de productos tanto a sus asociados como a clientes en general.
·         Comercialización de Cereales y Oleaginosas.
·         Comercialización de Hacienda.
·         Venta de Agroinsumos: Fertilizantes, Semillas, Agroquímicos.
·         Venta de Productos Veterinarios.
·         Venta de Combustibles y Lubricantes.
·         Consumos, Ferretería y productos de corralón.
·         Asesoramiento y venta de: Seguros, Salud y Turismo.

Name: Countrywide Commodity Repository Limited
Description:
Welcome to Countrywide Commodity Repository Limited (CCRL) - a reliable partner for electronic ownership and transfer of commodity assets in the Indian markets.

CCRL was established in 2017 with collaboration of three eminent institutions namely, Central Depository Services Ltd. (CDSL), BSE Investments Ltd. & Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX). 

Operating under the regulatory framework of Warehousing Development & Regulatory Authority (WDRA), this national-level institution empowers commodity stakeholders like farmers, FPOs, processors, manufacturers and traders by digitizing warehouse storage receipts, thus facilitating ownership and transfer of commodity assets electronically. This also protects customers from multiple risks associated with traditional warehouse paper-receipts like, fraudulent issuance of warehouse receipts without receipt of goods, over-statement of value or quality of goods, fraudulent issuance of duplicate warehouse receipts, loss, mutilation, tampering or fudging of information in warehouse receipts etc.. 

CCRL provides secure repository services to customers who deposit commodity-assets in WDRA-registered warehouses across India. Issuance of electronic negotiable warehouse receipts (eNWR) through demat accounts ensure secure and transparent ownership and transfers of commodity assets digitally with no human intervention. CCRL-repository platform is also connected to all leading nationalised and private banks & NBFCs that provide seamless pledge finance on eNWRs.

Apart from serving retail customers, traders, Farmers & FPOs around the country, CCRL also exclusively serves Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd. (MCX) and Bombay Stock Exchange Ltd. (BSE) for their trades in commodities.  Do visit our website to know more.

Name: ALDEFE - Asociación De Explotaciones Frigoríficas, Logística Y Distribución De España
Description:
Está formada por empresas individuales dedicadas a la congelación, conservación, transporte y distribución de productos perecederos a temperatura controlada y por la Asociacion Frigorífica de Cataluña , teniendo su sede en Madrid.

ALDEFE es la nueva denominación, que en adaptación a las tendencias de las demás asociaciones europeas y para contemplar más adecuadamente las actividades de sus miembros, ha adoptado la anterior Asociación Nacional de Explotaciones Frigoríficas de España, fundada en 1977 al amparo de la Ley 19/1977 de 1 de abril para la representación y defensa de los intereses profesionales de las empresas que realizan las actividades de almacenamiento frigorífico, logística y distribución.


En la actualidad aglutina alrededor de 74 empresas del sector siendo la capacidad frigorífica total es de unos 2.200.000 m3., de los que un 70 por ciento son de temperatura negativa y el 30% restante de temperatura positiva. Los túneles de congelación alcanzan una capacidad de unas 1.200 Tm./24/h. y la producción de hielo, tanto tradicional como en cubitos o escamas, se cifra en torno a las 1.500 Tm./día.


ALDEFE forma o ha formado parte de diferentes Comisiones y Subcomisiones Ministeriales y de Grupos de Trabajo de distintos ministerios, como la Subcomisión del Transporte de Mercancías Perecederas, la Comisión para la Modificación del RD sobre Instalaciones Frigoríficas, o miembro de los grupos de trabajo de la AESAN.

En el ámbito social negocia el Convenio Colectivo de Frio Industrial de ámbito estatal. Desarrolla y ofrece diferentes programas de formación a través de la Comisión Paritaria de Frío Industrial de la Fundación Tripartita, y diferentes acciones para la Prevención de Riesgos Laborales a través de la Fundación para la Prevención de Riesgos Laborales .

Pertenece a la Confederacion Española de Organizaciones Empresariales (CEOE) y a nivel internacional pertence a la European Cold Storage and Logistics Association ECSLA

Name: CFFT - Logistics
Description:
CFFT is a logistics powerhouse located at the heart of Civitavecchia's commercial port. Boasting a water-bound terminal with two berths, CFFT Spa offers an array of services including stevedoring, diverse storage solutions, and a rail-connected intermodal terminal—unique to the port. Specializing in 3PL logistics, CFFT Spa's strategic location serves as a nexus for Mediterranean distribution, enhanced by comprehensive customs services. The company's offerings span tailored logistics, warehousing, over-land transport, project logistics, e-commerce fulfillment, and intricate customs administration.  It is higly  specialized in storage and distribution throughout the whole of Italy and the Western Mediterranean region of food products, FFV (fresh fruit and vegetables) with in particular bananas and pineapples.
CFFT SpA is a subsidiary of the Antwerp based holding NOORD NATIE, which is a diversified port group founded in the 16th Century.

The terminal of CFFT SpA is located inside the port of Civitavecchia, at quay 24 and 25, next door to the “RTC” container terminal and the “RCT” cruise terminal.
The port of Civitavecchia is commonly considered as the port of Rome due to its proximity to the capital of Italy. It is built on the ancient city of Centumcellae, founded by the Trojans to expand the trade in Rome.
The state-of-the-art warehouse is ideally positioned to allow a fully integrated service package, covering container – warehouse activities – ship operations.
Customers have tagged our logistic concept as Kilometer Zero, as many cruise ships are actually berthing in front of our warehouse.
The CFFT terminal covers 16,000 square meters and offers chilled, frozen and dry storage space in combination with all the necessary permits and authorizations for customs, veterinary and phytosanitarian inspection.
As such, CFFT can meet all logistic and customs requirements of the market – including storage (chilled and frozen) of non-EU goods.

Name: Nepal Warehousing Company Limited
Description:
Nepal Warehousing Company Ltd is established under the Company Act, 2063 of Nepal to cater to the warehousing needs of the farmers, traders, millers and businessmen who deal in trade of grains for their commercial and industrial purposes. These actors more often face post-harvest losses, degraded quality of the product for further use and most frequently face problems of keeping grains in healthy environment for long time period.

In order to keep the quality of grains stored intact for long time, the Nepal Warehousing Company Ltd (NWCL) has brought the solution by installing high quality silos of 55,000 MT capacity at three different places in the province number 1, province number 2 and in Lumbini province. With this installed capacity of 55,000 MT, the company has entered into the business of grain trading with specialized services such as storing, auctioning, bulk transporting, warehouse financing, guaranteeing the quantity as well as quality, insuring the risk and bank financing. It is also expected that the installed warehousing capacity at three different locations would pave the way for industrialization of grain mills, feed mills and overall agriculture as all three warehousing locations have abundant field for grain production. At present the company has target of warehousing maize, soyabean and wheat which are mostly consumed as raw materials for feed millers. Description:
Busydo WMS is a warehouse management system (WMS) conceived to address challenges observed in various warehouse operations. Its development was inspired by the shortcomings noticed in existing systems, particularly the absence of adaptability, scalability, real-time data tracking capabilities, and the need for electronic proof of delivery.
The concept of adaptability refers to the system’s ability to accommodate diverse warehouse environments and their unique needs. Scalability emphasizes the system’s capability to grow and handle increased demands or changes in warehouse operations effectively.
Real-time data tracking is a crucial aspect of Busydo WMS, aiming to provide immediate and accurate insights into inventory movement, orders, and other essential warehouse data. This capability enables timely decision-making and enhances operational efficiency.
The incorporation of electronic proof of delivery (EPOD) in Busydo WMS addresses the need for a digital confirmation mechanism for deliveries. This feature typically includes functions such as digital signatures, timestamps, and documentation to verify and confirm deliveries electronically.

Name: Young Storage Network (YSN)
Description:
The YSN recognises and supports youth in the industry with the idea being for a group of under 40s to get together to network and share ideas. 
With over 285 members and no cost to join, as long as you are under 40 and working in the industry then this group is for you. 

Membership is not only for owners of self storage businesses, but for frontline staff, suppliers, financiers in the industry too.  Membership is on an individual not business base so one business can have multiple members as part of the group. 

Governed by its own board, the YSN is an official working group of the SSA UK.

YSN Vision
To encourage the growth of young people in the self storage industry through networking and professional development.

YSN Mission is:
To increase the number of young people engaged with the Association
Attract more buy in from employers to support the network
Engage members through personal and online methods
Provide training programmes specifically targeting new entrants and young people
Increase awareness and use of technology in the industry
Members meet 3-4 times a year either online or in-person but outside of this, most of the networking takes place on Facebook, LinkedIn and more recently, on WhatsApp where the network share best practice, gain insight into other companies experiences and knowledge base, or simply ask questions.

There are also approximately 4 YSN Educational Sessions for members per year covering topics such as Managing Bad Debt, Looking after your Mental Health, Add On Sales, Company Culture and Leadership, Branding and many more.

The group regularly contributes articles for the SSA UK quarterly magazine, UNLOCKED and has produced video content for the wider SSA UK membership.

Name: Zona Franca Zapala
Description:
La Zona Franca es un territorio extra-aduanero, que permite el diferimiento del pago de los impuestos de nacionalización a la mercadería allí alojada. En este sentido, el Servicio Aduanero Argentino se encuentra fuera de sus limites, tomando intervención en el ingreso y egreso de mercaderías, para su fiscalización y clasificación.
Asimismo, las zonas francas son una herramienta para impulsar la exportación e importación, contribuyendo al crecimiento económico regional, mejorando la eficiencia logística y disminuyendo los costos de operación de las empresas usuarias.
Zona Franca Zapala, permite a sus usuarios; almacenar, fabricar, montar, ensamblar, fraccionar, comercializar, certificar mercaderías; así como también establecer laboratorios, centros de desarrollo tecnológico, call centers y servicios bancarios dentro de sus instalaciones. Otorgando beneficios financieros y reducción de costos operativos de gran importancia, que contribuyen a mejorar su cuadro de resultados.

Es la Zona Franca de Vaca Muerta, se encuentras dentro del reservorio de Vaca Muerta, única en su tipo, sirve principalmente al negocio de Petróleo y Gas, Minería y Agroindustria, es un hub logístico estratégico con acceso bi-oceánico, conectando los Puertos de Aguas profundas del Pacifico, como los del Atlántico, vía ferrocarril, Aeropuerto y rutas terrestres.

Name: CarbonLocked Technologies Inc.
Description:
CARBON S AFE TECHNOLOGIES INC. hereinafter also referred to as CARBONLOCKED is in the business of carbon sequestration and storage solutions. Using innovative technology and novel storage methods, CARBONLOCKED aims to provide a revolutionary solution to Carbon Dioxide emissions.
Currently, Carbon Dioxide (CO2) accounts for 72% of total greenhouse gas emissions globally. Although CO2 is a naturally occurring compound in the atmosphere., increased concentrations due to human activity has had detrimental effects on the environment Excess carbon dioxide leads directly to increased global temperature by trapping heat in the atmosphere. According to recent data. this increase in global temperature leads to increased incidences of extreme weather, famine and flooding1.   CARBONLOCKED aims to provide a carbon storage solution that will safely store excess carbon produced as manufacturing byproducts underground.

Another increasingly concerning problem surrounds unstable oil wells and mine shafts left from resource extraction. Recent research finds that there are over 97,000 oil wells that have not been properly closed in Canada alone. In addition, reports indicate that the pace of abandonment of oil wells is only accelerating. Inactive wells increased by more than 50% from 2015 to 2020'.! (b). These underground cavities are susceptible to toxic leaks which contaminate the surrounding environment and groundwater. Using CARBONLOCKED., manufacturers will be able to effe.ctive.ly fill these underground reservoirs to prevent harmful leaks. with effective technology, CARBONLOCKED will structurally reinforce underground cavities and increase the structural integrity of surrounding areas. Additionally. CARBONLOCKED's durable chemical compound will be able to store carbon for centuries unlike current methods which have limited lifespans.

Name: Basic Crating & Packaging Inc.
Description:
Basic Crating & Packaging provides a full turn-key solution for Crating & Packing needs. BCP will design, build, and pack for your international or domestic needs.

We pride ourselves within the knowledge of our staff and management team having over 30 years’ experience in Crating & Packing industry. We understand and appreciate our customers’ needs as well as the challenges that they face in such a competitive market. Whether you’re a freight forwarder or a manufacturer we understand your complexities when selling services whether internationally or domestically. BCP will take the time to make sure that the projects or freight being moved will be moved at the most cost effective solution with the same quality and service you deserve.

Basic Crating & Packaging is located in Elk Grove Village, IL with over 100,000 sq ft facility that is fully secured and proudly operates as a Bonded Container Freight Station. We have ground level extra wide dock doors to offload trucks inside our warehouse. We have numerous docks for offloading and loading ocean containers, trailers and step-decks.

Basic Crating & Packaging also concentrates on full plant closures or re-locations. Our packaging engineers have over 30 years’ experience in walking through each phase of the move. We will handle the machinery cleaning, coordinate the rigging & dismantling, transportation, packing & consolidation, container loading, outbound transportation and coordinate with the freight forwarder handling the international movement overseas. We pride ourselves to assist in these moves because of the challenges to overcome and communicate on what is best for the customer and what works best to get the job done!

Name: HOBİM Arşivleme ve Basım Hizmetleri A.Ş.
Description:
Hobim Arşivleme ve Basım Hizmetleri A.Ş. bilgisayar destekli dijital basım ve zarflama, ofset basım ve zarf üretimi, çağrı merkezi, fiziksel arşiv, elektronik arşiv, veri kayıt, danışmanlık ve yazılım geliştirme alanlarında hizmet vermektedir. 
1997 yılında bilgisayar destekli dijital basım ve zarf dolumu işlemlerini gerçekleştirmeye başlayan firmanın, dijital basım ve zarflama alanında 100 milyon imaj/ay tam renkli siyah beyaz (S/B) mürekkep püskürtmeli,  49 milyon imaj/ay S/B magnetographic, 500 bin imaj/ay tam renkli lazer ve 3 milyon imaj/ay S/B lazer baskı ile 37 milyon zarf/ay zarflama kapasitesi bulunmaktadır.
2006 yılında ofset basım ve zarf üretimi faaliyetlerine başlayan firma telekomünikasyon, internet, medya, banka ve sigorta sektörlerindeki kurumsal müşterilerine matbaa hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Firma, hizmet sağladığı sektörlerdeki firmaların talepleri doğrultusunda sürekli form üzerine kurumsal kimlik bilgilerini ve logolarını içeren ofset baskı hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Hobim Arşivleme, 115 milyon imaj/700 ton form basım kapasitesine sahiptir. 
Firma, yüksel işlem hacimli kurumlarının büyük miktardaki dokümanlarının, fiziki ve elektronik ortamlarda saklanarak kullanıma sunulması çerçevesinde arşiv yönetim hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Ayrıca, dijital baskısı yapılan içeriklere yönelik çıktıların elektronik ortamlarda saklaması ve çeşitli kanallardan kullanıcı hizmetine sunulması, bilginin oluşturulup elektronik ortama aktarılarak kullanıma açılması, fiziksel olarak saklanması ve gerçek zamanlı raporlanması konularında da hizmet sağlamaktadır. 
Hobim Arşivleme, 35 bin M3 kapalı arşiv alanında yaklaşık fiziksel olarak 1,9 milyon kutu, elektronik olarak 3 milyar adet belge depolamaktadır.

Name: GoBlock USA | Modernize Your Warehouse

 Improving operating efficiency in a tough labor market

But here's the problem - your warehouse tech is not up for the challenge:

By now, you've probably done some work on your own:

Those are good starts—but they’re not getting results:

 It takes too much time to figure it out alone

 Those firms don’t understand your business—and charge too much for generic solutions

So, who can you trust?

We work only with mid-market consumer products companies to modernize their warehouse technologies - by developing a roadmap specific to your business, putting you on the path, and getting you live!

How we work together:

1 We join your team and deep dive your business
2 We work with you to define the options and ROI
3 We bring the right solution providers to the table
4 We lead the implementation and keep it on track
5 We stay until it works and delivers results

What you get:

 Practical tech that fits your business
 A clear roadmap that supports growth and ROI
 Real implementation and operational wins
 A partner who helps you get internal buy-in
 Savings over integrators and suppliers
 And yes—you’ll look sharp doing it!

BTW - we are implementers - not just consultants - and we put skin in the game - ask us how at contact@goblock.co

Name: Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH
Description:
Die Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH, mit ihrem Hauptsitz in Gotha ist ein regionaler Logistikanbieter in Europa.

Als ehemalige Thüringer Verlagsauslieferung Langenscheidt KG (TVA), Tochter des Langenscheidt-Verlages, entstand die heutige Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH im Jahre 1994. 

Durch unsere Branchen-Expertise und unser Produktportfolio entschied sich die Rhenus-Gruppe 2010, die Thüringer Verlagsauslieferung Langenscheidt KG (TVA) zu übernehmen. Fortschritt heißt Veränderung, was uns zu neuen Wegen inspiriert. Nach einem Jahrzehnt der Zusammenarbeit traten wir Anfang 2021 aus der Rhenus-Gruppe aus. Heute sind wir ein eigenständiges Unternehmen.

Wir sind ein Logistik-Unternehmen mit fast 30 Jahren Erfahrungen und realisieren an unseren zentralen Standorten in Thüringen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für unsere Kunden und haben uns in Richtung E-Commerce-Dienstleistungen sowie im Verlagswesen stets weiterentwickelt.

Ob Prozesse in der Lagerung, Kommissionierung, Versand, Retourenmanagement, Value-Added-Services und vieles mehr. Dabei hat die Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH immer einen gemeinschaftlichen Standard aufgebaut. 

We keep your business in progress.

Die ganze Logistik - so wie Sie sie brauchen. Für uns steht nicht in erster Linie die Frage im Raum, wie viele Pakete Sie am Tag versenden, sondern wie Ihr Business funktioniert und wie wir dabei logistisch helfen können. Das ist Prozessanalyse. Das ist Business Consulting. Das ist Customized Fulfillment. Wir bezeichnen das als smarte Logistik.

Impressum: www.t5-logistik.com/impressum
Datenschutz: www.t5-logistik.com/datenschutz

Name: Kanoo Tank Services Co. Ltd. (Sahreej)
Description:

* Tank Cleaning – Specialized cleaning for ISO tanks, swap bodies, IBCs, road tankers, and tankers, including latex and hazardous materials.

* Full Repairs – Frame, cladding, shell repairs, pitting, shell inserts, and full frame refurbishment.

* Inspection & Testing – Statutory inspections, testing, and certification.

* Storage Solutions – Laden and empty tank storage with containment.

* Tank Leasing – Flexible leasing options for various tank types.

* Nitrogen Services – Purging, blanketing, and inerting for safety and product integrity.

* Cross-Loading – Efficient transfer of materials between transport modes.

* On-Hire / Off-Hire Services – Tank readiness checks and preparation.

* Off-Site Emergency Response – Rapid response support for incidents.

Name: Lauralu UK & Ireland
Description:
For more than 20 years, Lauralu has designed, manufactured, and installed bespoke and modular temporary structures on sites across Europe. Our temporary structures are suitable for a range of industrial and commercial applications, and we have supplied high quality solutions to logistics operators, SMEs, retailers, and even institutional and public authorities.

Thanks to our flexible approach, we can provide you with an almost limitless choice of sizes, dimensions, walling, roofing, and technical options. We can provide your business with the perfect temporary building solution, from design to completion, in a matter of days, whilst helping you to spread your costs and meet you budget.

We have a network of highly trained and experienced installers across the UK and Europe. They are capable of working within tight deadlines, whilst meeting all relevant health and safety regulations. We can have a bespoke or modular structure designed, delivered, and installed anywhere in the UK in as little as four weeks.

All of our high quality structures are designed and manufactured in our own factory. From the production and machining of profiles, to the manufacturing of the roof membranes, we control the entire value chain. This means that we are able to deliver a consistently high quality product at competitive manufacturer’s prices.

Our temporary industrial buildings are available to buy or to rent, and we offer a choice of flexible financial options. 

If you only require a short term temporary solution, we have a rental option.  If you require a more permanent solution you can also purchase your structure outright whilst benefiting from our competitive manufacturer’s rates.

Get in touch, and one of our commercial engineers will be happy to discuss your requirements before designing the perfect temporary structure for you.
 
For more information, call us on 01827 215217, or email info@lauraluindustry.co.uk.

Name: sistemas de almacenamiento vertical
Description:
Los almacenes automatizados verticales  permiten automatizar la entrada y la salida de los productos, garantizando un control de las mercancías más rápido y preciso. 
La principal ventaja que notarás desde el primer momento es la optimización del espacio: al almacenar las mercancías en nuestros almacenes automáticos verticales es posible recuperar hasta el 90% del espacio en el suelo.
Además, combinando los almacenes automáticos verticales con el software de gestión de almacenes (WMS) es posible reducir los errores y controlar en tiempo real el estado del almacén y de las mercancías.
Las ventajas de utilizar los almacenes automáticos verticales y horizontales Modula
 Recuperación de espacio
 Ahorro de tiempo
 Seguridad de las mercancías
 Ergonomía y seguridad del operador
 Configuración personalizada
 Reducción de errores y gestión de existencias
 Máxima capacidad
 Software dedicado
 Facilidad de uso
La principal cualidad de los sistemas de almacenamiento vertical es el aprovechamiento máximo de la altura disponible con la menor superficie utilizada.
Los almacenes verticales automatizados son módulos de almacenamiento diseñados para gestionar los stocks de cualquier tipo de producto de pequeño formato de manera automática y mecanizada en altura, aprovechando más el espacio vertical y no tanto horizontal.

Name: NextBitLogistics
Description:
NextBit Logistics is a company that offers a range of services related to logistics and fleet management, with a focus on human resources, fleet management, warehousing, and storage solutions. These services can be crucial for businesses that rely on the efficient movement and management of goods and materials. Here's a brief overview of the key services provided by NextBit Logistics:
1.	HR Services: NextBit Logistics likely offers human resources services to help businesses manage their workforce efficiently. This might include recruitment, training, payroll management, and other HR-related functions to ensure the smooth operation of logistics and warehousing activities.
2.	Fleet Management: Fleet management services involve the optimization and management of a company's vehicle fleet. This can include tracking and monitoring vehicles, maintenance scheduling, fuel efficiency improvements, and route optimization to reduce costs and improve overall efficiency.
3.	Warehousing: Warehousing services include the storage, organization, and management of goods and materials in a warehouse or storage facility. This can include inventory management, order fulfillment, and security measures to ensure the safety and accessibility of stored items.

The combination of these services can help businesses streamline their logistics and supply chain operations, reduce costs, and improve overall efficiency. NextBit Logistics may tailor its offerings to meet the specific needs of its clients in these areas.

Name: Heber Mühendislik
Description:
30 yılı aşkın mühendislik deneyimi ve uzman ekibiyle depo raf sistemleri, taşıma ve depolama paletleri üreticisi HEBER Mühendislik’e hoşgeldiniz. 

Firmamız İzmir AOSB’de kurulu fabrika ve merkez ofisi ile, depo raf sistemleri, taşıma ve depolama metal paletleri, deprem analizli raf projeleri alanlarında son teknoloji üretim ekipmanları ve uluslararası sertifikasyonları ile imalat ve kurulum yapmaktadır. 

Depo raf endüstrisinde kalite, dayanıklılık ve yenilik standartlarını yükseltmeyi amaçlayan Heber Mühendislik, güvenli, uzun ömürlü ve dayanıklı depolar için yine uzman ekibiyle, sektörde fark yaratarak, Raf Periyodik Kontrol ve Raporlama hizmeti de sunmaktadır. 

Raf sistemleri ve depolamanın tedarik zincirindeki uçtan uca sürecinde keşiften, projelendirmeye, statik analizlerden depo raf kontrollerine kadar kendi bünyemizdeki ekibimizle hizmet veriyoruz. Yine kendi bünyemizdeki Ar & GE merkezimizle inovasyon odaklı bir yaklaşım sunuyor, depo alanlarınızı ve lojistik süreçlerinizi optimize ederken, en yüksek kaliteli hammaddeleri seçiyor, müşteri talebine göre özel üretim esnekliğinden güç alarak uluslararası standartlarda üretim yapıyoruz. 

Bugün, +3 Milyon m2 depo raf kurulumu +200.000 metal palet üretimi deneyimi ile Heber Mühendislik olarak 200’den fazla ulusal ve global müşterinin tercihi olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Speedrack was the first to develop completely tubular pallet rack, and remains one of the few to provide seamless tubing for columns, beams, horizontals, and diagonal bracing. Few rack manufacturers offer this style due to the higher production costs and greater precision requirements compared to open shapes. Tubular designed rack allows us to provide our customers with greater strength per pound of steel and higher resistance to damage than conventional open shape sections. This means increased safety, longer life, and lower maintenance of your rack solution.
  
The results—superior products and storage solutions that combine the best initial value with low maintenance and damage resistant features that save money long after the installation is complete.

Port Klang Free Zone or PKFZ is an integrated 1,000-acre Free Commercial and Industrial Zone providing facilities for international cargo distribution and consolidation centre. PKFZ is situated in Port Klang, adjacent to port, the world’s 12th ranked port in 2019 in terms of throughput volume.

The project is a mixed development comprising of manufacturing activities complemented by amenities designed to facilitate the growth of regional distribution centres or international procurement centres. PKFZ has been designed to promote entreport trade and manufacturing industries involved in producing goods primarily for export. Gazetted as a Free Zone, PKFZ incorporates both commercial and manufacturing activities that are further supported by quality and value-added services.

PKFZ offers consolidated facilities where factories and logistics firms can be located in the same zone so as to allow for easier co-ordination and smoother supply chain management

Liquipar Terminal in Paranaguá is equipped with a highly trained team and security-oriented facilities, providing high-quality services to its customers.

Liquipar operates two terminals that sum a total capacity of 79,021 m³, with expansion projects in progress.

The facilities have direct connection lines with the Port, allowing the reception and discharge of maritime cargo, in addition to a complete road operation. The Terminal is also interconnected with the railway network, with access to the Malha Sul, Ferroeste and Curitiba Paranaguá railway networks.

Name: BLS AS
Description:
Egen produksjon er gull verdt

Kunnskapsrike og engasjerte medarbeidere har sammen med høyeffektivt og automatisert produksjonsutstyr gjort oss til en av markedets ledende aktører innen lagerinnredning. Helt fra starten forsto vi at veien til suksess handler om å være grundig i detaljarbeid. Med nærhet til egen produksjon kan vi hele tiden strebe etter å utvikle og forbedre produktene våre. Dette er en forutsetning for å kunne svare på våre kunder og deres behov, på den absolutt beste måten.

Fra idé til ferdig lager

Gjennom vår lange erfaring i kombinasjon med fleksible produkter er et skreddersydd oppbevaringssystem for din virksomhet og dine behov en selvfølge for oss. Vi er med deg fra førstegangsrådgivning til montering av ferdig oppbevaringssystem. Vi er bare fornøyde når du er fornøyd!

Vi har ressursene som kreves!

Vår styrke er å tilby fleksible løsninger sammen med raske leveranser og å alltid bruke vår kunnskap til kundens beste. Vi legger stor vekt på sikker materialhåndtering og for å sikre de høye kvalitets- og sikkerhetskravene som kreves, er produktene våre dekket av produktsertifisering NO-EN 15522. Vi er også sertifisert i henhold til ISO 9001 kvalitetssystem.

Name: TEMESİST ALGÉRİE Systèmes De Rayonnage D'entrepôt İndustriels
Description:
Systèmes De Rayonnage D'entrepôt - Systèmes D'entrepôt İndustriels 
Temesist est devenu une compagnie leader dans le domaine de dépôt et de rayonnage industriel pas seulement en Turquie avec sa vision entrepreneuriale innovatrice, mais aussi sur le marché international.

La compagnie TEMESİST fondée 1980 avec un capital 100% turc, continue d’être le fournisseur principal en technologie de dépôt et de rayonnage industriel grâce à des ingénieurs turcs.

TEMESİST possède une manufacture 17000 m² dans la zone industrielle de BİLECİK, travaillant sous le standard TS EN İSO 15512.

Le siège de notre  société est situé en Turquie  à Istanbul  et nous avons des bureaux de ventes à Adana, aussi bien qu’en Ouzbékistan, en Géorgie et d’autres bureaux régionaux à l’étranger.

Pour contribuer à la croissance de la Turquie par nos exportations, nous avons décidé d’établir notre propre division d’exportation à TEMESİST.AŞ  afin de renforcer notre société et bien le placé dans cette industrie.

TEMESİST, le leader en Turquie dans l’industrie de système de stockage et de rayonnage prouve son succès en exportant ses produits dans 55  pays. Notre croissance rapide sur un court période de temps a transformé TEMESİST en une des compagnies les plus respectée dans l’industrie de rayonnage.

Notre compagnie accorde une importance vitale dans la recherche et développement des systèmes industriels de stockage et de rayonnage. Les nouveaux produits offerts sur le marché par notre compagnie, conçus par nos ingénieurs sont approuvés par de prestigieux universités nationaux qu’internationaux.

Ces études sont réalisées en coordination avec des universités notables où les nouveaux  produits que nous concevons sont transférés de notre unité de recherche et développement à des universités pour les tests finaux.

Nos produits sont conçus et fabriqués selon les normes de la TSEK, et a permis à notre société de remporter des prix de qualités international.

TEMESİST offre une expérience hors du commun en fournissant la meilleure solution à nos clients nationaux et internationaux, en gestion de projets avec un personnel qualifié et un travail d’équipe.

TEMESİST est un partenaire commercial de confiance qui avance en toute sérénité vers ses objectifs avec des capacités technologiques supérieures et qui compte travailler aux cotés de ses clients sur le long terme. C’est notre priorité de répondre rapidement aux demandes de nos clients avec les projets les plus appropriés qui sont dignes de notre crédibilité dans le secteur.

Notre compagnie a adopté un principe de croissance continue à travers ses projets qui sont développés et réalisés par ses employés et en utilisant des technologies modernes sensible à la santé publique, à l’environnement afin de garantir la sécurité de l’emploie.

Name: Ganesh Benzoplast Ltd. (Infrastructure Division)
Description:
Ganesh Benzoplast Limited (GBL), established in 1986, is a leading liquid storage solutions provider and specialty chemicals manufacturer based in Mumbai, India. With strategically located bulk liquid storage terminals at Jawaharlal Nehru Port Trust (JNPT) in Navi Mumbai, Cochin Port Trust in Cochin, and Mormugao Port Trust in Goa, GBL offers a combined storage capacity of 352,000 kiloliters (KL) across 98 storage tanks. These tanks, constructed using stainless steel, mild steel, and pre-coated steel, ensure secure handling of diverse liquid products for industries such as oil and gas, chemicals, and food processing.

In addition to storage, GBL is a trusted name in specialty chemicals manufacturing, producing sodium benzoate, benzoic acid, and lubricant additives. These products are essential in sectors like food preservation, pharmaceuticals, and automotive lubricants, with manufacturing facilities located in Tarapur, Maharashtra.

GBL's extensive client portfolio includes industry leaders such as Asian Paints Ltd, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd, and Jubilant Life Sciences Ltd, reflecting its reputation for reliability and excellence.

Led by Mr. Rishi Pilani, a second-generation entrepreneur and experienced chemical engineer, GBL combines global expertise with a commitment to innovation, operational excellence, and customer-centric solutions. With a robust infrastructure, dedicated team, and strong industry presence, GBL is well-equipped to meet evolving market demands and solidify its role as a trusted partner in the liquid storage and specialty chemicals sectors.

Name: Grupo ATT - Armazenagem Transporte e Transbordo
Description:
A ATT é uma empresa paranaense, pioneira no mercado de logística de transporte, no segmento de terminais rodoferroviários de granéis agrícolas.

Fundada em 1993, rapidamente consolidou-se em uma posição de liderança no setor de terminais intermodais, tendo participado ativamente da expansão ferroviária da Malha Norte, através da consultoria para implantação e operação de diversos terminais intermodais no Mato Grosso do Sul.

Com capacidade de movimentar 7,8 milhões de toneladas de produtos ao ano (26 mil toneladas/dia), a ATT opera com açúcar, grãos (soja, milho, trigo, sorgo, etc.) e farelos agrícolas, além de óleo vegetal, atendendo às maiores trading companies mundiais.

Estamos comprometidos em oferecer soluções personalizadas, tecnologia avançada e atendimento excepcional para garantir a satisfação e o sucesso de cada cliente.

Almejamos ser reconhecidos como o parceiro de escolha para aqueles que buscam segurança, confiabilidade e excelência em armazenamento de grãos.   

Valores:  
Qualidade: Comprometemo-nos com os mais altos padrões de qualidade em todas as nossas operações e serviços.  

Confiabilidade: Nossos clientes podem confiar na AC Grãos para proteger seus grãos e seu investimento com integridade e cuidado.  

Inovação: Buscamos constantemente maneiras de melhorar e inovar em nossos serviços e processos para atender às necessidades em constante evolução de nossos clientes.  

Parceria: Valorizamos os relacionamentos de longo prazo com nossos clientes, colaboradores e comunidades, construindo parcerias sólidas baseadas em confiança e respeito mútuo.

Description:

Major imports of coal, crude oil, Project Machinery Cargo, Fertilizers and other POL products arrive in this port and exports of mineral and metals viz., iron ore, Ferro Silicon, Manganese, Aluminum Ingots, Quartz, Food Commodities, Sea Food etc. The hinterland of the port includes the whole of Andhra Pradesh State, Chattisgarh State, Odisha State and part of Maharashtra. The required skilled and talented manpower for the shipping industry is available in plenty in this region due to the presence of the AP SEZ, VSEZ, Public Sector giant like Hindustan Shipyard Ltd., Naval Dock Yard, Head Qtrs of Eastern Naval Command of Indian Navy and major industries like Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited, Hindustan Zinc Ltd, and Coromandel International Ltd etc.

SRAVAN GROUP has already established a large customer base covering various industries like Fertilizers, Fertilizer raw materials, Chemicals and Pharma, Food grains, Coal, Iron Ore, Steel, Cement, Petroleum products, Sugar etc., and has specialized in handling bulk cargo at Vizag Port, Gangavaram Port and Kakinada Port and containerized cargo at VCTPL, Visakhapatnam..

SRAVAN GROUP is also a leading warehousing service provider in Private Sector in South India and having own warehousing facilities in Vizag, Gangavaram and Kakinada to cater the needs of importers and exporters through Vizag, Gangavaram and Kakinada ports with about 7, 00,000 square feet of closed warehousing space besides having an overall 15, 00,000 square feet of open yard for stacking/storing of containers and various bulk and break bulk materials since its inception in the year 1997.
