İkitelli'de bulunan ve 2000 metrekarelik kapalı alana sahip olan fabrikamızda farklı raf sistemlerinde kullanılmak üzere ayda 200.000 kg hammade kullanılmaktadır.

Firmamız teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek imalat aşamasında kullandığı çeşitli press makinaları,çeşitli giotin makaslar,gaz altı kaynaklar, tam otomatik boyama fırınları, tam otomatik raf kesme ve sürücülü profil delme makinalarını güçlendirerek daima kendini geliştirmekte ve sağladığı ürün kalitesini ortaya koymuştur.

Profesyonel ve eğitimli personelden oluşan montaj ve üretim ekibimiz, imalat aşamasından kurulum aşamasına  kadar her süreçte uluslararası standartlara uygun  olarak ve güvenlik unsurlarına dikkat ederek çalışmaktadırlar.

What sets us apart:

We understand the stresses and challenges of setting up an efficient and effective supply chain that allows you to capture valuable online sales in today's, direct to consumer, digital world.

We are flexible, reliable and affordable.
So that’s what we deliver. All the capability, expertise and in-depth experience you need, all combined in an impressively easy end-to-end ecommerce fulfilment service.

• Omnichannel fulfilment services to multiple retailers and ecommerce platforms.
• Big or small, fragile or heavy, we can ship all items direct to both customers and businesses.
• Flexible packing solutions which combine custom packaging and intelligent software.
• We work with many major couriers to offer a wide range of delivery options (including age verified or express next day) with tracking numbers for customer visibility.
• We are integrated with lots of different channels.
• We can store and hold stock in our 35,000 sq ft distribution centre to help manage your inventory and fulfilment needs.

Because we take care of everything for you, cutting through the complexity of setting up and running your own direct to consumer operations to give you a low-risk (or even no-risk) and completely customisable route to stress-free online sales and reliable ‘no returns’ home deliveries. 

Interested in setting up a seamless D2C delivery service? 

Talk to us today

As a family-owned business with over 40 years of experience, we deliver tailored fulfilment solutions backed by deep industry knowledge.

As one of Australia’s first B Corp certified 3PL, we take sustainability seriously. We invest in solar energy, garment recycling programs and ethical partnerships to reduce environmental impact while maintaining operational excellence.

Our Mission:
To simplify and scale fulfilment for brands that care, helping them grow sustainably, serve customers efficiently and reduce logistics complexity through innovation and purpose.

What We Deliver:
- Multi-channel fulfilment for B2B and D2C

- Custom solutions for fashion, beauty and lifestyle brands
- Value-added services such as garment-on-hanger storage, steam tunnels and kitting
- Certified sustainable operations aligned with purpose-driven brands

With Williams Logistics, you're not just outsourcing. You're partnering with a team committed to redefining fulfilment.

Name: Yes Equipment & Services, Inc.
Description:
Company Profile

At Yes Equipment & Services, Inc. there is a familiar saying, “If you drive it, sit on it, walk on it, wear it, live it, or eat it, it’s probably been handled by a lift truck.” The company, located in Menomonee Falls and Madison Wisconsin, supplies and services new and used lift trucks, as well as personnel carriers, aerial work platforms, material handling equipment and electric forklifts for industries that typically use them to lift and move items throughout a warehouse.

     Yes Equipment offers at their Wisconsin locations high-quality, American-made new and used forklifts and lift trucks backed by an international company, one of the largest in the industry. Some competitors have farmed out the production and, years later, the necessary parts are unavailable. By manufacturing and servicing what it sells, Yale Forklift and its distributors, such as YES provide a chain of original parts and custom service. Yes Equipment still services a 1946 Yale lift truck, as well as material handling equipment manufactured by competitors.

“The largest customers come to us and stay with us because our focus is service,” Cliff Anglewicz (Owner) says. “We understand that their equipment has to work all the time because down time and lost productivity are extremely expensive.”

“We've heard over and over again that we are the most technically advanced Yale dealership,” Cliff says. “Typically, the industry is not technologically advanced, so we have an edge with our customers. I came from the automotive business where everything is computer automated. I'm always looking for ways to do things better for less money.”

In 2001, the Open Invoice System website was implemented, moving Yes Equipment to a paperless system. The Open Invoice System features secured reporting and electronic invoicing, coupled with a unique scanning system.

- Milwaukee: City By the Waters
Towery Publishing  2001

Description: First launched in 1968, SEMA has forged its reputation for excellence to become the lead voice on safe storage practice. Today, over 165 SEMA member businesses, together with committees and training initiatives, combine their knowledge, skill and expertise as the British Trade Association of the Storage Equipment Industry. SEMA’s mission is our commitment to promoting and extending the safe design, installation and use of storage equipment manufactured and supplied by our members.

Description: META-Regalbau develops, produces and distributes stationary and dynamic shelving and racking systems. Its product range includes shelving systems, pallet and cantilever racking systems, as well as mobile racks, flow racks, and storage platforms. Notre politique commerciale intègre en permanence les valeurs de l’entreprise : le respect de nos engagements, la réactivité et la préoccupation de servir au mieux nos clients.

C’est grâce à ces valeurs et à notre savoir-faire, qu’aujourd’hui nous comptons parmi nos référencements de grandes enseignes nationales et internationales.

Name: Prime Distribution Services
Description:
Prime Distribution Services provides a comprehensive suite of Retail Consolidation solutions to help companies comply with complex big box retailer delivery requirements.

Description:

We also offer project management services whereby we help plan the setup of a warehouse or distribution center and then supply and install a tailored package of the features mentioned above.

Name: Precision Warehouse Design
Description:
Precision Warehouse Design (PWD) is a leading material handling integrator and solutions provider with extensive expertise in design, engineering, and implementation of rack and storage systems, automated material handling and conveyor solutions, and controls software. 
PWD’s unique business model of speed to market, technical competency, and employee empowerment has allowed the company to complete thousands of projects that deliver holistic systems including order fulfillment, AS/RS, conveyance, carousels, pallet rack systems, sortation systems, picking modules, mezzanines, controls software, and after-market services. 
In 2024, PWD joined Sammons Warehouse Solutions, a subsidiary of Sammons Industrial. Sammons Industrial is a subsidiary of Sammons Enterprises, an employee-owned family of businesses dedicated to becoming the preferred single-source solution for industrial operations through service, community engagement, and integrity. The Sammons Industrial family of businesses include PWD and the following brands: Briggs Equipment, Briggs Earth & Ag, Briggs Truck & Rail, Sync Storage Solutions, and SitePro Rentals, giving PWD the ability to connect clients with everything they need to build and run their facility.
PWD’s priority is to build relationships with clients and understand how to solve their material handling challenges. Learn more at www.precisionwarehousedesign.com.

Name: Link51 Storage Systems
Description:
Link51 has been producing innovative storage solutions in the UK since 1951. Whittan’s original trusted brand started out as The Handy Angle over 70 years ago, and has grown to become the UK’s largest manufacturer of steel shelving and pallet racking.

Link 51 also offer a range of storage related services from no obligation site surveys and space planning to design, installation and safety inspections.  The company's comprehensive range of products and services is suitable for all types of markets including; manufacturing, distribution, education, healthcare, food & drink, heritage and retail sectors.

Our manufacturing facilities all benefit from running integrated ISO9001, ISO14001 and ISO 18001 quality and environmental control systems and being UK based, keep our customers’ carbon footprint to a minimum.

Our particular commitment to health and safety in design and construction means Link 51 works in partnership with a growing number of clients, for whom Link 51 provide peace of mind – particularly when it comes to the implementation of large-scale or technically complex schemes.

Link 51 is part of Whittan Storage Systems, which manufactures an extensive range of pallet racking, shelving, lockers, cupboards and other storage equipment for clients around the world.

BHD is one of leading supplier of a comprehensive range of Warehouse Storage Equipment in Vietnam. Our focus is to assist clients in maximizing warehouse space to reduce cost and increase their satisfactions.

We are specialized in producing various US standard teardrop pallet racks, Australian standard pallet racking, European standard pallet racking and cantilever racking. With the continuous improvement of the company's production capacity, we will have more and more products to supply such as push back racking, drive in racking and so on.

BHD Vietnam has unique advantages. It is no import duty to United States. The port city Da Nang is only 45 mins drive from our factory. And there is the direct shipping lane from Da Nang Port to Long Beach & Los Angeles Port. We expect to establish long term business relationship with all racking distributors and buyers.

Name: HOLD Self Storage
Description:
HOLD is a new self storage business helping Londoners and local businesses make more space for what matters. 

We lead with service first and people at the heart. We want us storing your belongings to have a direct, positive impact on your life which is why at H*LD Self-Storage, we're reimagining the way you think about space. 

 More Than Storage: We don't just rent out storage units; we create room for your life. Your space, your canvas, your sanctuary.

 Elevating Lives: Our mission is to empower you with the freedom to live, work, and thrive. We believe space should be accessible, not a luxury.

 People-first Service: With top-notch security, 24/7 access, and a commitment to your peace of mind, we want to become London's self-storage champion.

 Join the Movement: Welcome to the future of self-storage. Join us in making space for life and reclaiming the joy of clutter-free living.

 Serving London: Proudly located in the heart of London, we're here to serve our vibrant community.

 Connect With Us: Join our network for updates, tips on decluttering, and the latest in self-storage solutions.

Discover how 'Hold Self-Storage' is creating space for brighter, more organised, and happier lives.

At StorBox, we offer flexible storage options designed to meet a variety of needs, from personal storage during life transitions to business storage for inventory and equipment. Our facilities are equipped with advanced security measures, ensuring your belongings are protected 24/7.

We pride ourselves on exceptional customer service, making the storage process simple and hassle-free. Whether you need short-term or long-term storage, StorBox provides the perfect space for your peace of mind.

Store with confidence—store with StorBox!

At Storage King, we make self storage simple, secure, and scalable. With over 20 years of experience, we operate a network of 47 locations across the UK, offering tailored storage solutions for homes, students, and businesses. 

Storage King Management First is the UK’s leading self storage management company and the only open-to-market third-party management platform backed by a listed operator. That means institutional-grade governance, transparent reporting and the kind of operational discipline private equity expects and trusts. Find out more here: https://storagekingmanagement.co.uk/

From shelving and adjustable pallet racking, up to complex solutions like self supporting racking structures (clad rack building).

Name: SecurCare Self Storage
Description:
For over 30 years, SecurCare Self Storage has been dedicated to safely storing your possessions and boasts over 200 stores across 13 states in the U.S.. Established in 1988 and based in Lone Tree, Colorado, SecurCare operates under the management of NSA Storage, a real estate investment trust comprised of 12 self-storage brands and managing over 1,000 storage facilities across the United States.

Our commitment to excellence drives us to continually acquire and develop self-storage facilities in both current and new markets. We take pride in providing secure, convenient, and accessible storage solutions for all your needs.

SecurCare was internalized by NSA Storage in 2013 and is one of 12 PROs operated by NSA Storage.

Name: Djibouti International Free Trade Zone
Description:
L’APFZD en partenariat avec China Merchant Group (CMG) and Dalian Port (PDA) a lancé un projet ambitieux de construction  d’une zone franche commerciale et industrielle d’une superficie de 48km2, activement dans l’exploitation, la construction, la gestion et l’opération de la zone franche Internationale de Djibouti s’appuyant sur les expériences réussies en Chine.

Cette zone franche suivra le modele du PPC (Port-Park-City) caractérisé par un développement intégré du « port à l’avant, des parcs industriels au milieu et des villes ».Elle sera une plateforme moderne fournissant différentes services de qualité pour les entreprise qui seront installées dans la zone.

La Zone franche internationale de Djibouti s’étendant sur 48.2km2, dont 6km2 pour la première phase est 2.4km2 pour la pilot zone à proximité des principaux ports de Djibouti.

L’objectif principal de la Zone franche Internationale est de devenir un nouveau moteur du développement économique de DJIBOUTI d’un centre logistique, Commercial, industriel et financier en Afrique de l’Est.

Elle se focalise sur le développement d’industries telles que la logistique, le commerce, la production et la transformation.

Cette dernière est constituée par les matériaux de construction, l’électroménager, l’automobile et ces accessoires, la machinerie, l’ameublement, l’industrie électrique etc...

La zone franche Internationale de Djibouti s’attache à établir un environnement commercial en conformité avec la règlementation internationale.

Elle s’engage aussi à rechercher de nouvelles idées et nouvelles voies pour élargir l’ouverture et approfondir la reforme, et pour mieux servir les entreprise internationales.

Using state-of-the-art technology, Allan Brothers Fruit strives to provide the highest quality domestic & export fruit products to the end consumer as well as exceed the needs of its retail customers.

As a family-owned business, Allan Bros., Inc. is also involved in local agricultural production. In business since 1951, Allan Brothers grows apples, pears and cherries. The company sells and distributes its produce to consumers throughout the United States, as well as internationally through an expansive chain of retailers. Name: Safer Storage Systems
Description:
Safer Storage Systems is an industry-leading Australian pallet racking manufacturer and provider of end-to-end warehouse solutions. We help businesses optimise storage capacity, improve safety, and reduce operational costs through tailored racking, automation, and warehouse systems.

As the exclusive supplier of Gonvarri Material Handling across ANZ, we combine world-class European engineering with local manufacturing expertise. Our Silverline Pallet Racking is Australian-made, high-performance, and delivers up to 85% lower CO₂ emissions than imported alternatives—a sustainable solution designed to meet the highest standards of quality and durability.

Beyond racking, we deliver advanced automation technologies including Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs), the Sky Transfer Unit (STU), and 4-Way Shuttle systems. These cutting-edge solutions empower businesses to boost efficiency, improve safety, and scale operations with confidence.

From pallet racking and shelving to complete warehouse fit-outs, our team delivers solutions that are innovative, reliable, and future-ready. With a focus on sustainability, safety, and scalability, we partner with businesses to maximise space, streamline logistics, and unlock growth potential.

 Ready to transform your warehouse? Connect with us today to explore how Safer Storage Systems can help you build safer, stronger, and more sustainable warehouse operations.

Name: Econpro
Description:
Welcome to Econpro, the specialist group of companies that transforms wastes and by-products into sustainable products for many industrial sectors.

Econpro was founded in 2007 and currently operates from a covered 36,000 sq ft facility in Deeside, North Wales. Econpro specialise in the sortation, storage, bulking, and fulfilment of single stream recyclable materials. We support the recycling of millions of difficult products annually, helping clients and partners achieve their recycling goals and reduce carbon emissions.

We are a rapidly growing business with global connections and partnerships that are revolutionising the way we recycle and reuse materials, saving money, time and the Earth’s precious resources. 

 We can handle a wide range of materials, either palletised or loose and with excellent transport links, we are ideally placed to help your business run smoothly.

The business has seen tremendous growth since launching in 2001 and ¬¬in January 2016, DiversiTech Corp a leading supplier of HVACR parts announced that it had purchased Pump House. The Pump House team are here to ensure we deliver our products with excellence.

Thank you for your continued help and support.

Name: Henry Bath & Son Ltd
Description:
Established in 1794, Henry Bath is a specialist in global commodities Exchange warehousing and logistics.

The Company is licensed by the world's premier commodity Exchanges to issue Exchange-traded Warrants and Warehouse Receipts for metals and commodities stored across its worldwide network of facilities. Henry Bath warehouse certificates are recognised as premium security documents for commodity financing by banks, insurers and institutional investors.

Henry Bath is a founding member of the London Metal Exchange ("LME") and issued the first LME Warrant in 1883. Henry Bath is now part-owned by CMST Development Co. Ltd. ("CMST") who are a leading warehouse operator in China and who hold a significant position as a delivery warehouse for the Shanghai Futures Exchange ("SHFE").

Name: RAMS - Rack Asset Management System
Description:
At RAMS, we are redefining warehouse safety and operational efficiency with digital solutions. Our platform seamlessly integrates Digital Twin Technology, Real-Time Diagnostics, and Comprehensive Lifecycle Management to empower businesses to achieve safer, smarter, and more compliant warehouses.

Backed by decades of expertise in civil engineering and audits, and leveraging SaaS-based innovation, RAMS is uniquely positioned to address the complexities of rack safety and warehouse management. From automated inspections to advanced analytics for Material Handling Equipment (MHE), RAMS delivers actionable insights that drive efficiency, reduce risks, and support better decision-making.

What We Offer:
Rack Audit: Backed by our parent company Salt Design and Infra Services Pvt. Ltd. and RAMS Technology in providing comprehensive rack audit and Stability Certification.
IRDS (Integrated Racking Diagnostic Suite): Automates inspections, tracks issues, and ensures compliance for End Clients to carry out rack inspections.

MEPS (Mobile Equipment Positioning Suite): Optimizes MHE tracking and route management.
RTSS (Real-Time Safety Suite): Provides real-time alerts and impact analysis.

With a growing footprint across industries and geographies, RAMS is more than a technology provider; we are your partner in achieving operational excellence.

Join us as we create a future where warehouse safety and efficiency go hand in hand.

Through analytical consultations of your operations, our mission is to provide you with solutions that offer a competitive advantage and a return on investment well into the future. We specialize in conveyor and sortation systems, system integration, autonomous vehicles, horizontal & vertical lift modules, ASRSs, and robotics. 

Greenspace Industrial serves our domestic market of Canada as well as the United States & Mexico, offering full support well over North America. Overall, through our service offerings, we use sustainable business practices and aim to reduce CO emissions worldwide. For any project inquiries and or info, contact us at sales@greenspaceind.com

Name: CNAGA Armazéns Gerais Alfandegados Ltda
Description:
Em 1967, a CNAGA foi fundada na cidade de São Sebastião, litoral norte paulista, com o objetivo de incrementar as transações comerciais no porto local, até então desprovido de armazéns e consequentemente, alijado das operações do Comércio Exterior.

Alternativa ideal para o já congestionado Porto de Santos, a CNAGA de São Sebastião foi o primeiro armazém alfandegado do País a receber, em 1972, a permissão do Ministério da Fazenda para operar o regime especial de entreposto aduaneiro na importação. Mais tarde, a permissão foi estendida à exportação e, em 1981, suas unidades de São Sebastião e São Paulo receberam habilitação da Receita Federal para operar também na qualidade de Depósitos Alfandegados Públicos - DAPs - de importação e exportação; atualmente chamados de Porto Seco.

Hoje, a CNAGA representa um Complexo de Terminais Armazenadores, totalmente informatizado, operando sob Regimes Especiais Aduaneiros e especializado na armazenagem de Carga Geral, Contêineres e Grãos. Mantém unidades de operação em São Sebastião, na Grande São Paulo e em Conchas.

Name: Nesta Ireland
Description:
Nesta is a family run indigenous business that was established 1989 and is the largest and oldest self-storage provider in Ireland, and is part of the Kefron Group.

Over the last 25 years our business has come to mean much more than providing secure storage for our customer’s valued belongings it is about making room for people in their lives, room for a family to grow, room to breathe after a life event, room for businesses to grow.

Our business is rooted in the local communities and we provide a much needed service to our many customers for the countless reasons they need storage. From personal to professional, precious to practical there is a story behind every shutter.

Our Mission

To “Make room for life” by providing secure storage rooms for individuals, families and businesses to keep their “valued belongings” safe. We have a “duty of care” and look after customers’ belongings as if they were our own and through shared “Culture & Values” we will deliver a positive and personal experience that customers will share with others.

WHY CHOOSE NESTA?

7 day access – We have longer opening hours on more days than any other storage company in Ireland

Location - We have 6 premium locations that are easily to access and easy to find situated next to the M50, N11 and M1 with onsite parking available.

Flexible terms - private storage rooms for a few weeks, months or however long you need.

Peace of mind – Un-paralleled security with individually alarmed units, unique PIN code access and 24hr CCTV.

Packing materials and boxes - Buy online or in store, we have everything you need to pack and protect your belongings.

Additional services - We can provide you with shelving/racking, trolleys, pallet trucks, moving carts, and forklift hire. 

Business + - We offer workspaces, serviced offices, virtual offices, virtual warehouse team and meeting rooms 

Because our customers say so!

Name: Prontometal S.A.
Description:
Prontometal fue fundada en el año 1969 comercializando equipamiento para almacenaje y exhibición de productos, así como también especializándose en equipamiento de logística e integral.

La ingeniería y profesionalismo fue y es el corazón de la empresa, ya sea en sistemas robóticos, automatismos o incrementos en resistencia de racks porta pallets dinámicas.  

Fue precisamente nuestra empresa quien introdujo en tan temprana época el concepto de mejor aprovechamiento del "Espacio" así como facilitar almacenaje, carga, descarga y distribución en Uruguay. En aquellos tiempos cuando la palabra logística no se conocía, Prontometal introdujo al mercado ese concepto de optimización logística.

Más allá de la calidad y la oportunidad de sus productos, fue la "cultura" empresarial que se inauguró con el concepto de "vocación de servicio y excelencia" como primer postulado.

Ese vértigo, fue uno de los diferenciales de la empresa y le valió el "Pronto" de su nombre, que junto al "Metal", que no requiere explicación, identiﬁcaron e identiﬁcan a la propuesta más económica y eﬁciente en soluciones de espacio; “la logística para ganar espacio”.

Prontometal exporta a los países de América Latina así como también amplió su comercialización al resto del mundo.

Nuestras alianzas estratégicas con lideres mundiales indiscutibles en tecnología y automatización nos hace cada vez mas sólidos en nuestros mercados. Es por ello que Prontometal realizó junto con Advance el proyecto mas grande de América latina en 2009. Y sigue realizando proyectos de gran porte a través de nuestras alianzas con Automha, Dexion e Interroll.

Algunas de las empresas que atendemos en Uruguay y América del Sur:

Description:
easyStorage is a member of the easy family of brands, offering the no-frills approach to storage. The storage industry in its current form is hugely inefficient and therefore much more expensive than it needs to be. If there was ever an industry that the ‘easy’ brand was made for, it is storage.

easyStorage offers a no-frills approach to pricing. Customers will pay a sensible margin for storage and then pay for all the extras as they need them. These would be packing materials, packing, insurance, as well as collection and delivery (with cheaper slots for when a delivery is already booked in the area). Each priced sensibly and on an ‘as needed’ basis.

Unlike traditional self-storage, we bring self-storage to the customer’s door by delivering flat-pack boxes in advance, and then when the items are ready for collection we collect them directly from customers. Unlike walk-in self storage, we take advantage of storing high in a warehouse, using cubic meters that are often otherwise wasted.

Customers manage their accounts online, where they can upload photos and descriptions of what is in each box. This inventory process makes it easy to select particular boxes for return, which can be booked for a preferred date.

Sir Stelios has partnered with entrepreneur Tim Slesinger, the Founder and CEO of easyStorage who has a proven track-record for building a substantial storage business covering 37 cities in 11 different countries.

Name: Logitri Oy
Description:
Logitri on vuonna 2009 perustettu 3PL- logistiikkapalveluja tuottava yritys ja yksi Suomen johtavista logistiikka-alan toimijoista. Palvelumme käsittävät varastointipalvelut, kuljetuspalvelut, sisälogistiikan palvelut sekä pakkaus- ja lisäarvopalvelut.

Olemme yrittäjävetoinen logistiikan asiantuntijatalo, jossa työskentelee noin 200 logistiikan ammattilaista. Meillä viihdytään pitkään ja arvomme vastuullisuus, asiakaskeskeisyys, jatkuva kehittäminen sekä rohkeus näkyvät päivittäisessä arjessa ja ohjaavat toimintaamme.

Modernin ja energiatehokkaan logistiikkakeskuksen ja kattavan sähkö- ja kaasuajoneuvovalikoiman myötä olemme myös vastuullisen logistiikan edelläkävijä. Tuusulassa sijaitsevan 70 000 neliön logistiikkakeskuksen katolla sijaitseva 1,0 Mwp aurinkovoimala tuottaa jo noin 15-20% koko keskuksen sähköntarpeesta. Investointi aurinkovoimaan ei ainoastaan vähennä Logitrin riippuvuutta perinteisistä energialähteistä, vaan myös alentaa huomattavasti logistiikkatoiminnan hiilijalanjälkeä. Olemme kompensoineet CO2-päästömme osallistumalla mm Suomen hiilinielujen kasvattamiseen ja toimintamme on hiilineutraalia, ensimmäisten yritysten joukossa Suomessa. Lisäksi koko logistiikkaketjumme on ollut vuodesta 2022 asti fossiilivapaa. Tämä saavutettiin siirtymällä hiilineutraaliin sähköön ja lisäämällä entisestään aurinkovoimaa sekä kaasu- ja sähköautojen määrää. Tänä päivänä koko kuljetuskalustomme kulkee 100% uusiutuvilla polttoaineilla.

Logitrin omistajat ja henkilökunta ovat pitkän kokemuksen omaavia alan ammattilaisia. Haluamme palvella asiakkaitamme kaikissa toimialaamme liittyvissä asioissa asiakaslähtöisesti ja joustavasti. Koulutamme henkilökuntaamme jatkuvasti, jotta voimme tarjota uusimmat innovaatiot ja parhaan asiantuntemuksen asiakkaidemme käyttöön

Description:
Global Warehouse Solutions is a leading provider of comprehensive warehousing and logistics services, offering a wide range of solutions to meet the needs of businesses of all sizes. Our mission is to provide the highest quality warehousing and logistics services to our clients, ensuring their products are stored, managed, and shipped efficiently and effectively. With over 540,000 square feet of warehousing space across multiple facilities in Florida and California, we have the capacity to accommodate your storage needs, no matter how big or small.

At Global Warehouse Solutions, we understand the importance of reliable warehousing and logistics services in today’s fast-paced business environment. That’s why we offer a full range of solutions, from short-term storage to long-term warehousing and everything in between. Our team of experienced professionals has the knowledge and expertise to handle all aspects of your warehousing and logistics needs, from receiving and inspecting incoming shipments to managing inventory, picking and packing, and shipping outbound orders.

In addition to our standard warehousing and logistics services, we also offer value-added services such as product assembly and packaging, barcoding and labeling, and quality control inspections. Our goal is to provide our clients with a complete end-to-end solution, so they can focus on their core business operations and leave the logistics to us.

Name: Frederic Smart Logistics
Description:
At Frederic Smart Logistics, we specialize in secure, efficient, and flexible warehousing and fulfilment solutions designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. 

From short-term to long-term storage, we ensure your goods are handled with care at every stage—from receipt to dispatch—so you can stay focused on growing your business while we seamlessly manage your logistics.

Our state-of-the-art facilities in Cambridge, Peterborough, and Warrington boast over 45,000 racked pallet locations, all accredited to the prestigious BRCGS AA standard. Positioned near major UK road networks, our sites offer fast, reliable access for seamless distribution and supply chain management.

We offer a full suite of scalable services, including racked and bulk storage, cross-docking, case picking, supermarket consolidation, co-packing, value-added services, quality control checks, and sampling. No matter your storage or distribution needs, our team delivers flexible, high-quality solutions tailored to optimize your operations.

In addition to our warehousing expertise, we are proud to be one of East Anglia's oldest and most respected grain and seed merchants. Established in 1906, we have over a century of experience trading cereals, pulses, and oilseeds, alongside developing specialist buyback contracts for a wide range of commodities. Our agricultural heritage is at the heart of our business, and we continue to uphold the same family values that have guided us since day one.

At Frederic Smart, we are committed to building long-term partnerships based on trust, service excellence, and integrity. Still family-owned and managed, we are proud to be a trusted logistics partner that delivers dependable solutions to help your business thrive.

Als neuer Akteur auf dem deutschen Self-Storage-Markt bietet Space Plus eine einzigartige, unübertreffliche Kombination von kundenorientierten Dienstleistungen rund um den individuellen Bedarf an zusätzlichem Raum mit Lagergrößen von 1 – 20 m² für private und geschäftliche Nutzer. Unser Ziel ist es, bis Ende 2023 insgesamt 25+ Standorte in ganz Deutschland zu eröffnen.
Bei Space Plus kombinieren wir in unseren größeren Filialen unser umfassendes Angebot an hochwertigen Self-Storage-Flächen für die private und gewerbliche Nutzung mit innovativen Arbeitsbereichen in unseren Coworking- und Flex-Office-Segmenten. So entsteht unter Einsatz neuester Technologien die modernste Form innovativer Raumlösungen, die unsere Kunden bestmöglich im Hinblick auf ihre individuellen Raumanforderungen unterstützt.

Name: Ken Thomas - Warehousing & Transport
Description:
Ken Thomas is a privately-owned warehousing and transport company founded in 1948 by Ken Thomas, the father of John who is now the Managing Director. Ken started with just two lorries which mainly consisted of transporting produce from local farms and packhouses for onward delivery to the London and Birmingham markets.
In the 1960s the first warehouse was built and used for storage of canned goods for some of the local food companies. John Thomas took over running the company in the early 80s and has continued to head up the company since. The early 80s saw significant growth in transport services for the company and by this point Ken Thomas were offering nationwide distribution.
Ken Thomas continued their expansion over the mid to late 80s and a large number of quality insulated warehouses were built to keep up with the demand put on the company by its customers.
Since this time growth has steadily continued and Ken Thomas are currently embarking on another large expansion by building additional warehousing space to enable them to cope with their growing customer base.
We have over 300,000 sq. feet of warehousing and we are well equipped to handle stock of any size.
In addition to warehousing, Nationwide distribution facilities are available using our own vehicles and we also have close working relationships with major local distribution companies.

Whether it be for the transportation or warehousing of our customer’s goods, the quality of service is paramount at Ken Thomas. Quality has been important ever since the company was founded by Mr Ken Thomas, and as an equally hands on MD, it is equally important to John. At Ken Thomas, we employ people who have the determination to provide the very best service. Commitment to our customers starts at the very top.
We are dedicated to put our customers at the forefront of everything we do and we’re confident in our ability to deliver a flexible and scalable warehousing & transport solution to your business.

• Recepción de pedidos por interfase.
• Administración de FIFO – FEFO – LIFO.
• Trazabilidad de los productos
• Conteo cíclico
• Utilización de Código de Barras
• Utilización de Radio Frecuencia (RFID)
• Capacidad de interfaz con ERP o Sistema del Cliente
• Visibilidad de información vía Web
• VoicePicking
• Gestión de caducidad de productos

TRANSPORTE Y DISTRIBUCIÓN
Nuestros camiones están equipados con la tecnología adecuada para recorrer largas distancias en el tiempo estipulado y mantener la temperatura especificada para cada producto que transporta.

Todas las unidades tienen servicio satelital, rastreo de posicionamiento y control de temperaturas.

Diseñamos un sistema de distribución acorde a las necesidades de cada cliente, teniendo en cuenta los plazos y fiabilidad de entregas a un costo competitivo.

Name: Roche Fruit
Description:
Established in 1915, Roche Fruit is a grower-owned apple packing facility and has been family owned for four generations. The Roche family harvests and packs 1,500 of its own acres and partners with other growers to supply fresh apples all over the world.
 
Roche Fruit is committed to providing the highest quality fruit, free from contamination, ensuring complete customer satisfaction throughout the process. We use the most advanced equipment technologies and thoroughly trained employees to maintain the highest safety and sanitation standards. Our state-of-the-art facility uses optical sorting, computerized refrigeration control, and a committed team of employees to produce a safe, quality product our customers can depend on.
 
We believe our success depends on the trust and confidence we develop with our customers. We expect that relationship to grow through our constant attention to food quality and safety.

Name: Total Interiors Direct Limited
Description:
The Total Solution - Quality From Conception to Completion.

With over 28 years of experience behind us and a highly skilled team, we are dedicated to providing the total solution to new and existing customers of all sizes. From industrial and warehouse storage solutions to commercial office fit-outs and refurbishments, the Total team will design, implement and manage bespoke solutions that will meet your exact requirements.

Whether you are looking to increase storage capacity, improve productivity or maximise efficiency, our aim is simple, we will design and install a solution that will become the backbone of your business. We offer Pallet Racking, Mezzanine Floors and Industrial Shelving as well as Office, Commercial and Educational Interiors & Refurbishments.

To complement our storage and interior services, we also provide additional solutions including Alarm Systems, Exterior Fencing, Health & Safety Signage, Crash Barriers and Line Markings to name a few. By choosing Total, you will have everything you need, all under one roof.

Utilising your storage space to its maximum potential is vastly important for your business, the benefits are massive, meaning you can add significant storage volume to your storage area at a fraction of the cost of moving premises.

We offer professional and friendly advice on the design of all mezzanine floors, so they comply with the latest building, safety and fire regulations.

For more information on our products or services visit www.totalinteriorsdirect.co.uk.

Notre objectif est d’offrir à nos clients une qualité de service qui s’inscrit dans une amélioration continue.

Name: Distribution 2000 Inc.
Description:
At Distribution 2000, we excel in handling specialty foods and fast moving consumer packaged goods. 

Our sophisticated warehouse facilities serve a group of high profile brands in the specialty food market, including a number of well known organic, gourmet and artisan foods and consumer products. These high value brands use Distribution 2000 because our capabilities and services exactly fit their warehousing and distribution needs.

Because of our sharp focus on this niche market, we are able to offer our specialty food customers significant benefits. Our expertise in handling their products and our thorough understanding of their market, their distribution chain, their retailers and their end consumers means they enjoy considerable operational efficiencies working with Distribution 2000. We offer our customers multi channel distribution arrangements, including specialty food retailers, main stream retailers and alternative channel retailers, and we work with a wide network of specialty distributors throughout the country. 


Distribution 2000 make it our mission to ensure that fine foods are handled, stored and shipped with the care and attention they deserve. We specialize in organic food and product handling. We run an FDA registered food grade warehouse that is USDA National Organic Program (NOP) compliance audited by Oregon Tilth Certified Organic (OTCO). We are also a member of the Organic Trade Association.

Name: Drac Distribution Limited
Description: With door-to-door control of your supply chain fulfilled through our purpose-built distribution centre, DRAC Distribution keeps you in control at every stage. Our experience as part of the DRAC Global logistics group gives us unique access to distribution solutions that help you grow your business in a cost-effective way.

Name: Asgro
Description:
ASGRO NEDERLAND

Asgro is een full-service organisatie ten behoeve van de asbestsaneringsbranche! Saneren doen wij niet zelf, maar hebben wel alles in huis voor u, om te kunnen saneren. We zijn in 2000 gestart en zijn inmiddels de grootste leverancier van asbestverpakkingsmaterialen.

Asgro Nederland heeft onder andere een vestiging in Vianen. Hier kunt u naast onze producten terecht voor verhuur, onderhoud en keuringen. Daar worden ook op maat gemaakte installaties gefabriceerd en is onze showroom die u een goed overzicht geeft van de maatwerk mogelijkheden van Asgro.

Naast Nederland, zijn wij ook actief in België en Frankrijk.
Kwaliteitsproducten in combinatie met ervaren en gemotiveerde medewerkers maken van Asgro een uitstekende Internationale samenwerkingspartner met zeer tevreden klanten in zowel binnen- als buitenland.

ASGRO FRANCE

Asgro est une société spécialisée dans la fourniture (matériels et consommables), la location ainsi que la maintenance de produits de désamiantage.

Filiale du groupe Vercom International, Asgro est un acteur majeur de cette activité en Europe. Très présent aux Pays Bas avec son nouveau Siège Social à VIANEN, nous sommes également très actif en Belgique et en France.

Nous avons développé une large gamme de produits labélisés HIGHTEC issue de notre expérience et le retour d’expérience des nombreux utilisateurs.

Notre présence en France depuis 2014 est en forte progression, nos atouts sont très appréciés des clients et Asgro a apporté une nouvelle façon de servir ses clients pour leurs offrir un meilleurs service au meilleurs prix.

Courant 2019, Asgro s’intaillera en France afin d’améliorer encore notre offre de services. Toute l’équipe Asgro est mobilisée pour tous les nouveaux projets futurs dans l’objectif de toujours apporter les solutions optimums pour les clients.

Name: Hi-Cube Storage Products
Description:
Founded in 1980, Hi-Cube Storage Products is the leading material handling equipment supplier in Delta, BC and surrounding areas. We offer various innovative storage products, including pallet racking, E-Z Rect shelves, cantilever racking, high-security lockers and vertical lift modules.

Our mission is to help customers maximize their storage value by providing cutting-edge solutions that fit their budgets. In addition to our storage products, we provide the following services, engineering, installation and disassembly, warehouse layout design, pallet rack inspection, and permit coordination, making us a one-stop source for all your warehouse racking and storage solution needs.

Name: Self Storage India
Description:
Access to adequate space, at home or office, is always an issue. Unused items tend to lie around and kill productivity. They also take up valuable space. Self Storage India was created with the idea of putting an end to all this.

Self Storage India was born out of the vision to bring the concept of self-storage to India. We realized that with the transformations that were taking place in the country, it was time that a push was given to self-storage.

Self Storage India offers flexibility and convenience when you pick a storage option. Your items stay secure, and you can access them whenever you like. There are restrictions on who can get access to your storage space so that you can stay worry-free.

We have a dedicated staff at every warehouse who are there to guide and assist you. Right from the time you call or visit us for an inquiry, our experienced executives will be there with you till the time you rent a room. Leasing a storage unit is as easy as one-two-three.

As a company, we take pride in knowing our business and our customers. We are well aware of the needs of Indian households and businesses. We know precisely how Indians think about keeping items, what makes them hoard things, and what do people look for when renting a storage space. This makes us suitably positioned to cater to the needs of our customers, whomever they may be.

If you are a business, you may have unused boxes taking up valuable real estate. Instead, you could rent with Self Storage India and clear out your office for better use.

As an individual, your home may need restructuring for a variety of reasons. At such times, we can come to your help. Take up a renting space with us and experience the thrill of a new and more spacious lifestyle.

For further details, feel free to check out https://selfstorageindia.com/company-profile-self-storage-india/

Name: Warehouse Now
Description:
Warehouse Now is a warehousing & supply chain Company which caters to all kinds of warehousing needs of its customers. 

WH Now has warehouses available to be used for storage by its clients for flexible periods of time which can be from 10 days to 9 years. 

It has in its inventory 1000 plus warehouses in more than 100 cities of varying sizes from 100 sft to 2 Lac sft. 

WH Now offers to its clients consistency and standardisation of services across all its warehouses. 

WH Now takes care of end to end Operations and also provide logistics solutions as per client’s requirement.

Name: TVS Industrial & Logistics Parks (TVS ILP)
Description:

Founded in 2005, with a reputation for innovation and superior service, we continue to set industry standards and drive advancements in warehousing and logistics.

KEY STRENGTHS

- Abundant experience in land acquisition
- Strong financial & technical background of promoters & team
- Excellent project management & execution skills
- Reliability associated with the TVS Brand
- Customer centric approach
- Real time support on all projects

TVS ILP - POWERED BY VALUES, DRIVEN BY AMBITION

Name: GoodStorage
Description:
A maior empresa de armazenamento do Brasil. Somos especialistas em espaços inteligentes que proporcionam mais qualidade de vida para pessoas e mais eficiência para negócios. 
Com unidades localizadas nos bairros mais estratégicos, estamos sempre a poucos metros de onde há grande demanda por áreas, tanto de auto armazenamento pessoal, quanto para estoques e centros de distribuição.
Oferecemos soluções de 1m² a 10.000m², sempre sob medida para a necessidade de cada um. Gerenciamos as melhores formas de utilização de espaços para garantir que a cidade possa se desenvolver de forma dinâmica e sustentável, otimizando a infraestrutura existente e reduzindo deslocamentos entre pessoas e pertences, entre produtos e o destino final. 
Vamos consolidar São Paulo como referência em Smart City, um local mais integrado, próspero e condizente com os desafios do século 21.
A GoodStorage foi idealizada e fundada em 2013 pelo atual CEO Thiago Cordeiro, com investimento da Evergreen Investment Advisors, gestora de private equity.

Name: BITO-Lagertechnik Bittmann GmbH
Description:
BITO is a medium-sized company with about 890 employees, specialising in the areas of warehouse equipment and picking systems.
Disclaimer: http://bit.ly/BITO-Impressum

Founded nearly 170 years ago, today we rank among Europe's top providers in the storage technology industry. The secret to our success: Tradition, reliability and the continual development of new product ideas. But success alone is not our goal – we take our social responsibility to our employees and their relevant regions seriously, too.

At our locations in Meisenheim and Lauterecken in South West Germany, we have over 140,000 m² of production facilities devoted to customer-oriented, ground-breaking, top-quality products. BITO is one of the few end-to-end suppliers of warehouse systems in the intralogistics industry. We focus on direct business – fast processing of orders through catalogue, shop or sales centre. Our other focus is on the planning, project management and implementation of complex and demanding warehouse concepts.

Name: Agility Logistics Parks
Description:
Agility Logistics Parks is one of the largest private owners and developers of warehousing and light industrial parks in the Middle East, Africa and South Asia. It funds, builds and manages international-standard facilities that help companies operate and expand in the world’s fastest-growing markets. Agility Logistics Parks offer unmatched infrastructure and ready access to transportation networks in strategic locations, with ready access to markets and with services that include 24/7 security, power, connectivity and facilities management. ALP’s 1,000+ customers are multi-nationals, regional and local champions, and small and medium-sized companies.

Agility Logistics Parks has 40 years of design, contracting, engineering, project management and facilities maintenance experience. It engineers world-class structures and complexes with sustainable design features that lower costs and improve efficiency.

ALP has $1.5 billion of real estate assets, 10 million sqm of land and more than 3 million sqm of logistics facilities.

ALP is part of the Agility group, a world-leading provider of logistics solutions with 26,000 employees, 500+ offices and revenue of more than US$5.3 billion.

Name: Zona Franca Barranquilla
Description:
Zona Franca de Barranquilla, Pionera en Colombia, cuenta con una extensión de 1.000.000 M² ubicados en el corazón portuario de la ciudad de Barranquilla, con una Puerta de Interconexión con la Sociedad Portuaria Regional de Barranquilla se convierte en la única Zona Franca de Colombia con ingreso directo de ¨Puerto – Zona¨ permitiendo con esto el acceso ágil y seguro de la carga.

Con su tradicional perfil industrial de bienes y servicios ,comercial, logístico y portuario es uno de los polos de desarrollo industrial de la región Caribe colombiana.

Historia

Zona Franca de Barranquilla, pionera en este sector; se crea en 1958 gracias a la ley 105 del año en mención; en el año 1991 se inicia el proceso de privatización; dos años mas tarde (1993), tres empresas licitan en busca de la adjudicación del contrato, en 1994 se expide la resolución 0978 otorgando la calidad de usuario operador a Sodezona S.A, quien cambia su razón social a Zona Franca de Barranquilla S.A (ZFBQ), este ultimo firma su contrato inicial de arrendamiento en el año 1994 con término al año 2009, y amplia este en el año 2006 hasta el año 2024.

Name: Aeropuertos Argentina Cargas
Description:
Somos la unidad de negocio de la unidad de negocio de Aeropuertos Argentina especializada en almacenamiento y logística integral para el comercio exterior. Administramos las terminales de carga de los principales aeropuertos internacionales del país, brindando soluciones a agentes de importación y exportación, operadores de carga y compañías aéreas.

Nuestra sede central está en el Aeropuerto Internacional de Ezeiza, y sucursales en Córdoba, Mendoza, Mar del Plata, Aeroparque Jorge Newbery y Tucumán.

Eficiencia, seguridad y tecnología en cada operación.

Name: Dexion - Gonvarri Material Handling
Description:
Dexion – Gonvarri Material Handlingis a leading European provider of industrial storage and automation solutions. With 70+ years of experience and strong brands like Dexion, Constructor, Kasten, and Kredit, we deliver tailored racking systems and steel structures across Europe. 

We operate in two divisions: 

Industrial: Manual and semi-automated storage systems for logistics, retail, and manufacturing. 

Automation: Engineering and steel construction for system integrators in automated warehouse projects. 

With 1,200+ employees, 20+ sites, and 6 production facilities, we offer end-to-end solutions—from design to installation. Our focus: customer proximity, engineering excellence, and sustainable innovation. 

We are committed to: 

Reducing CO₂ emissions by 50% by 2030 

100% recycling of production waste 

A zero-accident safety strategy 

As an employer, we foster diversity, collaboration, and continuous development in a future-driven industry. 

Let’s shape the future of intralogistics together

Name: Pragati

We are committed to developing high-quality industrial and warehousing assets in India’s key micro markets, shaping the landscape through our expertise and development capabilities.

Name: Bozzuto's Inc
Description:
Bozzuto's Inc. is a leading total service wholesale distributor of food and household products to retailers in New England, New York, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania. Established in 1945, the company is headed by Chairman, President, and CEO Michael A. Bozzuto. Based in Cheshire, Connecticut.

Among its many professional awards, Bozzuto's has won the IGA International President's Cup seven times. This prestigious award is the highest honor that an international IGA organization can receive and identifies Bozzuto's as a leader among IGA distributors.

Name: Cisco-Eagle
Description:
We help companies take control of their operations through smart, scalable material handling systems. From conveyors and automation to storage and safety, we design and implement solutions that solve real-world challenges like reducing downtime, increasing throughput, improving safety, and optimizing labor.

Our customers span warehousing, distribution, manufacturing, and commercial environments. They count on us for more than equipment…they trust our people to deliver deep experience, honest guidance, and exceptional service.

As a 100% employee-owned company, every team member has a stake in your success. That accountability shows up in every design, every installation, and every service call.

We’re a long-term partner committed to helping you streamline today’s operations while planning for tomorrow’s growth.

With locations in Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, Tulsa, Oklahoma City, Austin, Little Rock, Florida, Charlotte, Michigan, Missouri and Tennessee, we serve customers nationwide and in over 70 countries.

Name: Damon Technology
Description:
Damon is a leading high-tech enterprise specializing in smart logistics systems and intralogistics equipment manufacturing. Since 1997, we have been deeply focused on intelligent manufacturing and industrial automation, building over 20 years of expertise in system integration and large-scale project implementation.

We provide a one-stop solution for logistics automation, covering:
Core conveying components such as rollers and motors；
Key equipment including conveying systems, sorting systems, storage systems, handling systems, and logistics automation software；
Smart warehousing solutions from conveying & sorting systems to four-way shuttle dense storage and intelligent control & dispatch platforms。

With strong R&D and manufacturing capabilities, Damon has delivered successful projects for global leaders such as Amazon, Shein, Shopee, Temu, Anta, Coupang, and MercadoLibre. Our solutions serve industries including e-commerce fulfillment, express parcel hubs, retail & omnichannel logistics, apparel, pharmaceuticals, and in-plant logistics for manufacturing.

Today, Damon’s intelligent solutions are deployed in more than 30 countries across South America, Australia, Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, Europe, and North America — helping customers transform warehouses into smart factories and achieve supply chain automation.

Our vision: To become a global leader in smart logistics equipment and system solutions, enabling businesses worldwide to upgrade with reliable Chinese manufacturing and services.

Name: PROCER
Description:
Desde 2011, nós da Procer traduzimos nosso domínio tecnológico em prol de um único propósito: preservar os lucros no pós-colheita. Quando o grão sai da colheitadeira, todos os resultados passam a depender da gestão de desperdício. É por isso que cercamos o grão com o máximo cuidado. Usamos a mais avançada combinação de hardware e software, e de forma inteligente conservamos cada grão colhido. 

É simples: no agro, você ganha onde não perde, e cada 1% preservado torna você 1% mais competitivo. E tornar você mais competitivo é nosso negócio. 

AGROINTELIGÊNCIA DE PÓS-COLHEITA.

Name: Vault Logistics
Description: Vault is a leading 3PL provider, offering agile and reliable warehousing and transportation solutions for businesses. We are dedicated to building long-term partnerships with our clients and strive to exceed their expectations with our comprehensive range of services. From storage and fulfillment to trucking and logistics, we have the expertise and resources to handle all of your supply chain needs. Contact us today to learn how we can be your trusted partner in the logistics industry

Name: The New Warehouse
Description: The New Warehouse is a media site bringing you insights and ideas from the worlds of logistics, distribution and transportation. We are the place where industry experts can learn from other industry experts and also have their own insights and ideas heard.

Name: SafeStorage
Description:
SafeStorage is India’s No. 1 and most trusted self-storage brand, helping thousands of individuals and businesses store household goods, office items, documents, and inventory securely and affordably.

Founded in 2015, we provide ISO 9001:2015 certified warehousing and logistics solutions across Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Kolkata, and Coimbatore.

 Whether you’re shifting homes, renovating, running out of space, or a business needing inventory storage, we offer secure, climate-controlled, and CCTV-monitored storage with doorstep pickup and return.


 Key Highlights (2025)

 ₹38 Crore annual revenue
 30+ warehouses across India
 3 million+ sq. ft. storage area
 1,00,000+ customers served
 42+ lakh items stored safely
 20+ lakh boxes handled
 98.7% on-time pickup & delivery
 96% customer retention rate
 ISO-certified safety & quality protocols
 90 sec average customer support response time
 Ranked #1 in branded storage search (90%)
 80% share in non-branded storage searches
 India’s #1 storage units in all operational cities: Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata, and Coimbatore.

 Services Offered

 Personal Household Storage
 Office & Business Storage
 Document & File Storage
 Furniture Storage
 Luggage Storage
 Vehicle & Bike Storage
 Short-Term Box Storage
 Packers & Movers Support
 B2B Storage Solutions

 Cities We Serve

 Bengaluru |  Hyderabad |  Chennai |  Pune |  Mumbai |  Delhi
 Kolkata |  Coimbatore


 Ramesh Madisetty – CEO & Co-Founder

A visionary entrepreneur leading the transformation of India's self-storage industry, Ramesh Madisetty has built SafeStorage into the No.1 storage unit brand across all major cities—Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata, and Coimbatore.

His mission: to solve India's growing urban space problem by creating a trusted, tech-driven storage ecosystem that’s accessible, affordable, and secure.

Name: Goldfields Logistics
Description: Our business is about more than transport, warehousing, logistics and distribution...it's about adding value, reducing costs, understanding customer's businesses and meeting their individual supply chain requirements.

Name: Allen Distribution
Description:
Allen is a privately owned-and-operated logistics company that believes long-term partner relationships are built on performance and trust.

Since 1988, our operations have been strategically based in Carlisle, Pennsylvania, in the heart of the Northeast’s interstate network.

Combined with our locations nationwide, we operate more than 14 million square feet of warehouse space in multi-site distribution centers to store and distribute products throughout the United States through a combination of services, including:

-Supply Chain Design
-Logistics Management
-Distribution
-Fulfillment
-Transportation
-Freight Consolidation
-Direct-Rail Serviced Warehouses
-Custom Packaging
-Temperature-Controlled Warehousing and Transportation

Name: Bodegas San Francisco Chile
Description:
Somos la empresa de bodegaje de mayor trayectoria y tamaño de Sudamerica. Desde 1985 a la fecha, hemos alcanzado una infraestructura de más de 2.000.000 m2 de bodegas distribuidas en 14 centros, de los cuales 7 están en Santiago, 4 en regiones (Antofagasta, Chillán, Temuco y Pto. Montt) y 3 en Lima, Perú.

El servicio que brindamos consiste en el arriendo de módulos independientes de bodegas, desde 25 m2 (mini bodegas) hasta completos Centros de Distribución sin límites de espacio.

Cada Centro Logístico funciona como un “Condominio de Bodegas” que cuenta con una administración, gran infraestructura y una amplia gama de servicios asociados y complementarios a la actividad de bodegaje.

Name: Contlog Logística e Comércio Exterior
Description:
A Contlog está localizada em Navegantes/SC, no início da Rodovia BR-470, que é a principal rota que liga o estado no sentido Leste - Oeste.

Distantancias:

a 2km do Terminal Portuário de Navegantes - Portonave,

a 12 Km do Porto de Itajaí,

a 130Km do Porto de Itapoá,

a 180Km do Porto de Imbituba.

Somos um grupo logístico com mais de 12 anos no mercado e oferecemos serviços como armazenagem, transporte e de agenciamento de carga internacional com eficiência e dedicação. Possuímos estrutura própria com armazéns em locais estratégicos pelo Brasil e equipes qualificadas para manuseio de diversos tipos de mercadorias, oferecendo serviços de Picking/Packing, Etiquetagem e Cross Docking.

Podemos ser seu parceiro em todas as etapas da sua operação, desde o embarque ao armazenamento, da separação da mercadoria ao transporte nacional e internacional.

Name: Surigao del Norte State University
Description: Surigao State College of Technology is a warehousing company based out of Surigao del Norte, Philippines.

Name: Grupo Porto Seco Centro-Oeste
Description:
O Porto Seco Centro-Oeste S/A é um terminal alfandegado de uso público, destinado à armazenagem e à movimentação de mercadorias importadas, ou destinadas à exportação, sendo utilizado como facilitador das Operações de Comércio Exterior. 

Foi o primeiro Porto Seco da região centro-oeste, criado por meio de concorrência pública, em que empresários goianos formaram um consórcio vencedor da licitação, obtendo assim, a licença para a prestação dos serviços aduaneiros.

Da permissão à implantação foram dois anos, tendo em vista as adequações exigidas pela Receita Federal, constantes do Edital de Licitação. Alfandegada em setembro de 1999, a instituição incorporou na região uma nova e importante alternativa logística, desempenhando papel fundamental no desenvolvimento do Estado, aproximando-o do mercado globalizado. 

Possuidor de uma ampla e moderna infra-estrutura e pessoal altamente especializado, o Porto Seco Centro Oeste oferece aos seus clientes, a solução ideal em Estação Aduaneira, dinamizando as operações de importação e exportação com a conseqüente redução de custos e otimização de resultados. Em parceria com a Log-In, Logística Intermodal S/A (Companhia Vale do Rio Doce), presta serviços de logística integrada com os mais modernos padrões internacionais de qualidade, segurança e agilidade.

Inspections: We perform both damage control and quality inspections to ensure that your products are in top condition and meet Amazon’s standards.
Prep & Pack: We carefully follow Amazon’s regulations, prepping and packing your items to ensure smooth processing at Amazon’s fulfillment centers.

Vi är glada över att idag vara ett av landets ledande företag inom transportemballage, med kunder i de flesta branscher. Vi tycker om långa samarbeten i alla våra relationer; såväl kunder och leverantörer som medarbetare tenderar att stanna länge hos oss. Det gillar vi!

Vi som jobbar på Nöjd AB har ett gemensamt drag; vi drivs av kundfokus och har ett högt personligt engagemang i vårt jobb. Flera har jobbat på Nöjd AB så gott som sedan starten, medan andra har tillkommit på senare år och tagit med sig sina erfarenheter från andra områden och branscher.

Nöjd AB är ett familjeföretag, grundat 1982, och drivs sedan 2005 av mig, Thomas Nöjd. Tillsammans med företagets sexton medarbetare vill jag fortsätta att utveckla Nöjd AB till att bli det stora och det mindre företagets självklara val av emballageleverantör!

Thomas Nöjd

Name: National e-Repository Limited (NeRL)
Description:
National E-Repository Limited (NERL) - an NCDEX Group Company, is a national level market infrastructure institution that records and stores Warehouse Receipts in an electronic form (e-NWRs) in the Indian commodities market, under the aegis of Warehouse Development and Regulatory Authority (WDRA), Government of India. 
The mission of WDRA is to regulate and ensure implementation of the provisions of the Warehousing (Development and Regulation) Act, 2007 for the development and regulation of warehouses, maintain negotiability of the warehouse receipts and promote orderly growth of the warehousing business in the country for the benefit of farmers and Financial Institutions (FIs) through transparency and trust.

NCDEX group has in depth experience in digitalizing warehouse receipts and commodity inventory management through its ingeniously built systems – Comtrack and Comlive, which have brought transparency and efficiency to warehousing. NERL will leverage the capabilities of NCDEX group and with its unique combination of repository, cutting edge technologies, warehouses and mandis, will offer a game changing experience to all types of market participants. NERL will be responsible for storage, security, authenticity and transfer of all electronic negotiable warehouse receipts (eNWR), within a regulated framework, between users of the repository such as warehouse service providers, banks, financial institutions, farmers, traders and value-chain participants.

NERL will be a pioneer in providing legal and regulatory environment for inventory financing and warehouse receipt lending to encourage the use of these financing mechanisms; and will act as catalyst to boost warehouse based commodity business transactions. Its systems will introduce lot visibility, traceability and off-market transfers to commodity trading outside the Exchange ecosystem. It will accommodate all types of warehouse service providers, including private and state-owned, small and medium.

We operate through our associates in Saudi Arabia, Oman, Kuwait, Nepal, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Kenya, Myanmar, Thailand & Iran. Apart from this, we’ve expanded our end-to-end solutions services outside India, to South-East Asia, Middle East, and Far-East region of the globe.

We proudly operate India’s largest last-mile delivery network, which has made DTDC the preferred choice for strategic e-commerce trading partnerships, all across the Globe.

DTDC’s ability to assimilate worldwide parcel services with the best technological platforms means the highest level of success. Name: The Document Warehouse Namibia
Description:
The Document Warehouse, Namibia’s premier archiving and onsite/offsite document storage Specialist Company now offers you the ultimate solution in data management. In the modern-day information age fast, reliable and effective data management is everything. Time wasted looking for documents is money wasted and opportunity lost.

We are a proud partner and reseller of the Enterprise Content Management system, M-Files and therefore we can provide a work class service to our clients in both paper and electronic services.

To remain competitive you need to focus on core business activities and let us do what we are good at for you: Records Management.

The Document Warehouse was launched on the 8th of March 2006 and opened its doors on the 1st of April 2006 in Windhoek, the 1st of September 2010 in Walvis Bay and the 3rd of January 2012 in Ongwediva.

Our services includes:
  
 • Archival and long term storage of documents and drawings. We store all business documents - both non-current documents (obliged by law to be kept but rarely used) and current documents (documents in regular use) for companies that have outsourced their filing departments .
• Long and short term storage of digital data in a secure environment, involving daily or weekly pick-up of digital data on tapes, DVD’s, etc.
• Consultancy service related to filing systems, file plans, archival policies, document storage solutions, etc.
• Training in all aspects of paper and electronic filing systems.
• Bulk scanning and indexing of hard copy documents
• Design and implementation of Document Management Systems including software solutions for archived material.
• Secure destruction of documents and data
• Filing solutions - where we manage your filing system for you
• Selling and servicing of Fujitsu, Canon, Kodak, Panasonic scanners and Kofax software.

Name: SILVER LINING Storage Solutions
Description:
SILVER LINING Storage Solutions is part of USD 2 Bn Amara Raja Group and specializes in offering value-driven, cost-effective and tailored storage solutions for various industry verticals. Its range is developed ground up and betters any existing racking in terms of load performance, durability and technology. 

Excellence in Industrial and warehouse storage is achieved through, 

> Superior Technology 
   One of the first Indian companies to comply with the latest Euro code EN 15512.

> Customized Solutions 
   Direct sales team and project associates at SILVER LINING guide customers through the consultative sales
 process to arrive at the best storage solution for their operational need and budget, thereby 
   creating substantial value to the endeavor. 

> Engineering Expertise
   Our Engineering specialists factor-in material storage, handling, operation demands with appropriate   
   utilization of height, scalability and adaptability into the layout design. Our optimized layout and 
   intelligent solution enables a seamless flow of warehousing operations, culminating into savings 
   on project costs and resources for customers.

> State-of-the-art Manufacturing 
   Our fully-equipped plant has the most modern, custom built imported roll forming machinery and 
   powder coating lines. All products are manufactured in high strength steel with a minimum yield 
   strength of 350 MPa.

> Deep experience in Project management
   Our project management team is highly experienced in delivering projects successfully in multiple 
   industrial sectors, both large and small. Our unique, customized approach and expertise in project  
   management ensures that projects are delivered on time within cost, every time.

SILVER LINING Storage works closely with leaders in various industries such as 3PL, Automotive, FMCG, Retail, Pharma, Manufacturing, Records Management and more to help design and execute simplified, dynamic and optimized material storage.

Contamos con un equipo de más de 100 profesionales al servicio de las Compañías en Paraguay, cubriendo todo el ciclo de vida de la información y para todas las formas de documentos.
Mantenemos nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en el servicio, para que nuestros Clientes reciban el máximo beneficio, reduciendo costos y los riesgos asociados con su administración.

Name: Save Eco Organic

All the products are 99.9% pure and 100% organic in nature. The company deals with the clients who believe in sustainable development and nature preservation, these two being the cause advocated by the company's founder. The company also have experts who try their best to help out farmers by providing them the information they need and solving out their queries. The company is aggressively propagating the techniques of organic farming in the several regions of India and is evolving as a reliable brand of organic products. At the heart of Save Eco Organic Private Limited is our commitment to be a living embodiment of love and consciousness in action. All of our products support health and true wellness. Our main motto is to support as much farmers as possible in the cultivation of quality crop yields.

Name: Logística Argentina
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada al alquiler temporario de depósitos exclusivos y/o multiespacios a comercios, empresas y particulares. Nuestras instalaciones están ubicadas en puntos estratégicos y accesibles, contando con vigilancia permanente, control de ingresos y egresos y  cámaras de seguridad.  
Ofrecemos espacios de 20 a 2000 metros, destinados al arrendamiento temporario de naves y plantas industriales, depósito de mercadería en tránsito o alquileres de oficinas. Buscamos adaptarnos siempre a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.   
Los predios se ubican en el Partido de San Martín (a pocas cuadras de Avenida General Paz), en el Partido de Avellaneda y en Olivos. 
Poseemos una amplia playa de maniobras cubierta, destinada a la carga y descarga de camiones y camionetas y brindamos la posibilidad de acceder por calles internas dentro de la nave. 
Contamos también con otros servicios tales como: recepción, control y almacenamiento con/sin la presencia del cliente, control de stock, alquiler de auto elevadores para diferentes cargas, alquiler de pallets, personal para carga y descarga, servicio de picking y packing, servicio de movimientos internos, estampillado de productos, desconsolidado de contenedores, servicio de palletizado, control de inventario y servicio de portería.

Name: Nowoczesny Magazyn
Description:

Koszty gospodarki magazynowej można zmniejszyć nawet o 20-30 procent, nie tracąc przy tym na jakości obsługi, szybkości dystrybucji towarów lub na bezpieczeństwie składowanych produktów. Trzeba tylko wiedzieć, jakie w tym celu zastosować metody zarządzania magazynem (także tym niewielkim), jaki sprzęt dobrać i co istotne – mieć czas na to, aby takich rozwiązań poszukać.

„Nowoczesny magazyn” to profesjonalne czasopismo o magazynowaniu i systemach składowania, wspierający specjalistów branży od 1999 roku. Nasi eksperci to profesjonaliści, których wiedza i doświadczenie od lat pomaga firmom w poszukiwaniu nowych, najlepszych rozwiązań. Szczegółowo poruszamy takie zagadnienia jak wyposażenie magazynu, bezpieczeństwo składowania produktów, nowoczesne technologie oraz zarządzanie magazynem. Realizowany w ramach czasopisma portal www.nm.pl to pierwszy na polskim rynku portal dla branży magazynowej.

Wydawcą „Nowoczesnego Magazynu” jest FORUM MEDIA POLSKA Sp. z o.o. - wiodący wydawca czasopism specjalistycznych w Polsce, spółka-córka międzynarodowego holdingu Forum Media Group.

Description:

Omdat wij een korte implementatietijd hanteren, kun je al binnen enkele weken met Solid WMS aan de slag.

Jij richt je op je bedrijf, wij richten ons op de technologische ontwikkeling van Solid WMS waardoor je altijd met een up-to-date systeem werkt. Dit alles is mogelijk voor een lage, vaste prijs per maand.

Als extra service bieden wij de mogelijkheid om koppelingen te maken vanuit Solid WMS naar jouw systemen. Zo voldoet Solid WMS aan jouw integratie wensen en kun je de transportplanner of het facturatieprogramma waar je mee werkt gewoon blijven gebruiken. 

De applicatie leent zich perfect voor Third Party Logistic, transport- en opslagbedrijven, kleine magazijnhouders en grote namen op het logistieke speelveld.

Solid WMS onderscheidt zich doordat het simpel in gebruik is, lage instapkosten heeft en een snelle te implementere is.

Name: Porto Romano Free Port Zone
Description:
Porto Romano Free Port Zone

Porto Romano Free Port Zone is located in Durrës, Albania in a specific area, which is not separated from the rest of the territory, into which all kinds of goods are shipped. As long as they remain under special terms — there is no storage time limit — products are not subject to import duties, internal taxes (VAT or excise tax duties) or commercial policy measures.

Porto Romano Free Port Zone is at the service of companies with international trade relations who wish to leverage competitive tax advantages.

Concessionaire MBM Port (MBM Port) is a joint company established in 2015 assigned to administrate Porto Romano Free Port Zone in accordance with the Decree no. 493 of Council of Ministers dated 11.07.2019 “On the definition of a free zone of a part of the customs territory of the Republic of Albania in Porto-Romano”.

The tax-free zone covers an area of 1,034,552 m2 and a port is included in the free zone. A private security company ensures safety 24 hours a day, every day of the year.

Free Port Zone is highly attractive area thanks to its geographic position in the Dalmatian coast, greatest port capacity for loading/unloading and its proximity to the neighbor countries. It is also a voting member of the World Free Zones Organization.

Our specialties include standard "teardrop" style pallet rack, cantilever racking, pushback racking, drive-in and drive-through racking and pallet flow racking. In addition to our new pallet rack system, we have a large inventory of used pallet rack for sale. 

3. Mezzanines
Need to increase space without costly new construction? Pre-engineered steel mezzanines are the answer. MFMH offers full design and installation services, including PE-stamped engineering drawings and permitting.
