Nuestra gama de productos abarca desde estanterías metálicas  ligeras para necesidades básicas, hasta grandes y complejos sistemas estructurales para dar respuesta a las problemáticas de logística industrial más diversas.

Name: Shelving Inc.
Description:
Shelving Inc. is a second-generation, family-owned business founded in 1960. The goal? Assist customers in effectively and efficiently utilizing their space with the best storage solutions available. 
 
If you're frustrated with the effectiveness of your space, feel free to contact us toll free 800-637-9508 or info@shelving.com for a free design consultation. 

We have almost fifty years of experience solving storage and material handling needs. Whether a client is storing t-shirts, potatoes, books or automotive parts, we have a shelving solution for the storage problem. 

Our distribution center is located in Madison Heights, MI and we have arrangements with over 2,000 various manufacturers of storage and material handling equipment. 

Ultimately, we're here to help you make your space work better.

Name: ESTOKO Logistics
Description:
We are the largest logistics network of Spain, with more than 500 specialized warehouses all over the country.

With AI and cutting-edge technologies, Estoko automates warehousing and logistics deployment for B2B operations, everywhere in Spain and Portugal, while reducing the carbon footprint of logistics activities. 

Estoko has been awarded as Best Logistics Startup of Spain, providing solutions for Supply Chain management and optimization, driving change and efficiency towards the industrialization 4.0 revolution. 

We connect  businesses in need of storage, fulfillment, and distribution to independent warehouses with excess capacity of space. 

We are part of Logistics 4.0 Consorci de la Zona Franca de Barcelona.


__________________________________________________

Somos la red logística más extensa de España con más de 500 almacenes especializados en todo el país. 

Gracias a nuestra tecnología e Inteligencia Artificial, Estoko automatiza el almacenaje de mercancías y el despliegue de operativa logística B2B en cualquier punto de España y Portugal, reduciendo emisiones de CO2.

Somos reconocidos como la Mejor Startup Logística de España (Premios CEL a la Excelencia Logística) por proveer soluciones para la gestión y optmización de la cadena de suministro, impulsado el cambio y la eficiencia hacia una Industria 4.0. 

Conectamos empresas con necesidad de almacenaje logístico con almacenes que tienen exceso de capacidad logística. 

Somos parte de la Incubadora Logistics 4.0, del Consorci de la Zona Franca de Barcleona.

Name: H&M International Warehousing
Description:
H&M International Warehousing operates over 300,000 square feet of warehousing & distribution space on the East Coast. 

Specializing in warehousing and distribution, container yard storage, trailer parking and customs examination services, HMIW is your premiere warehousing and examination services partner.

Name: Wills Transfer Limited
Description:
At Wills Transfer we provide innovative logistics solutions that contribute to our customers’ success. We operate 7 Distribution Centre’s totaling over 1,000,000 sq. ft. Our Eastern Ontario DC's are well positioned to serve Toronto, Montreal, Ottawa, Western Quebec and Cornwall.
Our teams and processes are structured to do it right each time through order fulfillment, pick & pack services, kitting, asset tagging, container de-stuffing, cross docking, inventory management, rail car siding, refrigerated storage, outsourcing solutions and shunting services.
Positive relationships are an essential building block of our business, and at Wills Transfer we strive to form lasting bonds with our suppliers, employees, and of course our clients.

Name: TradeSpace
Description:
Tradespace is a cowarehousing space uniquely designed for manufacturers, craftspeople, and eCommerce, offering a combination of professional office and warehouse space. 

We reimagine the way entrepreneurs gain traction, access resources, and catalyze growth. We make warehousing attainable to our growing community of members through flexible monthly workspace. Through cowarehousing, we create a network of diverse and engaged individuals that allow our members to thrive and reach their intended purpose. 

Book a tour through https://gotradespace.com/scheduling/ to see how growing businesses access flexible office and warehouse space.

Name: Grocery Supply Company
Description:
Founded in 1947 by Curtis McKenzie, Kenneth McKenzie, and Woodrow Brittain, the company prospered under their leadership. “There were at least 50 or so other grocery warehouses within a 100-mile radius of us,” remembered Kenneth McKenzie.

Today, GSC Enterprises, Inc. operates two primary business segments: Grocery Supply Company (c-store distribution) and Fidelity Express (alternative financial services). 

After 14 major expansions, Grocery Supply Company has over 450,000 square feet of space with more than 10,000 items in inventory. Whether you’re a single store operator or a large regional chain, our extensive product line of dry, refrigerated, and frozen items will surely meet your needs. GSC primarily serves convenient stores throughout Texas, Oklahoma, Arkansas, Louisiana, Kansas, and Missouri.

GSC remains a family owned and operated business, with Michael K. McKenzie (second generation) serving as Chairman of the Board and Ryan McKenzie (third generation) serving as Chief Operating Officer. The McKenzie family is not only devoted to its employees and customers, but also, its community. A desire to serve all stakeholders is at the heart of GSC's core values.

“Whether you are working with Grocery Supply Company or Fidelity Express, we truly believe that we are Families Serving Families.” ---Ryan McKenzie COO.

Name: StowNest
Description:
StowNest redefines the relationship between your space and belongings, so you can spend less time managing your things and more time living your life clutter free.

We offer personalized storage service for your belongings be it home, office or business.

We do what’s right. For our customers, this translates to peace of mind and value.

Name: A1 Forklift Truck Training
Description:
A1 Forklift Truck Training Limited is a registered ITSSAR, AITT and BRITTOp Operator Training Organisation and now a CITB Approved Training Organisation.

All our Forklift Truck Training is externally accredited, meeting nationally recognised ITSSAR Standards, and in line with HSE Approved Code of Practice L117 (Rider-Operated lift trucks – Operator training). We have over 20 years experience in carrying out Forklift Truck Training, Working for a number of companies and various training organisations both locally and nationally.

Our training can be carried out on your premises using your equipment or on our premises. The benefit of being trained on your own premises is the operator will be using the equipment they will be operating on a daily basis. Or the training can be carried out at our site using our equipment. We also work around various shift patterns including, days, evenings, nights or weekends etc.

WE CARRY OUT NOVICE, EXPERIENCED OPERATOR, REFRESHER AND CONVERSION TRAINING ON THE FOLLOWING MATERIAL HANDLING EQUIPMENT:

Counter Balance FLT’s (B1, B2 B3 & B4)
Reach Truck’s (D1 & D2)
Pedestrian Pallet Trucks (A1, A2, A3, A4,A5 & A7)
Tele Handler (J2,J3, J4 & J5)
Rough Terrain (J1)

Multi- Directional (M1, M2 & M3) (Combi etc.)

Value Materials Handling is part of The Value Group which was founded in 1981 by Group CEO, Steven Gottschalk, and listed on the JSE (Transport Sector) in 1998. Description:
Somos una empresa argentina especializada en la fabricación y comercialización de sistemas de almacenamiento. Nuestro objetivo se orienta a satisfacer la necesidad de cada cliente y a brindar un servicio focalizado y calificado profesionalmente.
En GR estanterías ofrecemos un servicio integrado, llevando a cabo el diseño y armado del proyecto, la ingeniería y fabricación de los sistemas requeridos, así como también, la implementación y el montaje de los mismos.

Nuestra visión se centra en seguir formando y ampliando nuestro equipo de trabajo, para lograr ser líderes potenciales en el diseño, fabricación e instalación de los sistemas de almacenamiento creados.

Nuestra misión se orienta a satisfacer la necesidad de cada cliente a través de los estándares de calidad implementados, con la finalidad de promover y enriquecer la relación cliente-proveedor, basada en la honestidad y el respeto mutuo.

Name: STS STORAGE SYSTEMS LTD
Description:
At STS Storage Systems we have been answering warehouse storage solutions for over 40 years.

Experience counts, STS Storage Systems are specialists in warehouse storage and handling solutions, pallet storage systems, racking and shelving systems.  Whether you are considering a bay of shelving through to a comprehensive storage system or mezzanine floor. 

Today’s warehouse and logistics market grows ever more complex and demanding as does the needs of our client base.  At STS Storage Systems we pride ourselves on being flexible enough to have responded to the constantly changing demands of modern warehousing and finding effective warehouse storage solutions for our clients.

For over 30 years we have been offering expert advice in maximising customers storage and picking potential, whilst always considering client budgets ensuring the best possible ROI (return on investment).  For any project, whether a new warehouse or redesign of your existing one, our full on-site survey and computer-aided design drawings will turn concepts into reality, giving you the opportunity to change any visuals before project commencement.

Having been established since 1981 our focus has been quality products and service helping us to maintain our core customer base whilst gaining 40% of new customers through recommendations.

The ECOSAFE products are compliant with the strictest existing norms in our field : 
- EN 14470-1 on our safety cabinets for flammables, 
- FM & OSHA for the cabinets fot the industries,

- EN 15154-1 & EN 15154-2 for our safety showers and eye-washers.

Name: Dexion Romania
Description:
Suntem unul din liderii mondiali in furnizarea soluțiilor de depozitare. Ne susținem clienții și necesitățile lor de depozitare, începând de la planificarea depozitului până la instalarea sistemelor de rafturi metalice, continuând apoi cu servicii postvânzare de inspecții, suport și service.

Suntem membri ai Gonvarri Material Handling, alături de alte companii de top din industria depozitării, incluzând Constructor, Kasten, PSS. Livrăm soluții de vârf și inovatoare de depozitare, asigurându-ne că venim în întâmpinarea necesităților clienților noștri, oricare ar fi provocările pe care aceștia le au în domeniul depozitării.

Avem proiecte pe aproape toate continentele lumii, unde am oferit produsele și suportul nostru unor companii de renume internațional. Suntem determinați să dezvoltăm soluții de depozitare care să ajute clienții să lucreze mai repede și mai eficient și să devină astfel mai profitabili.

Name: Webshippy

Name: Summit Alliance Port Limited
Description:
Established in December 2003 in Patenga Industrial Area, Chattogram, Summit Alliance Port Limited (SAPL) was listed with Dhaka and Chattogram Stock Exchange on 16th October 2008. Summit Alliance Port Limited (SAPL) is the pioneer and market leader in the Inland Container Depot (ICD) and Container Freight Services (CFS) industry. 

SAPL has three container depots including one depot of erstwhile OCL. All the depots at Chattogram and River Terminal at Muktarpur have certification from Global Security Verification (GSV) which is the leading international network for supporting the development and implementation of measures for enhancing global supply chain security. This GSV certification has established the fact that the company has the appropriate security measures, as published by the US Bureau of Customs and Border Protection, in place and that these measures are maintained throughout the facilities. Along with GSV, all SAPL facilities are International Ship & Port Security (ISPS) compliant which is a security measure set by the IMO (International Maritime Organization) along with Verified Gross Mass (VGM) approved by Department of Shipping, Government of Bangladesh as part of the Safety of Life at Sea (SOLAS) Convention.

With over 25 years of experience, SAPL enjoys excellent relationships with the major Shipping Lines and Freight Forwarders.

Name: Storeganizer
Description:
Storeganizer is an innovative high-density warehouse storage system. It enables warehouses to store small items in columns of suspended, easy-to-access pockets made of flexible and durable fabric.
Storeganizer allows warehouses to cost-effectively store more small items per ft/m² and ft/m³ by optimizing the use of rack space and decreasing the TCO of warehouses. Warehouse operators can reduce walking distance and boost picking efficiency thanks to Storeganizer.
 
Founded in 2012, Storeganizer is supported by the Belgium-based automotive expert conTeyor. With Storeganizer, conTeyor builds on its experience as the leading expert in the niche market of  state of the art, returnable and cost-effective packaging solutions.

Name: Pelican Self Storage
Description:
Pelican Self Storage is leading Nordic brand within private and business self storage. We have locations in Denmark, Sweden and Finland which are all centrally located and easily accessible.

We strive to be the preferred service partner for people moving to and from the big city - for people moving abroad to work - for people moving in together or back home - for people getting married or having children - for people who don’t have a cellar or attic space at home. In short, we are there when life demands more space.

Our goal is to ensure that as a customer, you will experience good old-fashioned personal service and a high level of quality in our storage services.

Pelican Self Storage was founded in Denmark in 2009 by Nordic Real Estate Partners (NREP) and Evergreen Real Estate Partners (EREP). Since then, things have been moving quickly. We are currently working on many new projects and our goal is to create a chain of high quality, high service storage locations in the Nordic countries situated around the capital areas and the larger surrounding cities.

With 34 locations throughout Denmark, Sweden and Finland - and many more to come - Pelican Self Storage is undergoing rapid expansion.

Our product range includes shelving systems, longspan and rivet racking, small parts storage, workbenches, packing stations, and specialist solutions designed to meet real-world operational demands.

YouStock rend le stockage accessible à tous avec un service adapté à vos besoins et au meilleur prix. Voitimme tuotekehityksestämme Euroopan pienvarastoyhdistysten kattojärjestön FEDESSA:n (Federation of European Self Storage Association) jakaman "Innovation of the Year Award" -palkinnon Portugalissa vuonna 2011. Cityvaraston verkkokauppa pienvarastojen vuokraukseen oli maailman ensimmäinen. Jatkamme edelleen toimintojemme innovatiivista kehittämistä.       

Cityvarasto Ltd was founded in 1999 and has grown into the leader of the self storage sector in Finland by turnover, profitability, floor area and number of self storage facilities. Name: Bulk Terminal Zeeland B.V.
Description:
Bulk Terminal Zeeland is located at the port of Vlissingen. Vlissingen is centrally situated in the southwest of the Netherlands inbetween Rotterdam and Antwerp. Our terminal can handle vessels with a maximum draft of 11.5 meters llw. The port is an open port without any locks. 

Our terminal in only ten minutes from the highway leading to all inland destinations. All inland waterways are accesable by barge.

At our terminal we have 11.0ha of storage space available of which 3.5ha is covered. Most of the warehouses are especially designed to store bulk products. The terminal is sealed and safe. The gate can only be opened by authorised personnel and there is appropriate theft protection.

From our terminal your cargo can be forwarded all over Europe, by truck or barge. Because of the favourable location of the terminal near to the highway system, trucks can go inland without delays or traffic jams. This makes the transport most reliable. Our terminal is also directly connected to the European waterway system which enables us to ship cargo inland by barge, the most environmental way of transport within Europe.

At our terminal we have the possibility to crush and screen any bulk cargo in exactly the size you want. Repacking in drums, bigbags or containers is possible. Marking, weighing per unit or truck; you name it, we do it!

Various cranes are available to load and discharge your cargo. We can also handle board/board cargoes. Discharging and loading of bulk cargoes is one of our specialities. For ship owners it is interesting to know  that the port charges are approx. 30% cheaper than in the surrounding ports. Of course our terminal is ISPS certified. Apart from this we are GMP+, SKAL and ISO9001 certified.

Please feel free to contact us at anytime for more information and our best terms and conditions.

Looking forward to meeting you!

Name: BOXIT A/S
Description:
BOXIT er en dansk familieejet virksomhed med rødder i det nordlige Danmark. Virksomheden har udlejet depotrum siden 2003 og har desuden udlejet i omegnen af 50.000 containere.

Vores koncept hos BOXIT er blevet til med inspiration fra USA og deres self-storage begreb. Siden BOXITs tilblivelse har vi oplevet en stigende efterspørgsel efter opbevaringsløsninger til private og erhverv.

Vi udlejer depotrum i vores 11 afdelinger i Jylland og på Fyn. Her bliver kunderne mødt af personlig betjening i vores butikker tilknyttet afdelingerne. Hos os står vores kunders ting sikkert og tørt, vi har overvågning, minimumstemperatur og lav luftfugtighed. 

I vores butikker kan du købe et stort udvalg af flyttetilbehør til brug for opbevaring og flytning – ligesom det er muligt at leje en flyttetrailer.  

BOXIT containeren kom til i 2009, og dermed blev vores produktsortiment udvidet med containerleje til private og erhverv. Nu har vi over 7.000 containere i flåden, som løbende bliver skiftet ud, således at de altid fremstår rene og pæne til vores kunder.

Vores produktsortiment inkluderer også vores populære Flyttebox. Flyttebox er en flyttecontainer, som gør flytningen nem og fleksibel, idet den kan tilpasses vores kunders eget flyttetempo og tidsplan.

Udover almindelige containere producerer vi også specialdesignede containerløsninger i tæt sparring med vores kunder, lige fra idefasen til den færdige løsning står klar til brug.

For at kunne imødekomme behovet i Danmark og Sverige har vi egne chauffører og 7 BOXIT lastbiler. Det betyder, at vi selv, så vidt det er muligt, leverer og afhenter containere hos vores kunder. 

I vores depotrumsafdelinger i Risskov og Aalborg C, har vi desuden kontorhoteller med i alt 93 selvstændige kontorer, der lejes ud efter samme enkle principper som depotrummene.

Vi brænder for at yde en ordentlig service til vores kunder. En service, som er god, hurtig og fleksibel - og vi investerer hver dag i, at gøre det lidt bedre end dagen før.

Name: Asociación Española de Self Storage
Description:
Self Storage es la denominación que se aplica a los centros que ofrecen el servicio de mini-almacenes de alquiler, seguros, de uso exclusivo y especialmente preparados para que sean los propios usuarios particulares, profesionales o empresas, quienes hagan uso de estos con total libertad.

La Asociación Española de Self Storage (AESS) es la asociación profesional de este sector en España. Es una organización que representa tanto a los grandes operadores con varias instalaciones en España, como a empresas mas pequeñas y a operadores independientes con trasteros en alquiler, muchos de los cuales son empresas de reciente creación. Los proveedores del sector también pueden ser miembros asociados.

Somos una asociación proactiva que busca informar e influir en el mercado y sus inversores, con la firme determinación de apostar por el avance de nuestra industria utilizando todos los recursos que estén a nuestro alcance.

La AESS es una asociación profesional al amparo de la Ley Orgánica 1/2002, de 22 de marzo, y forma parte de la Federación Europea de Self Storage (FEDESSA) con la que mantiene posturas muy próximas.

Name: Hänel & Co.
Description:
Hänel Lagersysteme, 1953 in Deutschland gegründet, ist ein führender Hersteller von automatisierten Lager- und Kommissioniersystemen. Die Schweizer Niederlassungen von Hänel befinden sich seit ihrer Gründung im Jahr 1972 in Altstätten (SG). 

Die Hänel Lagersysteme sind effiziente Organisations- und Materialflusssysteme, die Arbeitsstunden, Lagerplatz und Kosten reduzieren. Unsere Systeme, einzeln oder in Kombination mit z.B. stationären Transportsystemen bieten produktivere, zuverlässigere und ergonomischere Lösungen als herkömmliche Lagersysteme. Unser Ziel ist es, die interne Logistik in den Bereichen Auftragsabwicklung, Lagerung und Verfügbarkeit zu verbessern.  

Vorteile der Hänel Lagerlösungen sind unter anderem: 

1. Bis zu 70% mehr Stellfläche  
2. Verbesserte Bestandskontrolle und Genauigkeit
3. Höhere Produktivität und Geschwindigkeit
4. Erhöhte Sicherheit und Gefahrenabwehr 
5. Richtige Ergonomie für den Benutzer
6. Schutz vor unberechtigten Zugriffen

Hänel Storage Systems founded in Germany in 1953, is a leading manufacturer of automated storage and order picking systems. The Swiss branches of Hänel has been located in Altstätten (SG) since it was established in 1972. 

Our systems, individually or in combination with e.g. stationary transport systems, offer more productive, reliable and ergonomic solutions than conventional storage systems. Our aim is to improve internal logistics in the areas of order processing, storage and availability. Hänel storage systems are efficient organisational and material flow systems that reduce working hours, storage space and costs. 

Advantages of the Hänel storage solutions are among others:

1. Increased floor space for other uses (often over 60% more)
2. Improved inventory control and accuracy
3. Greater productivity and speed
4. Enhanced safety and security 
5. Proper ergonomics for users
6. protection against unauthorised access

Também atende os atacadistas em todos os estados do Brasil, nas vendas de baldes de metal para construção civil e caixa metálica para massa.

 

Na prestação de serviços são realizados processos de repuxos e conformações em materiais de aço carbono, alumínio, cobre, latão e inox, e na confecção das mais variadas peças como: automotivas, paellera, frigideiras, tachos, antenas parabólicas, ou seja, produtos cônicos

Nous étudions et proposons des solutions globales d'aménagement clé en main réalisées avec différents produits :
- rayonnages métalliques pour le stockage statique : racks à palettes, rayonnages légers et mi-lourds, plate-formes / mezzanines industrielles, rayonnages sur bases mobiles, rayonnages pour le stockage de charges longues cantilever.
- rayonnages métalliques pour le stockage dynamique de palettes, bacs et cartons.

Intégrateur de solutions de stockage, GRAVITTAX accompagne les entreprises dans leur démarche d'optimisation des espaces de stockage tout au long de leurs projets : conseil, étude, personnalisation du projet, devis, mise en fabrication, montage et SAV.

Présente sur toute la France, GRAVITTAX intervient dans de nombreux secteurs d'activité tels que l'industrie, l'agroalimentaire, l'automobile, le médical, la logistique, la grande distribution, le tertiaire.

Name: RAD Engineered Wood Products
Description:
Established in 1960, RAD Engineered Wood Products has evolved into an industry leader with a reputation for serving every customer need. Our high-quality traditional Oak flooring for the trailer market and Mixed Hardwood flooring for the box truck market perform so well for so long, each one comes with an industry-leading warranty.

RAD is located in Nescopeck, Luzerne County, Pennsylvania — in the heart of the Appalachian hardwood-growing region and near the intersection of Interstates 80 and 81, a major northeastern trucking corridor. This prime location enables us to source the finest lumber from the most reliable suppliers, process it completely in our facilities, ship the finished products quickly to sites more than 1500 miles away, and pass on all cost savings to our customers.

RAD puts the customer first — working closely with each one to provide the highest quality and value in the hardwood flooring industry. Our skilled production team custom fabricates each floor to the customer’s specifications, delivers it on time and on budget, and backs it with an industry-leading warranty.

Name: VM Care & Wellness Pvt Ltd
Description:
Welcome to VM Care & Wellness, a pioneering Carrying & Forwarding Agency serving paramount pharmaceutical companies across Maharashtra. With over 35 years of dedicated service, we pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence encapsulated in our tagline: "Quest to deliver better than the best"

Our state-of-the-art warehouse and office are located in Bhiwandi, equipped with modern communication tools, the latest hardware, and network facilities to ensure seamless office automation. We manage a total warehouse area of 2.3 lakh sq ft across various strategically located complexes in key business areas. Our team of trained individuals excels in SAP and ERP-based programs, ensuring efficient and effective operations.

With a robust financial framework and over 50 years of combined work experience, we are well-prepared to meet the industry's expansion challenges. We have successfully provided C&F logistic support to 13+ companies, handling over 600 daily orders with a 97%+ accuracy rate, which we continuously strive to improve.

Our operations are supported by a diverse fleet of vehicles tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients and the market. We have established partnerships with leading courier and transport companies to ensure accurate, timely, and faster deliveries across Maharashtra, achieving delivery times within 36 to 48 hours. We commit to 24-hour delivery, even to the remotest corners of the state, while adhering to strict road safety norms.

We follow rigorous good warehousing practices, including systematic storage, a G+2 racking system, and proper labeling. Our cleaning procedures for premises and equipment are in line with sanitation program SOPs. We maintain comprehensive records to ensure ongoing quality, supported by active protective measures such as fire detection devices, fire extinguishers, and fire hydrants.

At VM Care & Wellness we deliver top-tier C&F and warehousing services with superior accuracy and customer satisfaction.

Industrial Marking, Labeling & Visual Workplace Solutions

Since 1890, Volk Corporation has been a trusted leader in industrial marking, labeling, and identification products. We serve automotive OEMs, Tier 1 suppliers, and major manufacturing facilities across North America, helping them improve safety, efficiency, compliance, and lean manufacturing performance.

Volk is unique in being both a manufacturer and distributor of industrial identification solutions:

Manufactured in-house: custom signs, labels, graphics, banners, floor markings, and specialty printed products for facility safety and regulatory compliance.

Distribution partnerships:

Brady – industrial printers, ribbons, tapes, cartridges, vinyl, and lockout/tagout systems.

Telesis – permanent laser marking systems for metals, plastics, and critical components.

Zebra – barcode scanners, mobile devices, and traceability technology.

Gobo Source – projected safety and directional signage for industrial environments.

QuickTube : A Volk Brand

QuickTube is Volk Corporation’s fully owned brand of modular tube & joint systems, designed for building custom racks, carts, workstations, and material handling solutions. While supported by Volk’s expertise and manufacturing capabilities, QuickTube stands as a dedicated brand serving specialized distribution channels and end users who demand flexible, scalable, and cost-effective workplace solutions.

With over 130 years of expertise, Volk provides everything from off-the-shelf ID products to custom-engineered solutions, and acts as an integrated sourcing partner for large-scale manufacturers. Our team understands the realities of complex procurement systems; from RFQs and spot buys to long-term contracts and multi-site plant-level delivery.

Volk delivers more than products, we deliver a complete marking and identification ecosystem designed for the world’s most demanding industrial environments.

Name: Grupo Inviam S.A. Cajas de Seguridad Privadas
Description:
Primera empresa española de alquiler de Cajas de Seguridad en Cámara Acorazada desvinculada a entidades financieras
Líderes en España desde abril de 2013, somos especialistas en ofrecer un servicio privado e independiente de alquiler de cajas de seguridad en cámara acorazada.
Grupo Inviam nace ante una necesidad del mercado, donde los usuarios necesitaban un espacio donde depositar sus pertenencias, un lugar seguro, accesible y confiable. Un servicio que dejaban de prestar los bancos abandonando a los usuarios.
Así pues, desde nuestra apertura hace más de 10 años nos hemos especializado, ofreciendo un servicio privado e independiente de alquiler de cajas de seguridad en cámara acorazada.
Nuestro compromiso con la seguridad, la confidencialidad y la satisfacción del cliente que nos ha convertido en la elección preferida para aquellos que valoran la protección de sus objetos más preciados.
Nuestros objetivos son
1. Seguridad Absoluta: Garantizar la seguridad de los objetos y documentos de valor de nuestros clientes las 24 horas del día, los 365 días del año, mediante sistemas de seguridad de vanguardia y protocolos estrictos de acceso.
 
2. Confidencialidad Total: Preservar la intimidad y la confidencialidad de nuestros clientes ofreciendo salas confidenciales, seguras y exclusivas, así como un seguimiento personalizado de los contratos para que no tengan ninguna preocupación.
3. Independencia y Flexibilidad: Ofrecer un servicio sin vinculaciones a entidades financieras, brindando a nuestros clientes la libertad de acceder a sus cajas de seguridad de manera rápida y discreta, sin importar el tamaño o el plazo de alquiler.
4. Experiencia y Confianza: Estar siempre disponibles para sus consultas demostrando nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la satisfacción del cliente mediante un servicio de alta calidad respaldado por más de diez años de experiencia en el sector.

Name: Don's Cold Storage & Transportation, LLC
Description:
With over 2,500,000 cubic feet of cold storage and refrigerated transportation services, DCSL provides a comprehensive supply chain solution for it’s customers. State of the art, real-time data availability allows us to provide customers with the information they need, when they need it. Our facility has been designed with a state of the art redundant Ammonia Refrigeration, mechanical, and electrical systems, allowing us to maintain controlled temperature ranges from -15 degrees to 50 degrees in different storage rooms. Our facility is approximately 40 feet high and fully racked. The facility was also designed with 8 of the largest and highest capacity blast freezers in the world. A nossa empresa, RibeiWelding - Soluções de Soldadura, Lda, desenvolve a sua atividade especializando-se e direcionando-se para a área industrial, mais propriamente a área da metalomecânica, metalúrgica, serralharia, manutenção industrial, de equipamentos agrícolas ou de construção, entre outras áreas que envolvam e necessitem de produtos de soldadura, corte e produtos industriais.

Com uma equipa jovem e dinâmica que tenta diariamente e ao longo do tempo, cumprir o seu principal objetivo que se prende na satisfação, aconselhamento e ajuda na resolução de problemas dos seus clientes. Tentando garantir sempre a qualidade no atendimento e fornecimento.

Com sede e armazém em Santa Catarina da Serra, assegura a distribuição da gama de produtos que comercializa em todo o país.

Tenta dar todo o apoio necessário dentro da sua área de atividade, quer seja a nível de aconselhamento técnico e ajuda no cliente, apoio comercial e logístico e procura de novas soluções que possam satisfazer as necessidades dos seus clientes.

A nossa meta será sempre a satisfação e crescimento dos seus clientes de modo a estabelecer parcerias ao longo do tempo.

Pour les hôtels, résidences et club houses

Nous sommes là pour comprendre vos besoins.

Name: NOVEM
Description:
Novem is a 4PL leader specializing in COLD CHAIN storage and CPG goods storage and distribution.  NOVEM operates an extensive national licensed warehouse and distribution network, as well as providing services and manufacturing support for the Pharmaceutical, Biopharma, Agrifoods, Nutraceuticals, Personal and Pet Health sectors.

Kelowna, BC – Kelowna is a regional facility within Novem’s national network.  Consists of COLD CHAIN storage, Dry-Temperature Controlled storage, as well as processing and manufacturing focused on Licensed Biopharmaceuticals, Agrifoods, and Pet Wellness products.  We continue to leverage licensed and specialized storage across Canada, recently providing our offerings to pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical companies as well as strategic Agrifoods companies.

Edmonton, AB – Edmonton is a major regional facility within Novem’s national network.  Consists of COLD CHAIN storage, Dry-Temperature Controlled storage, and is in the process of constructing processing and manufacturing space and equipment which will be focused on Licensed Pharmaceuticals, Biopharmaceuticals, and Agrifoods.  This facility is currently in the leasehold buildout phase and will be fully operational by the end of 2023.  Novem is also in discussions with strategic shareholders and partners on the construction of a 100,000 sq.ft purpose-built facility for NOVEM at the airport at YEG which would be ready by the end of 2024, and will be capable of expansion to 200,000sq.ft in the future.

Toronto, Ontario – Toronto is a major regional facility within Novem’s national network.  Consists of COLD CHAIN storage, Dry-Temperature Controlled storage, and is in the process of procuring processing and manufacturing space and equipment which is focused on Licensed Pharmaceuticals, Biopharmaceuticals, and Agrifoods.

AUTOBrine, the tank is just the beginning.

Name: UNEX SpeedCell
Description:
UNEX's SpeedCell is a flexible, dynamic storage solution that works in warehouses, retail storage rooms, cold storage and almost all other warehousing storage applications. SpeedCell is ideal for eCommerce fulfillment, 3PL warehouses, retail storage, and more.

SpeedCell saves space, increases storage density, and reduces labor costs by efficiently delivering maximum storage density in a much smaller area, while also simplifying order picking.  Clients have increased their storage density up to 60% and reduced picking time saving both time and money. 

SpeedCell is a cost effective alternative to space expansion, mezzanines, carousels, pigeon-hole shelving, Akro bins, drawers and more...

SpeedCell is designed to fit perfectly inside new or existing pallet racking,  increasing it's storage capacity and utilizing previously 'dead' space. SpeedCell gives huge savings to large scale projects, and all this with next to no downtime needed for installation.

Name: Canadian Warehousing Logistics Affiliation

Our Vision
To be Canada’s most impactful provider of knowledge that helps Canadian warehousing and Logistics companies thrive.

Our Mission
To empower Canadian Warehousing and Logistics companies through knowledge.

Find a Warehouse - How it Works
CWLA has a list of reputable suppliers with various service specialities.  For those who are searching for a warehouse, we have an easy to complete form allowing us to choose a few appropriate warehousing suppliers.  Your information will be forwarded to these selected suppliers, and they will contact you for any more required information before providing you with a quotation.

Resources
Whether you are a customer looking to improve your supply chain, or a vendor trying to find new customers, we can help. Our resource center is a great place to expand your knowledge through our comprehensive guides. 

Join Our Affiliation
Gain credibility from your prospective clients.  Join & meet with like-minded warehousing & supporting companies.  Stay informed with industry news, regulations, & upcoming events.

Our affiliation is open to all warehousing, trucking, co-packing, or fulfillment providers. Visit our website to get started.

Name: Demix Ltd
Description:
Компанія ТОВ «Демікс» була заснована в 1996 році і включає наступні бізнес напрямки:
• продаж електроінструменту і ручного інструменту, витратних матеріалів;
• продаж навантажувальної  техніки і її сервісне обслуговування;
• продаж металообробних і деревообробних верстатів.
Електроінструмент.
Ми є ексклюзивними постачальниками високоякісних інструментів ТМ «ЗЕНИТ электроинструмент», «Зенит профи» на український ринок. Електроінструменти вказаних торгівельних марок поєднують в собі бездоганну якість, оптимальну продуктивність і доступну ціну.
Торгові команди нашої компанії також активно розвивають нові напрямки: продаж ручного інструменту ТМ  «TOLSEN tools and more», продаж садової техніки  ТМ «Gartner» та електроінструменту ТМ «Tekhmann» по всій території України.
Підтвердженням рівня якості пропонованого інструменту є багаторічне партнерство нашої компанії з найбільшими торгівельними компаніями України: ТОВ «Епіцентр К», ПрАТ «Нова Лінія»,  ТОВ «Олді ТБД», ТОВ «РОЗЕТКА УА» та інші.
Навантажувальна  техніка.
Ми підбираємо навантажувальну  техніку, спираючись на специфіку бізнесу клієнта. Ми є ексклюзивними постачальниками високоякісної складської техніки   ТМ «Skiper» на український ринок.
    Ми завжди готові запропонувати вам широкий асортимент навантажувальної  і складської техніки таких світових брендів як: UniСarriers, Hyundai, Hangcha (НС), Dieci, Niuli, OMG.
Серед наших клієнтів такі компанії як: ПАТ «Запоріжсталь», ТОВ «Метінвест Холдинг», Північний ГЗК, ЦГОК, ПАТ «АрселорМіттал», АТ «Мотор Січ», НАЕК «Енергоатом», ПАТ ІНТЕРПАЙП, ПАТ «Запоріжкокс», ПАТ «Запоріжвогнетрив», Аеропорт Бориспіль, ПАТ «Укрзалізниця» та інші.
Cервісні центри розташовані по всій території України. Наш персонал проходить навчання на заводах-виробниках.
      Компанія надає широкий вибір верстатів високої якості виробництва Німеччини, Тайваню та Китаю. Ми є ексклюзивними постачальниками високоякісних верстатів ТМ FDB MASCHINEN на український ринок.

Name: Sotea Sistem Srl
Description:
SOTEA SISTEM sviluppa la propria attività nella progettazione e realizzazione di impianti per magazzino, dalla scaffalatura semplice per archiviazione, magazzini completi per l’utilizzo dei pallet, soppalchi modulari fino alla realizzazione di magazzini automatici. Nella progettazione offre i massimi standard di sicurezza e garanzia che esistono sul mercato.
In un mondo dove solo ciò che è nuovo sembra essere la soluzione, noi pensiamo invece che “Solo chi ha una storia può avere un futuro”.
Non a caso, questi ultimi trent’anni raccontano di evoluzioni e trasformazioni profonde che ci hanno portato, oggi, a proporci sul mercato come partner a 360°. L’evoluzione delle esigenze dei clienti da una parte e le normative sempre più pressanti dall’altra, ci hanno portato ad un’altissima specializzazione che mettiamo al servizio dei clienti dalla progettazione alla manutenzione di tutte le soluzioni proposte.
Oggi le attività di SOTEA SISTEM comprendono la distribuzione e commercializzazione di un’ampia gamma di prodotti, destinati a rendere sicuro e funzionale ogni spazio coprendo la globalità della domanda del mercato dello stoccaggio industriale, dell’automazione e della movimentazione interna di merci.

Name: Erfa Inventar A/S
Description:
Er din virksomhed klar til at optimere lageret og skabe orden med kvalitetsstålreoler?  

Erfa Inventar er en dansk produktionsvirksomhed der specialiserer sig i reolssystemer. Vi eksperter i at forvandle dine lager- og opbevaringsbehov til en effektiv og velfungerende løsning.

Forestil dig dette:

Et lager, hvor hver eneste kvadratmeter udnyttes optimalt, takket være robuste og holdbare stålreoler, der ikke blot organiserer dine varer, men også skaber overblik og øger effektiviteten.

Selv i lagerstyring kan udfordringer opstå:

 Rod og uorden på lageret, der gør det svært at finde det nødvendige udstyr eller produkter.
 Ineffektiv udnyttelse af pladsen, der kan føre til spild og unødvendige omkostninger.
 Problemer med at finde en løsning, der både er fleksibel og tilpasset præcis dine behov.

Her træder Erfa Inventar ind:

 Optimér dit lager med vores kvalitetsstålreoler, designet til at skabe orden og forbedre arbejdsflowet.
 Uanset om det er til butik, bilindretning, værksted eller lager, kan vi levere løsninger, der matcher dine behov.
 Fra rådgivning til levering – vi er med dig hele vejen.

Det er ret simpelt:

Trin 1: Gør dig nogle overvejsler om dine behov. Uanset om det er til indretning af lager, værksted, varerbilen eller kontor, så har vi en løsning. Hvad skal du bruge reolerne stil?

Trin 2: Kontakt vores erfarne team og få skræddersyet en reolløsning, der passer perfekt til din virksomhed.

Trin 3: Vi sørger for leveringen, så du hurtigt kan komme i gang med at bruge dine nye stålreoler.


Er du klar til at få mere ud af dit lager med Erfa Inventars stålreoler? 

Lad os vise dig, hvordan vi kan hjælpe med at skabe orden og effektivitet i din virksomhed.

 Skriv til os på info@erfainventar.dk  
 Ring til os på +45 44 94 10 00
 Se mere på www.erfainventar.dk

É a única da região Bragantina que aluga espaço extra com comodidade e facilidade de acesso, sem fiador e sem burocracia. Nossas instalações ocupam 5 mil m2, com área construída de quase 2 mil m2. É seguro - possuímos sistema de vigilância 24hs e monitoramento por câmeras realizado por empresa especializada. É acessível - sem escadas. Temos estacionamento para mais de 40 veículos. Escritório com recepção, copa e um saboroso café feito com muito carinho. Usamos canecas e copos metálicos – defendemos a natureza!

Nosso objetivo é facilitar a vida das pessoas, seja ao guardar seus pertences ou oferecendo a micro e pequenos empresários a oportunidade de fortalecer a imagem da sua empresa e crescer com baixo custo e segurança.

A Cubico Self Storage oferece comodidade e facilidade de acesso para quem precisa guardar estoques, arquivos, equipamentos e até objetos pessoais que funciona como uma extensão da sua casa ou do seu negócio. É indispensável na redução de custos seja da sua casa ou da sua empresa.

Já no Espaço Criativo Cubico Coworking, temos mesas compartilhadas (Hot Desk). Sala de reuniões. Wi-fi e internet de alta velocidade. Estrutura de escritório: scanner, impressora e etc. Wi-fi.

O Escritório Virtual é um serviço da Cubico que oferece endereço comercial e fiscal - excelente para profissionalizar a imagem da sua empresa com seus clientes, gestão de correspondência e todo o conforto de um escritório sem precisar sair de sua casa. Também enviamos e recebemos encomendas.

A Caixa Postal (Mailbox) é um serviço do Escritório Virtual. Inclui caixa postal, endereço comercial e notificação por WhatsApp quando chegam suas correspondências e/ou pacotes. É ideal para quem deseja muita privacidade.

INVERNADEROS TRIGO  diseña, desarrolla, fabrica y monta construcciones innovadoras con estructuras ligeras basadas en el Acero de alta calidad.

Fruto de la experiencia adquirida durante más de 40 años en el desarrollo, diseño, fabricación e instalación de Invernaderos en diversos mercados, climas, entornos de gestión y con enfoques de aplicación diversa, INVERNADEROS TRIGO ha desarrollado diversas líneas de aplicación de sus conocimientos a las necesidades que los mercados demandan, aplicando conocimientos y experiencias adquiridas INVERNADEROS TRIGO, ha desarrollado aplicaciones encaminadas a dar soluciones en diversas áreas de negocio:

INVERNADEROS
INDUSTRIAL
GARDEN
ALMACENAJE
EQUIPAMIENTOS
CONSULTORIA
 

INVERNADEROS TRIGO como fabricantes altamente especializados en construcciones ligeras de acero, controlamos y gestionamos el proceso completo, desde los aspectos que abarcan el diseño y logística de transporte, la fabricación hasta la instalación en el punto de demanda del Cliente final.

Desde sus inicios hace más de 40 años, de la mano de Juan Antonio Trigo, la principal actividad de Invernaderos Trigo, S.A. es la fabricación de estructuras metálicas para invernaderos así como de otras aplicaciones tanto de construcción como industriales.

En la actualidad Invernaderos Trigo, S.A. dispone de un área industrial de 20.000 m2. Con la más alta tecnología en maquinaria industrial, formando un equipo humano de técnicos y personal cualificado encargados de diseñar, fabricar e instalar los invernaderos.

Nuestra empresa es conocida por la utilización de materias primas de la mejor calidad y las constantes innovaciones que introducimos en los diseños.

Invernaderos Trigo, S.A. es un referente en la construcción de invernaderos tanto a nivel nacional como internacional por lo que la empresa ha firmado varios proyectos en el extranjero.

Name: Philippine Skylanders International, Inc.
Description:
PSI is one of the pioneers of the logistics industry, operating at the most strategic location right where the action is at the heart of the Ninoy Aquino International Airport (NAIA) Complex, operating for 44 years as the first Customs Bonded Warehouse (CBW) in NAIA.

Name: Siddhi Cold Chain
Description:
SERVING THE COUNTRY'S COLD STORAGE NEEDS SINCE 1974

Siddhi Cold Chain is a leading cold chain supply solution provider in Delhi and NCR. Our comprehensive services cover the entire spectrum of cold chain storage and logistics, encompassing temperature-controlled warehousing, deep freezing facilities, refrigerated logistics, distribution services, and Carrying & Forwarding (CFA) solutions.

Our Vision
At Siddhi Cold Chain, our vision extends far beyond being a successful business entity. We are dedicated to making a meaningful contribution to humanity by addressing one of the most pressing global challenges - food wastage. Our vision is to create a strategically located cold chain network that ensures food is kept fresh from the farm to plates, significantly reducing food wastage and ensuring that every human is nourished.

Our Mission

Name: Sig Sys, Inc.
Description:
Sig Sys, Inc. and its dedicated team of professionals understand the racking industry from the top to the bottom. Racking is used in virtually every industry and it’s critical that the installation is congruent with the specifications of the engineered drawings.

Selecting a quality installation company should not be treated lightly. Is the best price your motivation? Or is industry “Best Practice” your concern?
 
¨ Know your pallet rack capacities, will it support your materials?
¨ Is your installation crew able to identify a damaged up-right?
Should you attempt to straighten or fix that damaged beam?
¨ Are your employees climbing the racks, if so what is the solution?
¨ Do you have plywood as a shelf in pallet racking?
¨ Are all of your up-rights floor bolted?
¨ When was the last time you had a professional inspect your racking for integrity failures?
 
Sig Sys, Inc., will assist you and your project manager with an inspection and assist in creating solutions to your warehouse requirements.

Name: "Save"ty Yellow Products
Description:
“Save”ty Yellow Products is an industry leading producer of facility asset protection and safety products used in manufacturing, distribution centers and warehouse facilities. We take the approach of being a solution provider, so we offer several models for each product line giving distributors and customers a choice when designing and protecting a facility. Its entire product line, including custom applications, is powder coated for long lasting durability.

The Company manufactures safety products to protect employees, facilities, products, & machinery from impact by fork truck, including but not limited to drop-in / lift-out guardrails, highway design, lite rail & deflector series guardrails, overhead door track protection, rack post protectors, curved & low-profile rack end systems, mezzanine safety gates, modular handrails, building column protectors, and steel bollards.

Name: Pebro Petroyannis Bros
Description:
PEBRO - PETROYANNIS BROS O.E. is active since 1972 in the design and construction of storage systems and logistics. Production is equipped with state of the art machinery on sheet metal fabrication. So, whatever the size and nature of your storage needs, we have the knowledge and expertise to help you cover them.
All these years, for any storage and logistics problem, PEBRO has the most efficient and effective solution from simple shelving to most complex warehouses with vast pallet racking systems or mezzanine storage floors to automated pallet flow systems.
Being the official representative of DEXION and SCHAEFER in conjunction with the very experienced team of engineers PEBRO designs and manufactures to the highest standards turn- key storage solutions.
A few years back PEBRO started producing display stands for the most famous international companies exploiting the high tech equipment for sheet metal fabrication and its expertise and knowledge.
More recently PEBRO came to an agreement with Phil Andreou S.A. and acquired their operation of display-stands. Phil Andreou, based in Limassol of Cyprus, has been a very successful company for many years on the design and production of display stands. It was not only dominant in the Cypriot market but it was exporting all over the world customized display-stands for its customers, well known multinational companies. Through this acquisition in fact the production line was relocated from Cyprus to Greece and PEBRO enriched its knowledge and know how. Τhe production line was extended and completed even further being able to offer display-stands in any quantity, of top quality and competitive prices.

Description:
With over 30 years of experience, we are now launching the next chapter in self-storage. Storeinn. Along with manufacturing NEW stack racks, Ohio Rack also buys and sells USED portable stack racks. Ohio Rack is an International company with sales all and connections over the world.

Ohio Rack’s main focus is to provide the flexible material handling industry with products that will exceed our customers expectations of on-time delivery and durability. Over 90% of our stack racks are custom built to our customers specifications. Ohio Rack values our customers. That’s why we know price is important to everyone and when you talk with us, you will find out that our pricing is very competitive, a fact that our many long-time customers can attest to. That’s why Ohio Rack is the supplier of choice for the material handling industry.

Our racks expand the walls and raise the roof.  We help companies optimize their warehouse storage capacity up to 100% while preventing product damage and improving worker safety.  If you are trying to add more density and flexibility to your warehouse or distribution center, think "vertical" with portable stack racks.  All of our racks are welded together from American made steel tubing. Portable stacking racks are self-contained units.They consist of a base and removable posts or end frames, and can be moved with a forklift or pallet jack.

Newest investment is the outstanding 37-meter-wide RO-RO ramp with 700t capacity.

Our mission is to provide the most cost-effective and reliable stevedoring services in the region. We achieve this by working closely with our customers, understanding their business, and gearing our services to their exact requirements.

We continue to invest in modern equipment and the latest information technology to ensure that our port operations are state-of-the-art. This, combined with an experienced management team, allows us to maintain a very high level of customer service.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 Euro Terminal is a partner in the project "DigiTechPort2030 – Decarbonisation of Small Ports' Ecosystems for Efficient Environmental and Energy Management towards South Baltic Fit for 55" 
 co-financed by Interreg South Baltic Programme 2021-2027. 

 Goal of the project: to improve knowledge and capacities for decarbonisation measures in small and medium-sized ports of the South Baltic Area by equipping them with two solutions until the end of 2026.

The project proposes to deliver two solutions:
 Green Energy Harmonization Toolbox for Small and Medium-Sized Ports;
 EU Regulation and Green Policy Compliance Roadmap of Green Transition for Small and Medium-Sized Ports.

The partnership is also going to implement, test and evaluate two types of decarbonisation pilots. 

 Project duration: 15.09.2023 – 14.09.2026

The process can be stressful, labour intensive and time consuming.  In some cases, the mere threat of legal action can be debilitating for some storage operators. This can sometimes lead to non-action, with a flow on effect of increased debt levels and the loss of income.

We also know everyone loves a bargain and hunting for treasures and that’s why we launched iBidOnStorage.co.uk.
 

iBidOnStorage is the UK’s only online auction platform dedicated to the storage industry, specialising in storage unit auctions.  A platform that delivers a marketplace where both Sellers and Buyers of storage units can benefit and prosper.  
 

Our site is designed to give the Seller greater control over the auction process, by giving them full access to their own account and allowing them to set their own auction parameters.  Sellers will also benefit through increased exposure.  A bigger audience means the potential of more buyers.  More buyers lead to a more competitive auction, which in-turn drives a higher selling price.  In addition, faster turn-around times mean the Seller can re-rent their storage unit quicker than ever before.

Buyers, whether they be second hand dealers or bargain hunters, do not have to be physically present to place a bid.  They will be able to bid from the comfort of their own home or office.  We will even notify our Buyers when a new auction starts in their area.

And best of all, iBidOnStorage will host nothing but storage unit auctions.  Gone will be the risk of auctions going unnoticed or unfound on sites that sell everything from cars, trucks and boats, through to electrical goods, fine art and collectibles.  iBidOnStorage will be a treasure hunters dream.

This service allows businesses to lease storage space for a set period of time, usually several months or years. This option is ideal for businesses that need long-term storage solutions for inventory, equipment, or other materials.

Another leasing service provided by Storeit Consultants is short-term leasing. This option is perfect for businesses that only need temporary storage solutions, such as during a move or renovation. With short-term leasing, businesses can lease storage space for just a few weeks or months, without the commitment of a long-term lease.
Storeit Consultants also provides customized leasing solutions to meet the unique needs of each business. This means that businesses can work with Storeit Consultants to design a storage solution that meets their specific needs, whether that means a customized storage unit or a specialized storage solution for unique materials or equipment.
In addition to their leasing services, Storeit Consultants also provides a range of other services to help businesses manage their storage needs. These include consulting services to help businesses choose the right storage solutions, as well as packing and moving services to help businesses transport their materials to and from the storage facility.
Overall, Storeit Consultants provides a range of leasing services to help businesses manage their storage needs.  “The average time the forwarding industry took to provide a quote was 90 hours”.

Marketplace solutions are increasingly giving customers opportunities to get fast solutions both in terms of timing and costs.

LogistCompare is a Warehouse Marketplace platform aimed to support both Retailers and Warehouse providers. It solves the following problems:

Retailers

Warehouses Providers

LogistCompare is coming soon! 

Contact us now for more information.

 All our products come with a guarantee of an extended lifespan, thanks to their powder-coated (Epoxy) finish. This sets them apart from the traditional spray-painted options available locally. Name: Go Fan Yourself/Ray-Air
Description:
We Believe Different is Cool
Go Fan Yourself is the visionary company that redefined and reinvented the HVLS fan industry with the Z-Tech Fan. In February of 2020 we took Z-Tech further by executing a full partnership with global powerhouse ABB!  Z-Tech is now powered by the ABB Dodge Quantis Z-Tech Drive.  The most advanced "big fan" powerplant in the world and gives GFY the only system solution (motor and drive made by the same company) available in America.  Our passion for innovation and for doing what’s right drives us to create the world’s best big fans that blow our clients’ minds. Go Fan Yourself clients save money, boost productivity and enjoy a partnership with a manufacturer they trust to keep it cool.

GFY clients also trust us when it comes to safety!  In September of 2019 GFY released the Z-Tech SS safety system making our fans 2X safer than every other fan on the market.  Custom straps with a break strength of 16,000lbs easily exceed the dated steel cables used by every other fan in the industry.

In addition to our technology and experience, we differentiate ourselves through the values that drive our corporate behavior. We take pride in our commitment to honesty, authenticity, professionalism and a passion for building trust-centered relationships with our clients. Instead of the quick sale, we focus on selling systems for change, not just standalone products.

Go Fan Yourself released our patented Z-Tech fan in 2014 to address the shortcomings of conventional HVLS fans in the industry. To truly be different and be cool, we needed to design and manufacture our own products. This allowed GFY to be proactive at the highest level and create solutions for inherent gaps in conventional HVLS fan design that our customers brought to our attention. Four major problem and opportunity areas have surfaced that our revolutionary Z Tech technology addresses.

Para acesso remoto de documentos digitalizados a Box One desenvolveu o sistema SBOne (Sistema Box One de gerenciamento eletrônico de documentos), que é armazenado em nuvem pela Digital Ocean Inc., com sede em Nova York, com certificação que garante a integridade no tráfego de dados e monitorado 24h por uma equipe de TI, assim oferece alta segurança, maior confiabilidade e agilidade na busca por informações. Unser Omega-Palettenregal mit seinem markanten Querschnitt ist eine stabile Basis für vielseitige Lagerlösungen. Auch Einfahrregale, die immer seltener am Markt zu finden sind, gehören zu unserem Portfolio.

Innovative Systeme für maximale Effizienz
Neben Push-Back-Regalen, Durchlauf- und Verschieberegalen bieten wir mit unseren XXL-Rollenbahnen eine leistungsstarke Lösung für schwere Ladungsträger – ausgelegt für Lasten von bis zu 2 Tonnen pro Quadratmeter.

Komplettlösungen für die Intralogistik
Als Teil einer starken Unternehmensgruppe liefern wir nicht nur Regale, sondern ganzheitliche Lösungen für effiziente Lagerhaltung – darunter Lagerbühnen, Kragarm- und Fachbodenregale. Unsere Experten entwickeln maßgeschneiderte Intralogistik-Konzepte.

Hochregallager & Automatisierung
Mit Hochregallager-Silos, Regalbediengeräten (RGB) und Mehrebenen-Shuttle-Systemen setzen wir neue Maßstäbe in der Automatisierung. In Kulmbach gefertigt, zeichnen sich unsere Anlagen durch Qualität und Langlebigkeit aus.

Wir spielen in der oberen Liga
Dank unserer neuen Hochregallager-Silos, die über 22 Meter hinausgehen, bieten wir wirtschaftliche und platzsparende Lösungen für Unternehmen mit hoher Umschlagleistung.

Galler – weil effiziente Lagerlogistik den Unterschied macht.

We've been working with eCommerce retailers for years and as such have built up expertise across the main marketplaces Amazon and eBay as well as many eCommerce platforms such as Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce and BigCommerce.

Retrilog représente fin 2016 un effectif de 60 salariés dont 38 en insertion pour une chiffre d'affaires de 2,5M€.
RETRILOG s’attache à lutter contre les causes d’exclusion, basant son action sur la conviction que le retour à l’emploi des personnes en difficulté est un moyen de les aider à préserver leur dignité, à retrouver leur autonomie financière et leur place dans la société. RETRILOG participe au développement d’une économie responsable au service des Territoires, RETRILOG œuvre pour la solidarité et préserve l’environnement.

Nos métiers
Le transport et la logistique
La gestion de déchets issus du tertiaire
Offre personnalisée d'Emballage et Expédition toutes destinations

Nos valeurs 
Favoriser l'insertion socio professionnelle des personnes par l'activité économique
Participer au développement d'une économie responsable au service des Territoires
Oeuvrer pour la solidarité et préserver l'environnement dans le respect de la législation

Nos atouts  
Un service réactif et rigoureux qui s'inscrit dans une démarche d'amélioration continue : Retrilog est certifiée ISO 9001 et ISO14001 depuis novembre 2016
Une solution personnalisée : nous vous proposons une étude à la carte de vos besoins et adaptée à vos contraintes techniques et financières.
Une solution respectueuse de l'environnement
Une solution bretonne
La force d'un mouvement national reconnu depuis 60 ans, la souplesse d'un acteur régional

Au final 
Un choix qui vous engage en tant que citoyen et en tant qu’entreprise que vous pouvez valoriser économiquement et justifier humainement par la valeur ajoutée à votre responsabilité Sociale d’Entreprise (RSE).

Pierce's services can be directly applied to all industrial equipment manufacturing segments such as, construction, agriculture, mining, material handling, automotive, aerospace, and component manufacturers.  

Distribution:
If you are looking to outsource your distribution operation to a 3PL or expand operations to another geographic area, then please consider Pierce for your distribution needs. We can manage existing operations inside your facility or we can use our site selection services to help locate the desired location for a new facility.

Packaging:
Pierce can consolidate shipments from your suppliers and provide the processes and management tools to successfully package any part in a timely manner.  We will visually inspect incoming shipments for count and condition and if packaging specs have not been pre-determined by you, Pierce can design the packaging upon receipt of the part or beforehand if part specifications are readily available. 

Crating:
Pierce has experience designing and building crates either for export or domestic shipping. Pierce has crated parts ranging from assembly line machines being sent overseas for production, to engines and transmissions, glass, cabs, hydraulic cylinders, and body panels for vehicles, to name a few. No part is too big or small and our flexible workforce can handle any demand or volume.

Government and Military Packaging:
Pierce is aware that many companies find themselves constantly challenged by the stringent inspection, packaging, documentation, and shipping requirements required by the United States government. Pierce deals with these matters daily and provides their customers absolute assurance of compliance and acceptance.

Name: k2 Armazéns Gerais
Description:
A K2 Armazéns Gerais nasceu com o propósito de atuar no mercado de armazenamento e vem de uma história de experiência no ramo, há mais de 20 anos.

O proprietário da empresa, Fernando Milan Sartori, criou a FMS Agro, no ano de 1997, com o intuito de suprir as necessidades dos produtores rurais locais, no armazenamento de sementes de batata. Por ser uma das regiões mais produtivas do país no plantio desta cultura, a procura por espaços ideais para o armazenamento das sementes produzidas se tornava cada vez maior.

Fernando Milan Sartori, na qualidade de produtor rural, construiu sua primeira câmara frigorífica direcionada para tais sementes, obtendo grande êxito quando aliou tecnologia ao entendimento.

Com a expansão do mercado, outros setores da indústria de alimentos começaram a procura por espaços de armazenagem com temperatura controlada.

A partir daí, deu-se início a construção de um complexo frigorífico de grande renome no meio atuante, oferecendo ao mercado logístico serviços agregados, diferenciados e de qualidade.

Ao longo dos anos, Fernando Milan Sartori expandiu seus negócios, aumentando seu portfólio de prestação de serviços logísticos, atuando também no mercado de transporte, co-packers, picking e cross-docking, atendendo desde pequenas empresas, até multinacionais.

Com a diversidade de serviços oferecidos, a criação, modernização e expansão das plantas para outras localidades foram de extrema importância para a continuidade dos negócios.

No ano de 2017 Fernando Milan Sartori vendeu suas participações relacionadas ao complexo frigorífico para um fundo de investimento. Com isso, um novo quadro organizacional foi formado, criando assim a K2 Armazéns Gerais.

Desde o início desta história, Fernando Milan Sartori atende clientes que são líderes de mercados nas áreas em que atuam e estão sempre inovando. Este é um ponto de extrema importância para a empresa, uma vez que tem seus processos baseados na qualidade e segurança alimentar. Devido a isso alguns de nossos clientes firmam conosco parceria de décadas, alinhando nossa capacidade produtiva de acordo com suas necessidades.

Name: SafeCloak
Description:
SafeCloak Smart Lockers are fully automated, IoT-enabled storage systems designed to offer secure, convenient, and contactless short-term storage for luggage, parcels, and personal belongings. Built for high-traffic environments such as railway stations, airports, metro stations, temples, malls, and events, SafeCloak lockers provide a seamless self-service experience through an intuitive touchscreen and QR-based access.

Each locker is remotely monitored, centrally managed, and engineered for 24/7 reliability. Users can easily verify their identity, choose a locker, make a digital payment, and store their items within seconds—making the entire process fast, safe, and hassle-free. The platform is API-ready, enabling integration with delivery partners, e-commerce platforms, and business workflow systems.

With a mission to bring secure, smart storage solutions closer to people, SafeCloak is redefining convenience and helping organisations enhance visitor experience, improve safety, and streamline operational efficiency.

Description:
123 Magazijninrichting biedt u alles voor een complete en efficiënte inrichting van uw magazijn, werkplaats of opslagruimte. Door een samenvoeging van een drietal bedrijven, gespecialiseerd in de verkoop, montage en keuring van magazijnstellingen, is er in 2011 een unieke fusie ontstaan onder de naam: 123 Magazijninrichting.

123 Magazijninrichting in het kort:

Met meer dan 12 jaar ervaring bedienen wij onze klanten dagelijks met een goed product en een passend advies. Wij bieden uitsluitend producten van Nederlandse, Duitse en Belgische fabrikanten aan, om zo de beste kwaliteit en een lange levensduur te garanderen.

123 Magazijninrichting heeft een uitgebreide voorraad nieuwe en gebruikte magazijnstellingen, veiligheidsartikelen, transportmiddelen, kantoor- en kantinemeubilair. Het voordeel van een grote voorraad (21.000 m²) is een snelle levering en een optimale oplossing voor elke aanvraag.

Eigen monteurs en keurmeesters zorgen voor het monteren, demonteren, herstellen, verhuizen en keuren van uw magazijnstellingen.

Een alles onder één dak concept. Hét gemak van één aanspreekpunt, een vaste prijs en een kostenbesparende oplossing voor de complete inrichting van uw magazijn, werkplaats of opslagruimte.

Name: MeerMagazijn magazijninrichters
Description:
Een vakkundig bedrijf met een flexibele instelling, adviserend en doelgericht. Dat zijn wij. Onze grote voorraad magazijnstellingen, transportmogelijkheden, eigen productie en gekwalificeerde montagediensten realiseren iedere gewenste magazijnstelling of verdiepingsvloer. U kunt uw project bij ons veilig uit handen geven. Wij beschikken over een eigen verkoopteam, productieafdeling, gediplomeerde monteurs en vrachtvervoer. Het totale traject van advies, design, productie, transport, montage, oplevering en aftersales houden wij volledig in eigen beheer. Door deze persoonlijke aanpak bent u verzekerd van optimale kwaliteit.

De kwaliteit van al onze diensten en producten is 100% gegarandeerd, dat spreekt voor zich. Minstens zo belangrijk vinden wij serviceverlening. Uitgangspunt van ons klantgerichte servicebeleid vormen professionaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en persoonlijke betrokkenheid. Onze medewerkers zijn gediplomeerd en gecertificeerd waardoor we voortdurend anticiperen op toekomstige brancheontwikkelingen. Wij leveren iedere magazijnstelling of verdiepingsvloer op maat, volledig aangepast aan uw wensen en specifieke bedrijfsbehoeften en informeren u periodiek over relevante branche- en bedrijfsontwikkelingen. Wij voelen ons persoonlijk verantwoordelijk voor het geleverde eindproduct. Onze medewerkers staan klaar om u te adviseren, aftersales is voor ons niet meer dan vanzelfsprekend. Voor persoonlijk advies kunt u ons bellen, maar u bent ook van harte welkom in ons pand in Hazerwoude-Dorp (ZH). Ook komen wij graag bij u langs om kennis te maken en advies op maat te geven. Projectrealisatie geschiedt binnen de afgesproken tijd en het vooraf overeengekomen budget en elk project wordt keur-klaar opgeleverd, volgens actuele Arbo-eisen en NEN-richtlijnen. Onze kwaliteitsgarantie biedt u jarenlang optimale zekerheid. Daarnaast zijn onze offertes, kostencalculaties en facturen transparant, wij komen onze afspraken na.

Name: Source 4 Industries
Description:
Source 4 Industries was established in 1972. Since that beginning, we have become a trusted source for material handling equipment and warehouse supplies. We began our business as a family-owned supplier of bearings and power transmission products. Within a few short years we expanded our product lines to include many industrial products and a full line of material handling equipment. Through years of expansion and the support of many customers and suppliers, we decided to change our business name to one that more accurately portrays who we are and what we do. On January 1, 1996, we changed our company name to Source 4 Industries.
Source 4 Industries now sells nationwide. Our website is filled with a diverse product line and manufacturers we are proud to represent. As we continue to expand, we have made it our mission to give that same level of customer support we’ve created in Nevada to a nationwide customer base. We make it our goal to partner with the most trusted and dedicated companies in the industry that share our standards and values for high level customer care and satisfaction.

        Our customers are what make our business great. We understand the intricacies of running a business and we want to be here to support our customers and take care of any of their material handling needs. As we continue to grow, we are dedicated to taking care of our customers that helped us get where we are today. We make sure that our team doesn’t overlook the fact that without our customers we wouldn’t be who we are.

        Even after 50 years, we are still family-owned and operated. The same man that started the company at age 19, is still the President and Owner of Source 4. Thank you for your continued support over the years, and we hope to continue to be your one stop shop for all your material handling and warehouse.

Our core service lines — XactStock and XactData — are designed to be practical and system-aware:

XactStock focuses on inventory behavior, bin velocity, and stock positioning to surface where excess, shortages, and risk actually originate

XactData turns fragmented operational data into trusted, usable signals teams can act on with confidence

INVEX does not replace existing systems. We help teams understand what their systems are already telling them — and act before issues turn into fire drills.

By combining technical depth with real operational experience, INVEX delivers measurable efficiency, calmer execution, and systems that scale without relying on heroics.

Inventing Excellence — one operation at a time.

Está ubicada en el Puerto de Topolobampo, Sinaloa (Noroeste de la costa del Pacífico Mexicano). Se encuentra en un punto estratégico para el enlace de los mercados de la cuenca del Pacífico, Norteamérica, Centro y Sudamérica y el Caribe a través del canal de Panamá.

TTT fue creada como una solución para satisfacer las necesidades logísticas del Noroeste de México, constituyéndose como pionero en la prestación de servicios portuarios en el Puerto de Topolobampo, Sinaloa, originalmente enfocada al manejo de productos a granel, principalmente fertilizantes sólidos, gramíneas y oleaginosas.

Fue fundada en 1998, con una importante inversión para la adquisición, adaptación y modernización de instalaciones e infraestructura apropiadas para prestar servicios portuarios de calidad de acuerdo con las necesidades del mercado, iniciando operaciones de descarga en el interior del recinto portuario en el año de 1999.

We are located near Smarden in Kent, and serve London and the South East and further afield, and are convenient for the Channel Tunnel. Our facility offers electric car charging for visitors, ample parking, and is scaled for HGV car transporters with 7-metre high load bay doors.

Name: Active Industrial Fire Protection LLC
Description:
Active Industrial Fire Protection LLC is a full service fire code consulting firm specializing in High Piled Combustible and Hazardous Materials Storage occupancies.  Our services include fire code consulting, fire protection systems design, warehouse layout and design, plans development and project management, and material handling sales and services.

What sets Active Industrial Fire Protection apart is our ability to work alongside the participants in a warehouse lease transaction seamlessly in order to provide a successful project resulting in the delivery of a valid certificate of occupancy or certificate of compliance.

We work with end users, professional service providers such as architects and MEPs, industrial tenant rep and landlord brokers, and building owners to bridge the gaps in communication between the business community, brokerage community, building department, and fire marshal's office.  Having experience in all of these areas allows us to accomplish projects that other firms cannot.

Therefore, if you are an end user looking to permit your warehouse, and architect looking to assist your client, or an broker representative looking to qualify your building, we can help.  We can provide as little as a code language report to as much as a full turnkey project including plans development, submittals, approvals, and inspections.  If you are a sprinkler contractor we can provide sprinkler and alarm designs for you.

Name: BOXIT Sweden
Description:
BOXIT är ett dansk- och familjeägt företag med rötter i norra Danmark. Företaget har hyrt ut lagringsutrymmen sedan 2003 och cirka 50.000 containrar sedan 2009. 

Vårt koncept hos BOXIT uppstod genom inspiration från USA och deras principer för självförvaring. Det har visat sig vara en bra utgångspunkt, då vi ända sedan BOXIT grundades har noterat ett växande intresse för och efterfrågan på förvaringslösningar. Vi är nu stolta över att vara marknadsledande i Danmark inom uthyrning av förvaringslösningar för privatpersoner och företagskunder. 

Genom lanseringen av BOXIT-containern 2009 utökades vårt produktsortiment till att även omfatta uthyrning av containrar för privatpersoner och företagskunder. Vi har nu över 7.000 containrar i vår flotta och 42 olika varianter. Här ingår standardcontainrar, isolerade containrar, kyl-/fryscontainrar, containrar med sidodörrar och många fler. Containerflottan består av förhållandevis nya containrar som byts ut regelbundet. På så sätt framstår de alltid som rena och snygga för våra kunder. 

I vårt produktsortiment ingår även vår populära Flyttbox som verkligen har blivit en stor favorit hos danskarna. Flyttbox är en flyttcontainer som gör det enkelt och flexibelt att flytta, eftersom den kan anpassas efter kundernas eget tempo och schema. 

Vid sidan om standardcontainrar tillverkar vi också skräddarsydda containerlösningar i nära samarbete med våra kunder, ända från idéfasen och tills den färdiga lösningen står redo att användas. 

För att möta efterfrågan i Danmark och Sverige har vi 7 BOXIT-lastbilar som i största möjliga utsträckning levererar och hämtar containrar från våra kunder. Därigenom kan vi planera logistiken för våra egna körningar och vara flexibla i förhållande till kundernas behov. 

Vi brinner för att ge våra kunder en bra, snabb och flexibel service – och satsar varje dag på att göra den lite bättre än dagen innan.
