Name: FILE ARDISA
Description:
FILE ARDISA es una empresa, especializada en Asesoramiento y Gestión de Archivos Empresariales.
Nuestras actividades se iniciaron en La Paz el año 2000 y en Santa Cruz de la Sierra el año 2005.
Contamos con un equipo de trabajo compuesto por ejecutivos, supervisores y funcionarios bolivianos, que entienden el valor de la información documental de una empresa.
Nuestra moderna infraestructura, tecnología, equipo humano, profesionalismo y experiencia, nos permite garantizar la entrega de un servicio seguro, oportuno y eficiente, acorde con las exigencias del cliente.
Misión.
Brindar soluciones de gestión de información empresarial con seguridad, confidencialidad y oportunidad.
Visión.
Ser una organización certificada y referente por el uso de tecnología de vanguardia, recursos humanos especializados, participación en el mercado y alcance geográfico nacional. 
Política de la Calidad. 
Con el propósito de mantenernos como la empresa líder del mercado boliviano, la política de la calidad de FILE ARDISA se sustenta en el compromiso de cumplir con las siguientes directrices: 
1. Satisfacer a plenitud las necesidades y expectativas de nuestros clientes, brindándoles seguridad, confidencialidad y oportunidad en la gestión de la información. 
2. Utilizar la tecnología más apropiada para asegurar la eficacia y eficiencia en la prestación de nuestros servicios y la mejora continua de los procesos y sistema de gestión de calidad.
3. Trabajar en equipo, promoviendo el desarrollo de las capacidades del personal, en un ambiente de trabajo con buen clima organizacional.
4. Cumplir con la normativa legal vigente y los compromisos suscritos con los clientes, proveedores y otras partes relacionadas con la empresa.

We decided that we needed to open this service to help other FBA sellers take back some of their profits as well! Thus, Warehouse Republic was born!  Ütközésvédelmi eszközök – rakodóterek, dokkolópontok védelmére
A piacvezető EGD a forgalmazott termékek értékesítésén túl azok telepítését, karbantartását és szervizelését vállalja a teljes termék életciklus alatt.

Name: Stockroom London
Description:
Stockroom London – specialist archiving and storage with a personal touch.

We provide secure, zone-based storage and specialist archiving for local authorities, museums and art galleries, legal firms, professional services, and media and production companies from across London.

From valuable art, precious artefacts, props, furniture, and data drives to legal documents, tapes and tech equipment, we store and manage your assets securely and safely. 

Our 120,000 sq. ft warehouse is based in the historic Royal Arsenal in Woolwich, South-East London. Each of our clients gets a designated storage zone, meaning your items are kept safely together, clearly organised and labelled, and ready when you need them. 

Whether you need short-term overflow, long-term archiving, or a partner who understands the value of your assets, we deliver a flexible, personal service you can trust. 

We work with councils, museums, art galleries, advertising agencies, production houses, law firms, and more, offering quick collection and turnaround times arranged to suit each client. 

At Stockroom London, we combine scale, care and clarity, so you always know where your items are and who’s looking after them.

Name: Geral 10 logistica
Description:
Há 25 anos, a Geral 10 constrói sua história com foco em confiança, controle e eficiência logística. Especializada em armazenagem e distribuição de alimentos refrigerados, congelados e secos, atua em todo o estado de Santa Catarina com estrutura própria, equipe qualificada e gestão operacional de alto desempenho.
Em 2012, firmamos contrato com a Frimesa, tornando-nos responsáveis por distribuir seus produtos no Oeste catarinense. Em Chapecó, movimentamos mais de 1.000 toneladas/mês, garantindo qualidade em toda a cadeia de armazenagem.
Em 2018, a operação se expandiu para Biguaçu, onde construímos um centro de distribuição moderno, com 3.800 posições pallet, atendendo o litoral Sul e Norte com mais de 2.000 toneladas/mês em movimentação.
Em 2020, a Vigor passou a contar com nossa expertise em armazenagem e transporte, com 800 toneladas/mês entregues às principais redes do estado.
Também temos orgulho de trabalhar com marcas como Froneri (Nestlé Sorvetes), Paviloche, Saputo, Santa Clara Alimentos, Bacio di Latte, Los Los, SoS Alimentos, Pmi Foods e Nossa Massa, oferecendo soluções logísticas personalizadas e de alta performance.
A Geral 10 é sinônimo de compromisso com o que mais importa: entregar resultado com excelência, dia após dia.

Manufacturers and industrial businesses rely on us for just-in-time warehousing, vendor managed inventory, inspection, and more to keep production lines running smoothly.

Description:

Our services include unloading, pick and pack services, and most importantly, distribution pan India with the transport & cargo network available at Bhiwandi for part vehicle load deliveries & we can provide them full vehicles.
For exporters, we consolidate their cargo and provide value-added services like packaging, labeling, and more, helping them to export their products with ease. Additionally, we serve freight forwarders and custom house agents, providing them with a total logistic solution to their clients with our help from warehouse to end customer. Our services also extend to packer and mover companies, as we help them store their clients' home or commercial cargo for long or short-term storage. We guarantee a secure and reliable storage environment, ensuring the safety of your products while they are in our care.
At Akash Storage and Distribution Services Pvt Ltd, we understand the importance of timely and accurate delivery. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring that your products are delivered on time, every time. We also prioritize cost-efficiency and have designed our services to help businesses streamline their supply chain and reduce costs while improving efficiency and customer satisfaction.

Description:
3rd Party Logistics Group brings its’ 35+ year warehousing/fulfillment expertise and 15+ year exclusive focus on beauty brands to the table. This dynamic sets us apart from other 3PL’s. Our partnering philosophy is to provide the highest caliber client experience to help facilitate a brand’s growth and continued success.  3PLG recognizes the critical role it plays in the overall supply chain process.

 
Historically, our people and business relationships are solid. 3rd Party Logistic Group’s team members have been part of our 3PLG family for 7+ years.  Our 10+ year average client retention rate is a reflection of 3PLG’s business practices and ethics.  The majority of our vendors and suppliers have been partnering with us since 2002.  3PLG continually strives to surpass client’s expectations and increase its’ operational performance levels.  Choosing the right partner is as equally important to 3PLG as it is for a Brand.

 
Major achievements include:  successfully handling thousands of SKU’s with inventory variances consistently less than one-tenth of one percent; average order accuracy rates of 99.8%; EDI Trading Partners’ scorecards weighing in at an average of 99.7 % overall performance rate; and turning newly received stock for successful product launches within extremely tight windows and nearly impossible time frames.

 
3PLG successfully and rapidly embraces and adapts to changes in technology, warehousing and beauty industry standards, vendor compliances for Omni-Channel distribution, packaging postponement strategies, TMS implementations, EDI platform changes, storefront integrations, brand trends, continuous team education and development.  Our expertise as beauty fulfillment specialists allows us to manage an efficient flow and balance of orders between the E-Commerce, Retail, V-Commerce,  E-Tail and Wholesale channels on behalf of our clients.

Hemen iletişime geçin, size ve ürünlerinize ygun yol haritanızı oluşturalım, hizmet kalitenizi arttıralım.

Una gran ventaja competitiva es nuestra estructura y servicio. Contamos con diversas áreas que hacen que nuestra empresa sea única en sus especialidades.

Construimos proyectos a lo largo de la República Mexicana y en diferentes países del extranjero como Estados Unidos, Venezuela, Colombia, Nicaragua, Chile y Argentina, entre otros.

Both of our customs bonded CFS warehouses are open Monday thru Friday, 8:00 am to 4:30 pm and after hours on request.

Our Portland and Seattle services include container drayage in Oregon, Washington, and Idaho, trans-loading, de-vanning, and storage of containers; containerized freight, local airfreight and LCL pick-up and delivery. We also pride ourselves in warehousing, distribution, pick and pack, and your consolidation needs. We are also capable of handling all C.E.S. exams for U.S. Customs in our Portland facility.

We handle all of our own transportation in house with over 25 class A CDL tandem tractors. Our drivers are TWIC, Hazardous and TSA certified which allows us to service your needs whether it is airfreight or ocean freight, FCL or LCL. Our fleet also consists of heavy haul equipment, flatbeds, curtain-vans, and van style trailers.

Terminal Transfer Inc. strives to provide the best quality customer service, experience, and dedication to all of our customers in every aspect of the industry. We are able to customize our services and procedures to accommodate your needs as requested.

Name: AJ TOTAL Cold Storage

Equipped with modernized technology, these facilities, including an Automated warehouse (operated by a robotic system of five stacker cranes) and a Traditional warehouse (operated by forklifts), are considered the largest and highest cold-storage facilities in Vietnam. The warehouses are located in Long Hau IP, Long An (31,000-pallet warehouse), Dong Nai, Nhon Trach 6 (7,000-pallet warehouse), and Pho Noi A, Hung Yen (23,000-pallet warehouse).
Our warehouses are designed with the latest technologies such as leak-proof units, fireproof partitions, automated fire protection systems, saltwater tech, and power generators. Temperature and humidity are strictly controlled by automatic systems, which is essential for cold-storage warehouses. We offer small rooms that provide clients with a different subscription based on their desired temperature.

Name: Lakshmi Steel Shopee
Description:
Lakshmi Steel Shopee, founded by Mr. Pankaj Goel, is more than just a steel supplier. It's a testament to commitment, quality, and vision. Mr. Goel's aim was simple yet profound: to bind together customers and colleagues for the long term. Since its establishment, the company has maintained a steady and loyal customer base, driven by our unwavering dedication to quality and integrity.

Our founder's visionary leadership steered us towards the service sector, where we've flourished. We invested in state-of-the-art shearing and bending machines, setting up a unit in Mahadevapura. As our operations expanded, we opened a godown in Malur to handle larger quantities and established a retail outlet in Town Area, Malur, to serve local customers directly. Recognition soon followed, with Steel Authority of India (SAIL) and Vizag Steel Plant offering us prestigious dealerships.

We're more than just a supplier; we're a partner in growth. Lakshmi Steel Shopee is aligned with a vision to become the first choice for our customers. Our prime motto of integrity and quality drives every aspect of our operations. Consistency is our hallmark, ensuring we deliver on our promises every time.

Our extensive product range includes everything from M.S. Bright Hexagon to TMT Bars, ensuring we're your one-stop solution for all steel needs. CNC cutting and bending services further enhance our offerings, providing tailored solutions for every requirement.

We are proud of our long-standing partnerships with industry giants like VSP, TATA, Essar/AMNS, SAIL, JSW, and more. These partnerships reflect our commitment to quality and reliability.

With Mr. Samaksh Goel gearing up to lead, we're poised for even greater heights. Guided by our visionary founder and fueled by dedicated employees, we are committed to providing quality services with integrity and dedication to our clients.

Lakshmi Steel Shopee isn't just a steel supplier; we're your trusted partner in progress.

What we do, and how we do it
We take the complexity out of product storage, assembly, and distribution so you can focus on running your business. Whether you need secure warehousing, efficient order fulfillment, or custom blending, our team tailors solutions to your specific needs, helping you save time and deliver consistent results. We are ITAR compliant and in the process of obtaining certification to the international Standard ISO 9001:2015 for Quality Management Systems, which we plan to receive in Q2 of 2026.

Our capabilities
Precision blending: At MCMILLANCO, we specialize in custom blending blending for chemicals, industrial powders, construction materials, and animal feed, supported by our specialized tanks, mixers, and silos.
Assembly, co-packing, and kitting: Complete solutions to prepare your products for market, freeing your team and facility for core operations.
Warehousing, inventory, and distribution: Flexible storage, inventory management, and order fulfillment in over 200,000 square feet of space, including rail spur and silo access for bulk materials with fulfillment directly to the end customer.

Name: NEDCON SALES s.r.o.
Description:
Jsme mezinárodní společnost zabývající se návrhem a instalací průmyslových skladovacích systémů. Otevřenost nestandardním řešením, lidský přístup a především kvalita a bezpečnost našich konstrukcí nás činí jedinečnými.

Pracujeme tak, aby naši partneři vnímali uspokojení jak z výběru produktu, tak ze vzájemné spolupráce. Na každém projektu pracuje motivovaný tým lidí, kteří se respektují.

Našimi zákazníky jsou společnosti otevřené inovativnímu a profesionálnímu přístupu k návrhu i k realizaci. Na území České republiky a Slovenska realizujeme jak standardní projekty, tak i na míru navržené “high-tech“ technologie. Naše sesterská společnost Nedcon Silesia působí na území Polska a Ruska.

V každé fázi investice – od úvodních konzultací a návrhu až k instalaci systému – striktně dodržujeme postupy pro zajištění kvality. A výsledek – poskytujeme Vám ty nejlepší produkty a profesionální služby v oblasti skladování.

Name: RECYCLIM
Description:
RECYCLIM, créé en 2013 et installé à Jouy le Moutier dans le département du Val d'Oise (95), vous propose le recyclage de vos déchets et la vente de pièces détachées et matériels de froid et climatisation.

L'entreprise RECYCLIM est le partenaire stratégique des Recycleurs du BTP. Elle est donc spécialisée dans l'accueil, le traitement et la valorisation des déchets issus du génie climatique et frigorifique. Elle vous propose également ses services pour les déchets industriels.

Notre métier : Spécialiste en collectes, valorisation et distribution de pièces détachées d'occasion pour l'équipement des chambres froides de l'industrie agro-alimentaire, de la restauration, de l'hôtellerie et des collectivités.

Distributeur et fournisseur des pièces d'occasions, de matériel frigorifique et climatique, de matériel de cuisine, de matériel de boucherie ou encore de matériel de restauration. RECYCLIM est à votre service.

Nous proposons aux professionnels de se dépanner eux-mêmes en achetant directement sur la boutique en ligne toutes sortes de pièces détachées et d'équipement froid pour réparer, entretenir et faire la maintenance de sa chambre froide soi-même, pour que la maintenance de la chambre froide soit la moins chère possible.

Nos produits : Nous proposons à la vente à l'unité toutes les pièces détachées et équipements de matériel froid. Il s'agit uniquement de matériel professionnel pour les équipements frigorifiques et climatiques industriels, les chambres froides situées dans les sites agro-alimentaires, les CHR (Cafés Hôtels Restaurants) ou les collectivités.

Nos points forts : Nos pièces détachées remanufacturées sont testées et sous garanties afin de pouvoir vous proposer les meilleurs prix et les meilleurs conditions. Ainsi, vous êtes sûrs de trouver sur notre site, le matériel froid et climatisation ou encore le matériel pour la restauration et l'hotellerie aux prix les plus bas.

The store is fully fitted out with the latest in LED lighting and a redesigned ELA area designed to create a modern efficient store environment. 

First Cold Taranaki was the first 3PL Cold Store to be fitted with a CO Trans critical refrigeration system in New Zealand. 

First Cold staff are qualified as Transitional Facility Officers and Accredited Persons and have over 40 years experience running Cold Storage distribution facilities.

O diferencial da Ibex está sustentado em três pilares: tecnologia, atendimento e qualidade.

Atendimento: Ibex é a primeira empresa totalmente constituída para suprir as necessidades operacionais e logísticas de clientes de qualquer tamanho no ramo de e-commerce. O atendimento é personalizado, sem que haja um incremento nos custos da operação.   

Qualidade: Está no DNA da Ibex. O serviço depende da qualidade operacional nos processos de armazenagem e transporte. Muitas empresas não têm segurança em terceirizar essa atividade. Uma pesquisa recente publicada pela Associação Brasileira de Comércio Eletrônico (ABComm) aponta que 82% das empresas de e-commerce fazem sua logística própria, simplesmente por desconhecerem uma opção mais eficiente e que lhe permitam maior controle nos custos operacionais.  

Tecnologia: O sistema de gerenciamento de armazenagem e estoque (WMS) utilizado pela Ibex é totalmente integrável com qualquer ERP e permite ao cliente o controle da expedição, das operações convencionais e o cross docking. É uma operação 100% sem papel, que controla por rádio frequência e código de barras a entrada, a armazenagem e a expedição. Isso garante um maior controle operacional, previne erros e é muito mais eficiente na gestão logística.

Name: Casaforte Self Storage
Description:
Casaforte, l’Hotel delle Cose, ha introdotto in Italia la formula del self storage, una soluzione nata per aiutare privati, professionisti e aziende con problemi di spazio. 

Invece di affittare una cantina, un box o un magazzino in molti casi è più comodo e conveniente poter disporre di uno spazio temporaneo dimensionato sulle effettive esigenze del momento: offriamo spazi da 1 a 100 mq e oltre, a partire da 1 mese e senza limiti di durata, garantendo massima privacy, sicurezza e accessibilità.

A cosa serve un deposito temporaneo?
Ad esempio per depositare arredi e scatoloni durante un  trasloco, quando occorre liberare delle stanze per eseguire lavori di ristrutturazione, per svuotare un’intera abitazione prima di venderla o semplicemente per il cambio stagionale degli armadi e quando lo spazio in casa non basta più!
È utile per aziende che necessitino di ampliare la capacità dei propri magazzini per un certo periodo o in una specifica zona o vogliano dotarsi di un deposito protetto e sorvegliato sempre accessibile.
I nostri Hotel delle Cose possono servire a notai, commercialisti, avvocati e tutti gli studi professionali e aziende, che possono ospitare nei nostri spazi i loro archivi liberando spazio nei loro uffici e con la tranquillità che i documenti siano conservati protetti, al sicuro e all'asciutto. I documenti possono inoltre essere digitalizzati e consultabili online da qualunque dispositivo.

A Brascafé Armazéns Gerais LTDA é uma referência no ramo do café  desde 1985 . A partir de 2002 iniciou na atividade de armazenamento e rebenefício de café, enquanto Armazéns Gerais, oferecendo aos clientes serviços de qualidade e com pilar central na relação de confiança construída com o produtor.
No campo da responsabilidade social, a empresa contribuiu desde a sua fundação com o desenvolvimento socioeconômico do município de Araguari com a criação de novos postos de trabalho e a formação de profissionais especializados dentro de setores multidisciplinares.
Nosso principal diferencial é o relacionamento próximo que buscamos manter com nossos clientes e a disponibilidade em atender a cada um conforme a sua necessidade dentro dos padrões de qualidade e segurança.
Temos como missão a eficiência em nossos processos e a transparência na relação com o produtor, firmando uma solida relação com nossos clientes através da credibilidade do nosso trabalho.
Além, disso, o Armazém conta com a parceria das empresas do Grupo econômico, quais sejam, a Brascafé Representações Comerciais Ltda e a Real Comércio de Café e Cereais Ltda,
especializadas na corretagem e comercialização de cafés da região, respectivamente, de maneira que o produtor tenha, em um só lugar, todos os serviços de que necessita pós colheita.
Brascafé, a menor distância entre você e o mercado!

Name: Yorkshire Warehousing
Description:
Yorkshire Warehousing provides secure, flexible warehouse space and 3PL services for businesses operating across Yorkshire and the North of England. Built on partnership rather than a transactional model, the business focuses on delivering dependable warehousing solutions that adapt to changing operational needs.

Operating from a strategically located warehouse facility in Castleford, Yorkshire, Yorkshire Warehousing supports manufacturers, FMCG brands, growing SMEs and national businesses with pallet storage, order picking and fulfilment, container handling, value-added services and secure truck parking. The location offers strong regional and national connectivity, with direct access to key motorway routes including the M62, M1 and A1(M).

The business is led by experienced warehouse professionals with a hands-on, practical approach to operations. Services are designed to scale, offering flexible storage terms, responsive handling and tailored service levels that grow alongside customers’ requirements. From short-term overflow storage to long-term 3PL partnerships, Yorkshire Warehousing focuses on reliability, accuracy and operational consistency.

Security, compliance and infrastructure are central to how the facility operates. The warehouse is equipped with modern racking systems, handling equipment, loading bays and environmental controls, supported by robust security measures and monitored access. Inventory protection and operational integrity are treated as essential, not optional.

Yorkshire Warehousing is backed by an established Yorkshire business and benefits from long-term investment in facilities, equipment and people. Continuous improvement, integrity and trust underpin how the team works with customers, ensuring warehouse space is not just available when needed, but managed properly over the long term.

Our commitment to the Egyptian market is far reaching and full of purpose, we will support our clients no matter how small they are and help you grow by providing you the cold storage service you need. Frozen food storage services in Egypt have become more important with each passing day, from the farmer harvesting, to the worker packing.
The Egyptian frozen food warehouse storage facility is the vital link in the chain that ensures there is food on Egyptian dinner tables each and every day. Our Customers have entrusted us to store a wide variety of frozen goods and fresh products, this includes: Beef, Poultry, Concentrates, Prepared foods, Fruits and Vegetables Every type of refrigerated or frozen product you can imagine has moved through our cold store facility.
AFCIC cold store facility is equipped with security cameras and guards to ensure the safety of all our customer’s goods. The facility has various fire safety measures including smoke detection systems in case of any emergency and two back up generators in case of any power outages..

Name: Schwarze & Consort. GmbH
Description:
The family-run and Hamburg based logistics company Schwarze & Consort. GmbH with over 175 years of expertise is responsible for the storage, handling, packaging and transport of green coffee and other food and pharmaceutical products. 
We offer the entire range including storage, distribution, documentation and customs clearance for import and export containers and conventional cargoes to our customers. Our daily work consists of stripping of containers, cargo inspection and control, receipt, storage, sampling, weighing in our warehouses and the administration around these processes.

Schwarze & Cons. GmbH operates three warehouses in Hamburg with a team of 88 employees. We have over 75,000 m² of indoor storage space and over 120,000 m² of open space. With our own fleet of diversified trucks and chassis, we can conduct any type of transport independently from third parties. 

We take care of green coffee storage for our customers. Industrial raw coffee as well as specialty raw coffee is stored and handled carefully by our qualified staff at our warehouses. With our in-house green coffee silo in Hamburg, we can respond to the wishes of our customers efficiently. Our service comprises of sampling, analysing, weighing and blending of industrial raw coffee. For storing organic green coffee, we work in accordance with the regulations of the authorities, the handling of food products is in accordance with the IFS Logistics certification. We are nominated as a warehouse keeper for green coffee at the stock market Intercontinental Exchange in London and New York. 

The fast-moving world of logistics involves new challenges every day. Our skilled employees can respond to all challenges around cargo handling with due diligence and care. The combination of product-related expertise and industry knowledge over centuries make us a company with the provision of high-quality services. We create great and efficient solutions for our customers in the food and pharmaceutical sector.

Ihre Akten und Dokumente werden in robusten Archivboxen gelagert und ein Strichcode-System garantiert Datensicherheit und Anonymität. In den Archivboxen sind Ihre Dokumente und Akten sicher geschützt vor Diebstahl, Feuchtigkeit, Schädlingen sowie Temperaturschwankungen – und eine Sprinkleranlage schützt zusätzlich vor Brandschäden. 
Der Zugriff auf Ihre bei Merak physisch eingelagerten Daten bleibt dank firmeneigenem Kurierdienst rund um die Uhr gewährleistet. 
Die Dokumentenmanagement-Software von Merak erlaubt lückenlose Nachverfolgung Ihrer Archivboxen, Akten und Dokumente.
Sie wissen nicht, wie lange Sie nach gesetzlichen Vorschriften Ihre Dokumente aufbewahren müssen? Fragen Sie die Spezialisten bei Merak Schweiz!

Name: Mission Critical Storage
Description:
Mission Critical Storage (MCS) provides secure, climate-controlled, and heavy-duty equipment storage for industrial, data-center, construction, utility, and infrastructure projects across Chicagoland and Northwest Indiana. Located in Crete, IL, our 85,000 sq. ft. indoor facility and 14 acres of outdoor space are engineered to handle what standard warehouses can’t: oversized, sensitive, and mission-critical equipment that requires protection, organization, and reliable movement.

We store and manage a wide range of assets, including servers, generators, HVAC units, electrical gear, mechanical assemblies, switchgear, skids, machinery, rooftop units, and oversized construction components. Our climate-controlled environment, fire protection, 24/7 security, gated access, and advanced handling capabilities ensure your equipment stays protected, documented, and ready when your project needs it.

What sets MCS apart is our turnkey capability. Because of our strategic partnership with Stevenson Crane Service, Inc., we offer built-in cranes, trucking, rigging, lifting, staging, and final-mile delivery—all coordinated from a single source. Contractors save time, reduce risk, and avoid juggling multiple vendors. Your equipment arrives, is stored safely, and when you’re ready, we handle the delivery, placement, or lift with precision.

Our team supports general contractors, mechanical contractors, data-center builders, electrical and industrial firms, utilities, municipalities, and project managers who need a dependable logistics hub. Whether short-term or long-term,MCS provides secure storage, organized staging, transparent inventory management, and seamless movement of your most important assets.

At MCS, we deliver reliability, flexibility, and peace of mind—allowing your team to stay focused on execution while we manage the storage, safety, and logistics behind the scenes.

If your project demands secure storage, heavy-equipment handling, or turnkey delivery, MCS is ready.

Name: Help Ukraine Center
Description:
The largest Ukrainian logistics companies have joined the Help Ukraine Center volunteer initiative to create the Eastern European warehouses and infrastructure network that will ensure prompt engaging and shipping the humanitarian supplies to Ukraine.
The project was created with the participation of TIS, Rozetka, Fozzy Group, Horizon Capital and others.
The companies deploy warehouses for humanitarian supplies in border cities of the Eastern Europe and establish logistic chains that makes it possible to deliver cargo to Ukraine as
soon as feasible. At present, two such hubs operate: Lublin (Poland) and Huși (Romania).
Anyone throughout the world can ship the no-address assistance to one of the Help Ukraine Center’s warehouses. Humanitarian and medical supplies will be safely transported to Ukraine and transferred for further distribution to the Ministry of Health, the Ministry of Reintegration of Temporarily Occupied Territories, the Armed Forces of Ukraine and city humanitarian centers. Help Ukraine Center also works towards fundraising with the help of the partner Ernst Prost Foundation/Menshen fur Frieden charity foundation in Germany. All monies raised by the fund are used to purchase the necessary supplies and transport them to Ukraine.
Help Ukraine Center handles up to 50 trucks with cargo daily. At least 150 volunteers are working daily at the Center’s locations.
The Help Ukraine Center initiative is publicly supported by the singer Sting, the actress Jennifer Aniston, the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development President Odile Renaud-Basso, Ukraine’s Ambassador to Poland Andrii Deshchytsia, and many others.
In order to help Help Ukraine Center, you can: 1. ship the cargo;
2. make a charity payment;
3. come and become a volunteer;
4. share about the Center’s work in social and mass media.

What we do?
我們搭配最先進的科技設備與系統作來營運超過4.5萬坪以上的倉儲空間，相當於七個台北小巨蛋的面積，目前已進駐永聯物流園區分別是：台北園區、大園園區，服務超過100家國內外品牌客戶。藉由經驗發現：同類型的產品會需要相似的物流加工處理需求，我們透過設置產業專倉—紅酒專倉、電商專倉、美妝專倉、鞋服專倉、統合倉儲，聚集產業規模與需求，讓中小型企業也能共享大規模的服務品質。

Working at ALS
給員工更好的工作環境，提供多樣的學習及成長的空間。透過整合領先業界的智慧物流科技設備，搭配即時的資料運算來減少作業中的錯誤率；把重複性高的任務交給科技來協助，減少重複性工作的人力耗損，讓每位特捷同仁可以在發揮在更有價值的物流服務上面，大幅提升團隊整體營運效率！同時我們重視每一位員工的工作情緒，除了鋪設減輕站立疲勞的減壓地墊、提供員工中午休息舒適的空間，工作中更安排固定休息時間，避免長時間的工作疲勞。

Company History
Plano Data was organized as a Texas corporation in early 1995 in response to a need by the oil industry for experienced technical data management services. Jim McCullor and Bill Smith co-founded the company and on July 1, 1995, were awarded a long term contract from a major oil company. Other exploration and production clients were soon included in the client base. In addition, records management services to the health care industry were added to promote corporate stability through diversification. Additional support functions such as document imaging were developed in order to become a more complete data management service.

In response to growth and an accompanying need for additional space, Plano Data moved to a spacious new facility in June 2004 built to company specifications and requirements. 

Mission
Provide quality, cost effective records and data management services with an emphasis on practical, cost effective solutions. 

Maintain a keen respect for data confidentiality and integrity. 

Consider each client to be of equal value. 

Form alliances and partnerships as necessary to offer complete data management packages.

Name: Galati Free Trade Zone - Zona Libera Galati
Description:
The Galati Free Zone is a precisely delimited territory in which investors benefit from customs and fiscal facilities for their activities.

Potential investors in the Galati Free Zone can benefit from a series of advantages:
With an area of about 80 ha of land, The Free Trade Zone is practically the only true multi-modal center in the South-East of Romania that offers access to multiple communication ways & utilities:
•	direct connection to the European road transport network European Road E87
•	direct connection to railway transport (the only Free Zone that offers connection to the railway with a wide gauge of Russian type as well as with a European gauge). In the western vicinity of the Galati Free Zone - there is the railway station Gara Larga - where the junction between the Russian wide railway and the European railway is made.
•	naval transport on the Danube (both for river ships and for sea ships) with free access to 3 river-sea berths. The depth in the own berths of the Galati Free Zone is between 4m at 5 m from the quay and 9 m at 15 m from the quay - the depths can vary depending on the elevations of the Danube waters.
•	direct access to high power connection
•	direct access to the natural gas network
•	direct access to running water

- The Galati Free Zone offers a geo-strategic advantage, being at the eastern border of the European Union, at only 7 kilometers from Rep. Moldova and Ukraine.
- Zona Galati Free Zone can offer compact land for any type of investment project.
- Customs taxes and VAT are exempt from payment for goods introduced in the Galati Free Zone for processing, storage or sale between Free Zone residents.
- Transit of goods between free zones is also duty free.
- Access to skilled labor and low costs.
- In the Free Zone of Galati, land is offered for concession for periods of up to 49 years with the possibility of extension for another 25 years.
- Financial operations are made in freely convertible currency.

Name: Chin's Import Export Co., Inc. 陳氏出入口有限公司
Description:
In 1939, with little capital investment, Leland H. Chin build and started the Pagoda Restaurant in Portland, Oregon.   In 1946, Leland sold the Pagoda Restaurant for $16,000, and used the money to purchase an old house at the corner of NE 42nd and Broadway.  Two years later in 1948, he tore down the building in order to construct a new commercial building, which would be the home to Chin’s Kitchen Restaurant and Chin’s Import Export Co., Inc. (Chin’s).

Chin’s Kitchen was sold in the 1970’s, and Chin’s relocated to a 10,000 square foot building in NW Portland, purchased by Fred & Betty Jean Lee.  The business then relocated to a 15,000 square food facility on Swan Island for seven years, before a new building was constructed in 2008 in the Port of Portland’s Rivergate Industrial Park in North Portland.  The new facility has enabled Chin’s close proximity to the Port’s Terminal 6 container facility and (3) container transfer terminals, as well as 20,000 square foot office warehouse complex.  The Rivergate warehouse facility has enabled Chin’s to stock over 2,000 SKU’s (dry, refrigerated, and frozen), for distribution to its customers throughout the Pacific Northwest region.

Durante estas más de seis décadas de experiencia nos hemos mantenido como una empresa viva, dinámica e innovadora siendo la calidad del servicio y de nuestros productos los pilares fundamentales de lo que somos. 

¿Qué hacemos?

Nuestra misión es ofrecer a profesionales y particulares todo aquello que necesiten para desarrollar sus proyectos. Para ello contamos con un gran equipo de profesionales preparado para ofrecer la información y las soluciones flexibles a través de una amplia gama de productos y servicios.

¿A dónde queremos llegar?

Queremos seguir creciendo de forma sostenible y mantenernos como un referente en nuestra área de trabajo para cubrir las necesidades de nuestros clientes, anticipándonos a los cambios y confiando siempre en las principales marcas y fabricantes del sector. 

Amistad y servicio. Nuestra filosofía.

Nuestros valores definen aquello en lo que creemos. Amistad y servicio ha sido desde siempre nuestra propuesta de valor para ir más allá de la obtención de resultados a corto plazo, es nuestra forma de desarrollar nuestro trabajo, centrada en la relación de cercanía con nuestros clientes.

Todo lo que hacemos está basado en las personas, pues ellas son la razón de ser de nuestro proyecto, al igual que el trabajo en equipo y la pasión por hacer algo en lo que creemos.

Name: WAREHOUSETECH OMAN

Warehouses play a crucial role in supply chain and logistics, ensuring the seamless flow of goods from production to consumption and they are indispensable in the modern business landscape. Oman aspires to leverage its infrastructure development to become one of the world's top ten logistics  hubs  by  2040  and  is  witnessing  a  rapid  evolution  and  expansion  of  its  e-commerce market, primary retail markets and cargo scalability capacities.
WarehouseTech  Oman  2025  (WTO25)  is  an  innovative  event  at  the  forefront  of revolutionizing  warehousing  practices  and  technologies  in  the  Sultanate.  This purpose-driven conference aims to discover the significance of warehouse solutions and technologies in enhancing efficiency, inventory management, order fulfillment, reducing  costs,  optimizing  data  analytics,  and  ultimately  elevating  customer satisfaction, accuracy, scalability, and safety. 
WarehouseTech Oman 2025 aims to bring together industry visionaries, technology innovators, logistics, warehousing & supply chain leaders for a dynamic exchange of ideas and insights that are reshaping the future of warehousing. 
From cutting-edge technologies such as Robotics, Drones, and Digital Warehousing, to  the  transformative  impact  of  Industry  4.0,  the  Internet  of  Things  (IoT),  AI, Automation, Cloud Computing, Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), and Data Analytics, WarehouseTech Oman 2025 aims to stand as the epicenter of innovation and  serve  as  the  ultimate  platform  to  delve  into  the  very  latest  trends  propelling warehousing into the digital age.

Recepción y almacenamiento seguro de productos.

Preparación de pedidos (picking & packing) con procesos optimizados.

Integración con plataformas eCommerce (Shopify, Tiendanube, WooCommerce, Mercado Libre).

Gestión de envíos y seguimiento.

Reportes de stock en tiempo real.

 Beneficios para tu negocio:

Reducís costos fijos y convertís tu logística en variable.

Enfocás tu tiempo en vender y hacer crecer tu marca, no en preparar pedidos.

Mejorás la experiencia de tus clientes con entregas más rápidas y confiables.

Nuestra misión es que cada eCommerce pueda competir en igualdad de condiciones con grandes jugadores, sin tener que invertir en depósitos propios, personal extra o procesos complejos.

The everyday wear and tear from warehouse operations ultimately increase the structural stress levels of your storage handling equipment.  This affects the structural integrity and load bearing capacity, making your storage handling equipment potentially unsafe.  That’s why regular assessment is essential.  Our reliable storage handling equipment inspection, audit and repair services help you to ensure that your storage handling equipment is safe to use and capable of providing the highest levels of productivity in your warehouse.

We also have the expertise to install, dismantle, and relocating of your storage handling equipment.  

We can help you:
•	Identify and report problems before they become serious
•	Confirm the safety, integrity and reliability of your storage handling equipment
•	Minimise the risk of workplace accidents or storage handling equipment collapsing
•	Ensure worker safety and prevent injury, loss of life, heavy fines, compensation claims, legal actions, and insurance claims (not paying out) as a result of faulty storage handling equipment.
•	Maintain safety standards and comply with international standards. 

As Africa’s leader in storage handling equipment inspection, audit and repair services, we offer you unrivalled expertise, ensuring the reliability and safety of all your storage handling equipment.

All inspections are carried out according to European Standards EN15512, EN15620, EN15635, EN15878, SEMA, and ASIB.

To discuss how our inspection, audit, and repair services could benefit your company contact us today.

Each location operates multi-temperature warehouses that meet the most stringent testing requirements for food storage. Specialist services include Blast Freezing, Tempering and chilled/frozen storage. Apostamos a la reutilización del plástico para evitar su desecho y contaminación de los océanos y contribuir así a una cadena de producción más sostenible y amigable con el ambiente.

Desde el año 1983 llegamos a todos los rincones del país y acompañamos a las principales industrias.

Seabrook’s have served the Beer, Wine & Spirit Industry for five decades, our depth of knowledge is now serving other business sectors for the storage and transportation of their products, such as Dairy, Food & Beverages, FMCG, Manufacturing and Retail.

Using an excise bonded warehouse can significantly improve your cash flow, by allowing the owner of goods to delay the payment of excise duty and VAT whilst stored duty suspended, then defer this further by utilising a deferment account.

SWL have decades of expertise in providing bonded warehousing and logistic solutions to the international drinks industry.

We provide an ambient storage solution from one case to full load, our client base is representative of, brand owners, distilleries, wineries, brewers, retail & wholesale and also specialist traders.

Name: DAY & MEYER, MURRAY & YOUNG CORP.
Description:
Pioneering technology, a century of experience & perfect manners

When peace of mind is your most precious possession, you want a moving company that will baby your Baby Grand, and provide you with a peaceful night's sleep.

Welcome to Day & Meyer, Murray & Young Corp, where we offer unique solutions to your moving and storage needs.

Our fifteen story fireproof warehouse is conveniently located the Upper East Side of Manhattan. Constructed in 1927, it was designed by the architectural firm of Moores & Dunford whose Deco masterpiece from that same year was the original Queen's Quay in Toronto. It's a beautiful building; come see for yourself.

But what's interesting, and not so readily apparent, is that it was designed to accommodate our exclusive Portovault storage system: steel vaults which travel by truck and are conveyed to racks in our warehouse, to minimize handling and afford the utmost in owner control. (Think Mini Storage for Monets.)

The DMMY Portovault system also predates containerization by decades-which is pretty amazing when you consider that Day & Meyer started with a horse and cart!

Today, the Day & Meyer, Murray & Young Corp. building remains the most efficient warehouse in existence for the specialized storage of art and other valuable household effects.

And Portovault is not the whole story, either. We offer a complete range of services: moving, packing, shipping, installations, specialized storage for artwork and rugs, viewing areas, digital photo inventory.

Now, under the third generation of family leadership Day & Meyer still prides itself on the kind of courteous attention you thought went out with the horse and cart.

Proceso inventado en Holanda en el año 2004. Permite reparar puntales sin necesidad de mover la mercancía de su lugar. 

Sin mantenimiento los daños se acumulan. Puntales dañados pierden gran parte de su capacidad de carga y resistencia . Daños acumulados debilitan todo el conjunto de racks y ponen en peligro a empleados y mercadería.
Sólo los Racks en buen estado cumplen con las internacionales de seguridad.

Podemos reparar daños acumulados y hacer mantenimiento preventivo de sus Racks a bajo costo y sin mayor intervención en su operación logística.


Duerma tranquilo sabiendo que sus Racks cumplen con las normas de seguridad.

System opatentowany przez firmę ROS umożliwia przywrócenie uszkodzonym słupom oryginalnego kształtu:
 - PROSTO - Bez konieczności rozładowania palet i demontażu regału
-  SZYBKO - Bez konieczności przerywania pracy magazynu, naprawa w ciągu 30 min
 - ŁATWO - Bez dodatkowych części zamiennych
 - TANIO - Redukcja kosztów do 80% w porównaniu z wymianą.
Po naprawie słup regału odzyskuje swoją pierwotną nośność i jest zgodny z NORMĄ PN-EN 15635, dajemy 5-letnią gwarancję na każdy naprawiony słup.
Naprawa systemem ROS została sprawdzona w zakresie bezpieczeństwa przez niezależne jednostki certyfikujące m.in. DEKRA ( Niemcy), Instytut Dr Moll ( Niemcy), Uniwersytet Techniczny w Oxfordzie ( Wielka Brytania) oraz Packer Engineering ( USA).

Name: DW Forklift
Description:
Jsme rodinná firma, která byla založena v roce 1994. Tehdy jsme byli dealerem japonské manipulační techniky, který od počátku poskytoval spolehlivé servisní služby na prodané vozíky. Máme tedy opravdu dlouholeté zkušenosti v této oblasti.

Prodejem manipulační techniky se zabýváme i nadále. Nyní spolupracujeme převážně s čínskými výrobci. Jejich výrobky jsme si předem otestovali a můžeme vám tak ručit za jejich kvalitu. Technologická úroveň, jízdní vlastnosti, produktivita, ergonomie i parametry včetně standardní a doplňková výbavy jsou zcela srovnatelné s prémiovými značkami, které jsou aktivní na českém trhu manipulační techniky. Navíc naše vozíky nabízíme za bezkonkurenčně nízké ceny.

V oblasti skladové techniky spolupracujeme s dnes už velmi renomovanou značkou Noblelift. Předmětná společnost  vyrobila v roce 1996 svůj první paletový vozík a nyní je největším producentem ručních paletových vozíků na světě. Výrobní program zahrnuje bohatou nabídku skladových vozíků s důrazem na Li-ion bateriová řešení.

V oblasti čelních vysokozdvižných vozíků je naším partnerem společnost Maximal Forklifts. Ta byla založena v roce 2005. Současný sortiment společnosti zahrnuje několik typových řad čelních akumulátorových, plynových a dieselových protizávažových vozíků v nosnostech od 1,5 t až po těžké vozy s nosností do 32 t.

Našim zákazníkům nabízíme klasickou obchodní poradenskou činnost, počínaje prvotní konzultací, jaká manipulační technika je pro jejich provoz nejvhodnější.

Na vozíky poskytujeme záruku 12-36 měsíců. Předprodejní servis, včetně uvedení do provozu a zaškolení obsluhy a následný záruční i pozáruční servis provádí náš zkušený servisní partner s celorepublikovou působností.

Oba uvedení čínští výrobci mají v Evropě sklad náhradních dílů a servisní podporu na úrovni prémiových značek. Veškeré vozíky nabízíme jak k prodeji, tak k dlouhodobému pronájmu.

S konkrétní nabídkou předložíme informace o zajímavých referencích. Veškeré nabízené vozíky jsou vyroben

Name: EXTREME LOGÍSTICA
Description:
Criada em 2007, a EXTREME chegou inicialmente para atender os clientes da ARGOS GLOBAL PARTNER SERVICES , a primeira empresa do grupo ARGOS, estabelecida em 1998 especialista em soluções completas para supply chain.

Por desenvolver projetos diferenciados, consistentes e eficientes a ARGOS rapidamente conquistou o mercado sendo reconhecida como um parceiro comercial de qualidade, permitindo-a expandir sua atuação em decorrência das demandas de seus clientes.

Justamente em 2007, ao transferir a matriz da ARGOS de São Paulo para Guarulhos nasceu a EXTREME Operações Logísticas oferecendo a possibilidade ao grupo de iniciar sua operação própria de armazenagem.

A EXTREME também cresceu e atualmente é uma unidade de negócio distinta , com identidade própria, que desenvolve variados serviços de armazenagem, manuseio, picking, pack, transporte, içamento, logística in house e distribuição.

Por primar pela qualidade de seus serviços a EXTREME conta com profissionais especializados , somando sua experiência à da ARGOS, a EXTREME tornou-se um operador logístico realmente diferenciado.

O trabalho conjunto da Área Operacional com o Departamento de Qualidade faz com que a EXTREME busque melhorias continuas e excelência nos serviços prestados desenvolvendo fluxos de processos, monitorando os resultados através de KPI’s e elaborando procedimentos voltados à operação, segurança, transporte, atendimento e vendas.

Ao longo dos últimos anos a EXTREME tem feito investimentos constantes em infraestrutura como: armazéns, equipamentos de movimentação, sistemas ERP e WMS, coletores de dados, rede wifi, segurança, treinamento e recursos humanos sempre com o objetivo de atender seus clientes prestando um serviço reconhecidamente superior.

Name: National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA) Malawi
Description:
The National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA) was established by the Malawi Government in 1999 as a Trust to assume the responsibility for the management of the nation's Strategic Food Reserve (SFR). In 2000, the NFRA's Trust Deed was amended to include the stabilisation of prices and the grain market, as well as being responsible for the importation and exportation of grain on behalf of the government.

The agency’s main mandate is the management and maintenance of the strategic food reserves by holding ready resources in the form of physical grain stocks and funds necessary for use through normal marketing channels to help reduce the impact of the failure of the private sector to respond to market signals and make adequate provisions to satisfy national requirements of grain.

Name: ФАБС Логистик ООО
Description:

ООО «ФАБС Логистик» является производителем высокотехнологичных систем управления технологическими процессами с собственными производственными площадями и штатом высококвалифицированных инженеров-конструкторов и монтажников.

Накопленный опыт позволяет предлагать нашим клиентам продукцию высокого качества и уникальные технические и технологические решения самого высокого уровня в области автоматизации складов.

Высокое качество конечной продукции невозможно без высокого качества комплектующих. Поэтому мы очень внимательно подходим к определению круга наших поставщиков и работаем только с лучшими в своей области. Это позволяет нам гарантировать нашим Клиентам безотказную работу поставляемого оборудования в течение многих лет.

ООО «ФАБС Логистик» является крупным системным интегратором при строительстве складов и выполняет функции Генерального подрядчика при реализации комплексных складских проектов. Компания так же является поставщиком высококачественного импортного складского оборудования на российский рынок.

Мы можем предложить нашим клиентам широкий набор стандартных решений для самых различных отраслей, например, для дистрибуции фармацевтических, косметических, продовольственных товаров и т. д.

Мы имеем высококвалифицированный коллектив специалистов и сотрудничаем с ведущими мировыми компаниями, что позволяет предлагать лучшие решения и оборудование в каждом конкретном случае.

Мы благодарим Вас за доверие, оказанное нашей компании и постараемся приложить все свои силы и опыт для помощи Вам.

Name: SUCCESS Logistics Group
Description:
SUCCESS Logistics Group to projekt nastawiony na przyszłość. Stworzyliśmy nowoczesną, silną grupę, której celem jest podejmowanie  nowych wyzwań na dynamicznie rozwijającym się rynku usług logistycznych. W jej skład wchodzą Sukces Sp. z o.o. oraz Assa Sp. z o.o.

SUKCES Sp z o.o. prowadzi działalność logistyczną nieprzerwanie od 2001 roku. Efektem wieloletniej działalności i doświadczenia jest oferowany przez nas kompleksowy wachlarz usług logistycznych związanych z transportem morskim, lotniczym, drogowym i kolejowym, usługami celnymi oraz magazynowaniem i dystrybucją towarów. Od ponad 15 lat obsługujemy oraz wspieramy ukraiński biznes w zakresie międzynarodowego obrotu towarowego. Doskonale znamy specyfikę oraz złożoność transakcji dokonywanych przez ukraińskie przedsiębiorstwa. Firma zlokalizowana jest w Chełmie, 20 km od przejścia granicznego Dorohusk-Jagodzin. Dzięki temu nasze magazyny mają idealną lokalizację jako punkt dla zbierania, sortowania, przeładunku oraz dystrybucji towarów, które są importowane lub eksportowane z Ukrainy.

Assa Sp. z o.o. z powodzeniem działa od 2012 r.  Powstała na bazie wieloletnich doświadczeń w zakresie międzynarodowego obrotu towarowego. Od momentu powstania firmy podstawą działalności są usługi celne, które są stale rozwijane. Niewątpliwie dużym krokiem w budowaniu pozytywnego wizerunku firmy w relacjach biznesowych było otrzymanie w 2016 roku statusu AEO. Dzięki niemu nasi klienci mogą korzystać z szeregu ułatwień, co zwiększyło szybkość oraz efektywność przepływu towarów. Od 2017 roku specjalizujemy się w przeładunkach, magazynowaniu oraz dystrybucji miodu w beczkach. W 2018 roku planujemy budowę nowoczesnego centrum logistycznego wysokiego składowania klasy A o powierzchni 5000 m², wyposażonego w nowoczesny sprzęt i technologie.

Naszą działalność opieramy na solidnych podstawach i rzetelnych relacjach z naszymi klientami.  Jesteśmy dla nich prawdziwym partnerem w biznesie.

Name: Sodus Cold Storage Co., Inc.
Description:
Sodus Cold Storage, Co., Inc. was established in 1914 by a group of local farmers and businessmen whose main goal was to provide the area growers with a warehouse to store their produce for orderly marketing. It was also built to provide an icing station so that produce could be loaded in rail cars for shipment to New York City and other major eastern markets.

1930 brought Sodus Cold Storage into the "Frozen Food Age" with its first freezer room. In 1963, Sodus Cold Storage acquired its second facility in nearby North Rose, New York. This gave Sodus Cold Storage a controlled atmosphere capability, which it had not previously had.

As the years passed, and market demand continued to grow for freezers, the most up to date insulators and refrigeration equipment was installed. This evolutionary updating of equipment was and continues to be, a major commitment to present management.

At Claxton Cold Storage we are committed to our customers. Our goal is to provide the customer with accurate, reliable refrigerated warehousing service in the most professional way possible.

Inventory control is computerized to guarantee accuracy and sent out to customers on a daily basis. The remaining 15,000 square feet of the building houses a truck dock, machine room, battery charging area and offices.

Our expansion into Statesboro, Georgia includes 35,000 square feet of frozen storage and 45,000 square feet of chill storage.

 Kompleksowe wyposażenie magazynów i centrów logistycznych
Projekt, dobór, dostawa i montaż systemów regałowych – gotowych do pracy.

Wdrażamy regały wielopoziomowe (antresole, podesty, schody), które zwiększają powierzchnię użytkową i poprawiają ergonomię.

 Regały METALSISTEM – sprawdzone i skalowalne rozwiązania
Od systemów półkowych (SUPER 1-2-3, UNIRACK, UNISHELF), przez regały paletowe i wspornikowe, po rozwiązania specjalistyczne (składowanie dokumentów, opon, odzieży i obuwia).

 Doradztwo dla operatorów fulfillment i e-commerce
Pomagamy dobrać system składowania dopasowany do rodzaju towaru, rotacji i obsługi zleceń.

 Wsparcie na każdym etapie
Od koncepcji i pomiaru, przez projekt techniczny, po serwis i rozbudowę systemu.

 Dla kogo realizujemy kompleksowe projekty magazynowe:
 Menedżerowie logistyki i zaopatrzenia w firmach e-commerce
 Osoby odpowiedzialne za zaplecza magazynowe sieci handlowych (galerie i retail parki)

 Działy administracji publicznej i samorządowej (np. wyposażenie archiwów, magazynów urzędowych)
 Firmy realizujące własny fulfillment i dystrybucję.

Daher schloßen wir uns zusammen um die Lösung Patronus-Datenservice ins Leben zu rufen.

www.patronus-datenservice.de

Patronus-Netzwerk

Wir sind Bestandteil des Patronus-Netzwerks. Patronus (lat. Für Schutzherr, Verteidiger) steht für Schutz und Sicherheit und ist gleichzeitig das Leitbild unseres Netzwerkes. Unter dem Schirm von Patronus sammeln sich Firmen und Experten, die alle der Schutz und die Sicherheit ihr anvertrauter Werte eint. Patronus ermöglicht seinen Mitgliedern gemeinsam Synergien zu heben und stellt eine Infrastruktur für den Wissenstransfer zur Verfügung. Darüber hinaus ergänzen sich die Patronus-Mitglieder in Ihren Geschäftsmodellen gewinnbringend, um den Anspruch eines Full-Service Netzwerks für unsere Kunden erfüllen zu können. All diese Netzwerk-Effekte folgen dem Ziel, das Qualitäts- und Leistungsniveau für unsere Kunden stets hoch zu halten und zu verbessern.

Description:
Welcome to TFP – People-Powered Fulfilment to Unleash your Business

Looking for a logistics partner who takes the hassle out of fulfilment? Need a solution that helps you scale, improve efficiencies, and keep customers happy? Want to speak to real humans who are accountable team and whom you can contact directly? Talk to us!
At TFP, we make logistics seamless, so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.

We understand that fulfilment isn’t why you got into business. Managing warehouses, stock, and deliveries can be a time-consuming distraction. That’s where we come in.

Why Choose TFP?

1 – We Help You Grow

By taking care of the complexities of logistics, we free up your time to focus on what you do best - expanding your business and serving your customers.

2 – We Help You Focus

Picking, packing, and delivering orders is essential, but it shouldn’t consume your energy. Our expert team ensures your products reach customers efficiently, so you can focus on driving innovation.

3 – We Reduce Financial Risk

Investing in warehousing and staff is a big commitment. With TFP, you get a fully scalable solution - no upfront investment, no risk. As you grow, we grow with you.

The TFP Difference – People Power

Great fulfilment is about more than just systems and automation—it’s about people. Our team is made up of intelligent, empowered professionals who work closely with you, making informed decisions to ensure smooth operations. We don’t just move boxes; we build partnerships.

We see ourselves as an extension of your business, handling your products with the same care and attention as you would. Whether you need day-to-day fulfilment, last-minute stock changes, or a bespoke solution, we’re here to help.

Tutti i prodotti Stilef sono riciclabili e la nostra azienda è attualmente partner Comieco.

Il nostro obbiettivo primario è quello di realizzare prodotti pienamente conformi ai requisiti contrattuali e in grado di soddisfare in ogni aspetto le esigenze del singolo cliente, che è per noi il punto di riferimento fondamentale per la definizione delle politiche e dei processi aziendali. Il personale è parte integrante del processo di miglioramento della linea produttiva, che viene costantemente aggiornata insieme alla strumentazione e alle politiche interne. Abbiamo messo in atto, a tutti i livelli, procedure di esecuzione e verifica della produzione tali da influenzare positivamente il prodotto finito.

Managing electronic tracking of palletised outward goods.

La proliferación de las neveras eléctricas durante la década de los años 60, hizo que Frío Industrial Aragonés tuviera que cambiar de actividad. 

En 1.965 se constituye la sociedad llamada FRIGORIFICOS ZARAGOZA, S.A., en la que en el transcurso del tiempo hemos estado dedicados a la a la conservación de alimentos a granel, frutas, verduras, carnes, pescados y otros mediante su congelación.

Ние сме компания с дългогодишен опит в продажбите и сервизът на качествена техника на конкурентни цени.

Продуктовата ни гама в REGOSTORE се състои от три основни групи: подемна, почистваща техника и стелажни системи. 

Подемно-транспортната или складова техника е съставена от мотокари, газокари, електрокари, стакери, ордер-пикъри, електрически палетни колички, специализирана почистваща техника за закрити и открити площи, стелажни системи, части, консумативи и други.

Непрекъснато развиваме обхвата си на дейност, за да сме максимално гъвкави и полезни за нашите клиенти.

Производителите, с които работим са утвърдени световни марки и предлагат гарантирано качество на изгодни цени.

За нуждите на нашите клиенти, разполагаме с представителства в София, Варна и Габрово, сервиз и оборудвани мобилни сервизни групи и склад за резервни части.

Name: Intellisyncs
Description:
IntelliSyncs is the engineering-driven warehouse automation partner built for companies that can’t afford failed go-lives, vendor lock-in, or “black box” solutions.

We don’t just install robots and conveyors—we design, integrate, and own complex, multi-vendor programs from concept to go-live and beyond. Our cross-functional team unites mechanical, electrical, controls, WMS, and cloud expertise under one roof, so you get one accountable partner instead of coordinating a dozen suppliers.

What we do:

AI-powered warehouse automation – AMRs, AGVs, robotics, AS/RS, conveyors, and sortation engineered around your real flows, not vendor slides.
Material flow optimization – Data-driven layout, buffering, and conveyance design to eliminate bottlenecks and maximize throughput.
End-to-end integration – WMS, WCS, IoT, ERP, and automation equipment orchestrated into a single, real-time “system of truth.”
Cloud migration & WMS modernization – Transform legacy environments into scalable, analytics-ready, cloud-native platforms.
Warehouse design & retrofits – From mezzanines and racking to full brownfield/greenfield redesigns for capacity, safety, and growth.
How we’re different:

Outcome-driven, not equipment-driven – We measure success by labor reduction, throughput, space utilization, uptime, and ROI—not by how much hardware we sell.
Technology-agnostic – Best-of-breed solutions without vendor lock-in; we protect your future flexibility.

Name: La Tecnica di Preti G. Carlo snc
Description:
La TECNICA è una azienda specializzata nella progettazione, produzione e commercializzazione di scaffalature metalliche ed ARCHIVI COMPATTABILI utilizzati sia in ambito civile che industriale.

La sede centrale è dislocata nella zona industriale del comune di Cles (Trento – Italia) e occupa una superficie di 12.200 [m2] di cui circa 
4.000 [m2] coperti.  Nelle sede centrale sono localizzati l’ufficio di progettazione, l’ufficio commerciale e l’ufficio amministrativo e viene 
svolta tutta l’attività industriale basata su macchinari automatizzati mediante controllo numerico.

Azienda nata nel 1968, si trova in una fase di espansione e apertura verso mercati esteri, di consolidamento della presenza sul mercato Italiano e di investimenti nell’ambito di innovazione del processo di progettazione e di produzione. 

Dal 2001 l’azienda è certificata secondo la norma ENI – EN - ISO 9001  e nel giugno 2002 ha aggiornato il proprio processo di qualità secondo la nuova norma VISION 2000.

Il forte legame con il territorio così come la costante attenzione alle tematiche ambientali ha portato il management a completare, tra le poche in Trentino, l’iter di certificazione aziendale secondo la procedura integrata di qualità e ambiente dettata dalla normativa UNI EN ISO 14001: 1996, poi aggiornata secondo UNI EN ISO 14001 : 2004.

Questa scelta rappresenta un ulteriore passo della politica aziendale rivolta alla Qualità Totale.

Name: PAPERWISE Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2005, Paperwise is still a family run business and is a proven flexible and reliable “Data Management” specialist. 
From good old document storage, to converting documents into electronic files by scanning, to the secure disposal by shredding of all your data, in whatever form it may be in. All of our services complimenting one another perfectly.
With the “General Data Protection Regulation” (GDPR) and “The Data Protection Act 2018” (DPA 2018) it’s vital for any organisation to handle its data in a safe and secure manner or face hefty fines. From knowing exactly what and where data is held and stored, to the point of accessing that data, should an individual request their personal data to be deleted, these days its all about “Instant Access”. With “GDPR”, “ID Theft”, and “Cyber-attacks” in the news every day, its vital to know, understand and prove how you handle or dispose of your data. These days, the risks are far too high and can’t be ignored.  
As a Data Management specialist we can securly store hard copies of your information with instant access by file retrieval, while providing secure restricted access to your data. 
Under the new GDPR legislation, the days of employee’s being able to take files off-site to, “work from home” or in the “coffee shop” is a thing of the past. Stories of briefcase’s, pen drives, folders, even mobile phones and laptops being left on trains or stolen have been in the news for so long now. This is where Paperwise can provide a scanning solution to electronically format your files or documents, giving you options for employee’s to either log on at home, view, send or download files on their mobile phones or even just to make “Hot Desking”, a viable option.
When it comes to the end of the line for your documents, we provide secure auditable destruction services, from shredding files from storage once they reach the end of their retention period, to shredding computer hard drives or old mobile phones.

Description:
Pinabox es un servicio de almacenaje de cosas físicas “en la nube”. 

Nacemos para dar respuesta a los problemas de espacio en casa y de transporte con los que nos encontramos en las grandes ciudades.

Nuestra solución consiste en un servicio de recogida, almacenaje y entrega de aquellas posesiones que nuestros clientes no usan en su día a día y que ocupan un valioso espacio en su casa. Con tan sólo unos clicks, nuestros clientes pueden solicitar la recogida y/o entrega de sus posesiones de forma totalmente gratuita y sin necesidad de tener o alquilar un vehículo.

Gracias a nuestro innovador sistema de almacenaje compartido optimizamos el espacio de almacenaje y nuestros clientes se benefician del precio más bajo del mercado en el almacenaje de sus posesiones. El sistema de precios se ajusta a los objetos almacenados y se factura mediante subscripción mensual.

Todos nuestros almacenes cuentan con seguro antirrobo y de incendios y todos los elementos que tenemos guardados están correctamente identificados para que las cosas de un cliente no sean vistas y/o manipuladas por nadie excepto para su entrega a este.

No permitas que se te amontonen tus cosas en casa por la incomodidad de tener que acudir a un trastero a guardar o recoger tus cosas, pruébanos y disfruta de la máxima comodidad y eficiencia al mejor precio.

De momento operamos en Madrid, Sevilla, Toledo y Segovia, pero estamos trabajando para poder ampliar nuestra presencia en las principales capitales de provincia a corto plazo.

Name: InfoResources
Description:
InfoResources is an independently-owned professional records management company that has been serving Kentucky and Indiana for over 30 years.  As one of the most practiced records management companies in the Louisville Metro area, our philosophy can be summed up in one statement - "IF YOUR RECORDS ARE WORTH KEEPING, THEN THEY ARE WORTH KEEPING SAFE." Located in the Louisville Underground, InfoResources boasts the only underground records storage center in the region that has been approved by the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) in Washington, D.C. In addition to the stringent security and safety measures, our records center is temperature controlled and dehumidified to produce the ideal environment for storing paper, electronic media, sensitive equipment and other articles that may become damaged with prolonged exposure to damp, moldy or inclement conditions.

In addition to secured storage, we offer comprehensive records management services including document retrieval, document shredding, document scanning, vault storage, back-up media rotation, storage carton sales, file purges, office relocation services (with regards to business files or medical records) and general records management consulting.

One of the things that makes our company different than most in our industry is the tenure of our employees. The median length of employment at InfoResources is 18 years. This is important in the records management business because knowing our customers and their specific processes and records management needs lends itself to prompt, efficient and cost effective service. 

Finally, we offer free records management consultations and quotes. Even if you are not sure that storing and managing your records off-site is right for you, we can help you get all of the information that you need to make an informed decision.

Please call us or visit our Web site to learn more.

Name: CISS - Chambre Interprofessionnelle du Self-Stockage
Description:
La CISS – Chambre Interprofessionnelle du Self-stockage est l’association professionnelle qui rassemble, représente et accompagne les acteurs du self-stockage en France.

Créée en 2014, la CISS regroupe les exploitants, investisseurs, promoteurs, fournisseurs, courtiers et autres professionnels du secteur, avec pour objectif de structurer et faire grandir une industrie en pleine expansion.

Nos missions :
 Fédérer les professionnels du self-stockage autour de valeurs communes
 Représenter le secteur auprès des pouvoirs publics et des médias
 Accompagner les membres via des outils pratiques, des données du marché, des événements, et des échanges de bonnes pratiques
 Promouvoir une image professionnelle et responsable du self-stockage auprès du grand public

La CISS est également membre fondateur de FEDESSA, la Fédération européenne du self-stockage, et contribue chaque année au rapport européen du secteur en partenariat avec CBRE.

Que vous soyez un acteur établi ou que vous découvriez le marché, vous avez votre place au sein de notre réseau.

 Rejoignez notre communauté et participez à l’avenir du self-stockage en France !

Sesam Self Storage är privatägt och har säte i Stockholm. Granitor-gruppen är majoritetsägare och Rickard Pålsson, grundare av VEIDEC, samt Lars Adgård, senior advisor i logistikbranschen, är tongivande ägare.

Name: Collision Awareness
Description:
At Collision Awareness, we help businesses protect their people, equipment, and operations with innovative, motion-activated safety systems designed for today’s fast-paced industrial environments.

Our products create safer workplaces by detecting movement and providing real-time visual alerts in critical areas where pedestrian and forklift traffic intersect. Whether at blind corners, busy aisleways, overhead doors, or loading docks, Collision Awareness products help prevent accidents before they happen, reducing downtime, injuries, and liability while increasing workplace safety.

What We Offer:
• Motion-Activated Safety Systems for warehouses and industrial facilities
• Forklift & Pedestrian Warning Sensors
• Overhead Door Monitors
• Rack and Wall-Mounted Traffic Alert Units
• Height warning monitors
• Custom Safety Solutions to fit unique facility needs upon request

Why Collision Awareness?
• Proactive accident prevention, not just response
• Bright LED visual warnings with optional addons for audible alarms and additional lights
• Easy-to-install, plug-and-play products
• Designed to support OSHA workplace safety standards and best safety practices

Trusted by safety managers, warehouse operators, and facility directors across North America with over 18,000 units in use

Our Mission:
To create safer work environments by providing smart, reliable, and practical safety alert solutions that give workers time to react and avoid collisions.

Industries We Serve:
• Warehousing & Distribution
• Manufacturing
• Logistics & Supply Chain Operations
• Industrial Transportation Facilities

From small warehouses to large-scale distribution centers, we are proud to partner with companies that prioritize the safety of their teams and the efficiency of their operations.

Interested in seeing how Collision Awareness can help improve your facility’s safety? Our team is always ready to assist!
Visit collisionawareness.com or contact us for more information.

This strategic placement directly addresses common business concerns regarding operational expenses and delivery speed.
The provision of comprehensive end-to-end solutions distinguishes AMS as a singular, integrated partner for an entire supply chain. From global freight forwarding across all modes - sea, air, road, and rail - to advanced warehousing, value-added services, and quality control, AMS can eliminate the need for clients to manage multiple vendors. This consolidation streamlines operations, reduces administrative burdens, and enhances overall efficiency.
AMS is committed to delivering tailored and rapid integration. Recognising the unique nature of each business, AMS excels at designing bespoke logistics solutions that integrate quickly and seamlessly into existing supply chains or when setting up new supply chains. This adaptable approach minimises disruption and accelerates a client's time to market and destination, a crucial attribute for businesses operating in today's dynamic and fast-paced environment.

In the 1920s, Hyster started as a manufacturer of lifting machines used in the rigorous logging industry. Today, that same pioneering, forward-thinking trajectory is taking Hyster into exciting new territory. Name: Pallet Rack Inspection BC
Description:
Pallet Rack Inspection BC was founded by Greg Hubbert and Kevin Van Neck in November 2017, born out of a need for qualified pallet rack inspections in Western Canada.

In early 2017, WorkSafeBC endeavoured to formulate new pallet rack regulation. To do so, they solicited the help of rack manufacturers, local retailers, and installers. Together, with the expertise of the industry, WorkSafeBC drafted the regulation which will take effect January 1, 2018.

Currently, the existing players in the racking industry do not have the means or motivation to fulfil inspection services. Alternatively, inspections are the specialization and sole focus of Pallet Rack Inspection BC. PRIBC is singularly dedicated to the safety element of storage equipment in the warehouse market.

Greg and Kevin bring 15 years combined experience in warehouse storage and rack sales. Driven by a passion for designing creative and intelligent storage solutions, they have served clients in the automotive, academic, medical, and manufacturing industries.

Greg and Kevin’s experience building warehouse storage from the ground-up means they are uniquely qualified to inspect existing pallet racking for damage, strain, and improper installation.

PRIBC is an all-suite solution. Should an inspection identify insufficiencies in your racking, we can coordinate the removal, and repair or installation of new rack. We facilitate permitting, produce drawings and offer custom engineered storage solutions. PRIBC is also equipped to provide scheduled inspections or train your employees to self-report through our custom, app-based software.

Your storage needs are unique, so let us customize a strategy for your racking.

Call us for a free, no obligation consultation: 1-800-638-0427

Ved at outsource dine lager- og logistikopgaver, vil der være bedre tid til, og mulighed for, at fokusere på de arbejdsopgaver du mener der giver mest værdi for din virksomhed. Hos LogiPack får du en fast lager- og logistikansvarlig på en variabel omkostning. Vi er meget løsningsorienterede og lytter til vores kunders behov og ønsker.

Hos LogiPack har vi mere end 30 års erfaring fra lager-, logistik- og tekstilbranchen og kender udfordringerne med peak perioder, op- og nedsving i indkomne ordre, samt kontrol og styring af lageret.

Name: Propeller Inc.
Description:
For over 31 years we have been providing exceptional services in assembly, warehousing, and fulfillment.  Propeller, Inc. is a full-service 3PL.

What can we do for you?  We can assemble your device or build your kit.  We can re-work or test your product.  We can help you design a package or point-of-purchase (POP) display.  If you have a “powdery” type material we can fill 40 jars per minute and then seal with an induction sealer.  If your material is a liquid or a cream, we have Simplex volumetric filling machines that can do that job.   Propeller, Inc. started in 1991.  Most recently, however,  we have been assembling 25,000 Covid Testing Kits per day and packing them into retail POP displays destined for Costco.            

We would love to become one of your sub-contractors.   We have a 40,000 square foot warehouse with truck high docks to facilitate receiving your materials.  We have many experienced hands available pitch in and help with a project - big or small.  

Here is  a short list some of the equipment we have available for your project:

Enercon Induction sealer, Shrink wrappers, Case erectors, Carton sealers, Heat tunnels, Banding machines, Label print and apply machines, Date code printing, Conveyors, SpeeDee brand powder cup filler, Simplex liquid fillers, Bottle cappers, RF blister pack sealing machine, Pallet wrappers,
Bottle labelers,  Check weighers, Hot glue machine, Wafer seal applicators, bar code scanners and more.  Most importantly, we have a group of dedicated, terrific people who want you to succeed.  Give us a call at 801-221-5999!

The Mission Statement is a clear and succinct representation of the company’s purpose for existence. As such, it captures the very essence of our business – relationships with our customers.

Vision Statement

“Metro Storage will be the first choice for storage and the market leader in service, price and innovation amongst storage groups in the greater Sydney area”

DLK - Warehouse Logistics & Solutions

Vier gewinnt - die Erfolgsbausteine von DLK
- Lagertechnik
- Levelmaker
- Logistik
- Lösungen

Ihr Kapital liegt im Lager:
Daher liegt es auf der Hand, dass eine zeitgemäße Logistik, in der Ressourcen und Prozesse aufeinander abgestimmt sind, nicht nur Effizienz und Wirtschaftlichkeit steigern, sondern vor allem auch entscheidende Wettbewerbsvorteile bieten können.
Das Team von DLK sorgt dafür, dass Ihre Lagertechnik – als elementare Schnittstelle für den Materialfluss, sowie im Zusammenspiel mit Förder- und Verpackungstechnik – eine funktionierende Supply Chain garantiert.
Als ausgewiesene Experten rund um den Bereich der Lagertechnik haben wir es uns 
zur Aufgabe gemacht unseren Kunden alle Schritte für eine logistische (Neu-) Konzeptionierung sowie die damit einhergehende Optimierung von Prozessen aus einer Hand anzubieten.

Für Sie bedeutet unser Rundumservice immer durchdachte und aufeinander abgestimmte  Konzepte, eine schnelle Projektabwicklung und somit unter dem Strich auch reduzierte Kosten und Aufwände. 
Für uns spielt es dabei keine Rolle, ob es um eine kleine Einzelunternehmung, den Mittelstand oder Großkonzerne geht. Wir agieren auch international und bei Bedarf mit einem gut aufgestellten Netzwerk von Geschäftspartnern.

DLK GmbH - Ihr verlässlicher Partner
• Rundum-Service – Alles aus einer Hand und einem Guss
• Langjährige Erfahrung im Bereich Lagerlogistik
• Hohe Beratungskompetenz durch erfahrene Profis
• Enge Zusammenarbeit mit externen Partnern (Bsp. Brandschutz)
• Schnelles Agieren und Reagieren in der Zusammenarbeit
• Fachgerechter Montageservice Ihrer Lagerlösung
• Eigene Produktentwicklungen (Levelmaker)
• An- und Verkauf gebrauchter Lagertechnik
