Name: Endsteel Endüstriyel Çözümler
Description:
Depolama Çözümlerinde Uzmanlık. Güvenlik, Verimlilik ve Gelecek.

Endsteel olarak, 10 yılı aşkın tecrübemizle lojistik ve depolama sektörünün lider çözüm ortağıyız. Firmaların operasyonel verimliliğini artırmayı ve depolama alanlarını maksimum kapasiteyle kullanmalarını sağlamayı temel misyon edindik.

Ne Yapıyoruz?

Endüstriyel gereksinimlere özel olarak tasarlanmış, en yüksek güvenlik ve dayanıklılık standartlarına sahip raf sistemleri üretiyor ve projelendiriyoruz. Ürün yelpazemiz, küçük ölçekli depolardan tam otomatik devasa dağıtım merkezlerine kadar her ihtiyaca cevap verir:

Palet Ayarlı Raf Sistemleri (APR)

Dar Koridor (VNA) ve Mekik Raf Sistemleri

Drive-In ve Drive-Thru Sistemler

Ağır Yük ve Konsol Raf Sistemleri

Otomasyon Sistemlerine Entegre Çözümler

Neden Endsteel?

Uzmanlık ve Güvenlik: Tüm sistemlerimiz, uluslararası kalite ve güvenlik standartlarına (örneğin, FEM, EN) uygun olarak tasarlanır ve sertifikalandırılır. Projelerimizde iş güvenliğini ve yatırımınızın korunmasını en ön planda tutarız.

Anahtar Teslim Hizmet: Konsept tasarımdan 3D modellemeye, üretime, sevkiyata ve montaja kadar tüm süreci tek elden yönetir, müşterilerimize kusursuz bir deneyim sunarız.

Maksimum Verimlilik: Alanınızı analiz eder, size özel çözümlerle metrekare başına depolama yoğunluğunu en üst seviyeye çıkararak operasyonel maliyetlerinizi düşürürüz.

Vizyonumuz:

Sadece raf satmıyoruz; geleceğin akıllı ve sürdürülebilir lojistik altyapısını inşa ediyoruz. Endsteel olarak, yenilikçi mühendislik çözümlerimizle sektör standartlarını belirlemeye devam edeceğiz.

Deponuzu bir maliyet merkezi olmaktan çıkarıp, bir kâr ve verimlilik merkezine dönüştürmek için bizimle iletişime geçin.

Name: Celtic Cold Storage & Co-Packing
Description:
Celtic Cold Stores 
The demand for well-located temperature-controlled cold storage facilities in the UK is being driven by a number of recent market forces such as the Covid-19 pandemic , Brexit, and the increasing popularity of online grocery shopping.

The large multi-national food companies are able to invest in their own cold storage facilities however for SME’s it is not cost-effective for them to invest in such facilities for their storage requirements.

As a result, there is a shortage of temperature-controlled facilities in the UK.

Celtic Cold Storage Limited was set up in May 2020 in order to provide temperature-controlled storage (chilled and frozen) and co-packing services mainly for the SME food sector in Wales. The company has been set up by a management team with over 60 years of experience within the UK Food Sector.

The company has a 10,000 sq ft cold storage facility in Merthyr Tydfil , with a 1000 pallet capacity, plus associated co-packing rooms.

Our customer base include large food production companies and smaller local producers, as well as supermarkets and high street stores. We specialise in niche food sector markets where we accommodate product from abroad to go into the major UK retail markets.

We are fully BRC accredited and provide stringent food sector hygiene standards. Our warehouse is protected by state of the art security equipment, providing alarms and cameras throughout the facility.

Name: De Korenschoof BV
Description:
De Korenschoof biedt opslagruimte voor (biologische) veevoedergrondstoffen, verpakte mineralen en Big Bags en is geheel GMO vrij.

Wij zijn niet alleen specialist in opslag, maar ook specialist in het reinigen van granen en het afvullen van veevoedergrondstoffen in bigbags.

De Korenschoof is gelegen op een uiterst goed bereikbare locatie in Harderwijk, in de buurt van diverse uitvalswegen en direct aan de Lorentzhaven. Wij beschikken over eigen kade (300m loskade), een weegbrug, een overslagkraan, 2 shovels en twee heftrucks. Hierdoor zijn wij in staat containers en schepen te laden en lossen en lossen en grondstoffen te herpakken in Big Bags. 

Ontstaan uit familiebedrijf De Bron BV, dat al in 1953 startte als mineralen en kernveevoederfabriek, groeiden wij snel en werd de opslag van grondstoffen een vast onderdeel van onze activiteiten. Name: BSB Warehouse
Description:
Our dedicated storage warehouse facilities provide customers with secure, compliant, discreet, high-quality storage for their lithium-ion batteries.

What We Store?
Electric Vehicle Battery Storage
Manufacturing electric vehicles involves a complex logistical production chain.  The storage of batteries on site is inconvenient, increases liability by holding potentially volatile items, takes up production space and adds another tier of operational detail.  All of this detracts from the core activity – manufacturing.  We maintain an off-site store of batteries ready for ‘just-in-time’ delivery and fulfilling manufacturers’ warranty commitments.

Energy Battery Storage
Batteries used to store renewable energy need to arrive with their customers in optimum condition and at the right time.  Manufacturers and installers do not want to store them for long periods with the associated liability, space requirement and delivery challenges.  We solve those problems by providing an off-site store of batteries ready for ‘just-in-time’ delivery.

Other Battery Storage
We have the specialist facilities and experience to store all new lithium batteries.  In circumstances where a manufacturer or end-user site storage is not convenient or potentially safe we are happy to discuss alternatives within our facilities.

If you would like to discuss your storage needs for new lithium-ion batteries please contact us on: 
info@batterystoragebox.com / https://www.batterystoragebox.com/

Name: Hudson Logistics Center
Description:
Working with the local community, the Hudson Logistics Center will invest hundreds of millions of dollars and create thousands of new jobs for southern New Hampshire.

The Hudson Logistics Center is being proposed as a three-building, high-tech distribution hub to help retailers efficiently store and distribute products around the region and, ultimately, to local homes and businesses.

HLC will create approximately 2,500 good-paying jobs for Hudson.   

The project is proposed for what is currently the Green Meadow Golf Club. This area was noted to “…offer perhaps the greatest opportunity for both commercial and industrial development in Hudson…” by the June 2018 Hudson Economic Development Assessment. The project will occupy approximately 374 acres, which will include about 130 acres of improvement and leave over 244 acres of green space.

HLC offers a bright future for Hudson and surrounding areas: it will be the largest employer in town by nearly three times, bringing in sustainable jobs with quality benefits, millions of dollars in community improvements, and significant new annual tax revenue.

We are excited to be part of the Hudson community and welcome you to check back for updates on the Hudson Logistics Center, and the opportunity to respond to your thoughts and questions. Learn more at hudsonlogisticscenter.com.

Name: Nolwazi Abangane Projects
Description:
Nolwazi Abangane Projects is Africa’s leader in inspection, audit, and repair services for all your racking, shelving, and mezzanine floors, as well as precision laser cutting solutions. Our assessments ensure the reliability, functionality, safety, and integrity of your storage handling systems, while our advanced laser cutting division delivers high-quality components and custom steel fabrication for industrial and commercial applications.

The everyday wear and tear from warehouse operations ultimately increase the structural stress levels of your storage handling equipment. This affects its integrity and load-bearing capacity, making it potentially unsafe. That’s why regular assessment is essential. Our reliable inspection, audit, repair, and laser cutting services help you ensure that your storage handling systems are safe, efficient, and capable of providing the highest levels of productivity in your warehouse.

We also have the expertise to install, dismantle, and relocate your storage handling equipment, as well as to cut baseplates, brackets, lifting lugs, gaskets, and other components using mild steel (up to 10mm), stainless steel (up to 1.5mm), and galvanised steel (up to 1.5mm).

We can help you:
• Identify and report problems before they become serious
• Confirm the safety, integrity, and reliability of your storage handling equipment
• Minimise the risk of workplace accidents or equipment failure
• Ensure worker safety and prevent injury, loss of life, heavy fines, compensation claims, or insurance complications resulting from faulty systems
• Maintain safety standards and comply with international regulations

As Africa’s leader in storage handling inspection, audit, repair, and laser cutting services, we offer unrivalled expertise — ensuring the reliability, safety, and precision of all your operational systems.

All inspections are carried out according to European Standards EN15512, EN15620, EN15635, EN15878, SEMA, and ASIB.

Contact us today!

Name: Madzo Inc.
Description:
Madzo specializes in industrial racking storage systems, from design to installation. Our experience ranges from million square feet warehouses to mom-and-pop retail stores, operating out of the GTA, completing projects across Canada. Whatever your warehousing needs may be- Madzo is happy to assist.

Madzo will aid our customers with each step of the building process- from obtaining permits, layout drawings, parts fabrication, installation, PSR's and engineer reviews. We are happy to manage everything needed for an installation project in order to provide a stress-free experience for our customers. Madzo also supplies and installs all small parts related to warehouse safety, such as walkway, end-of-row and post guards. Madzo can design and fabricate custom parts to meet your needs. Previously, we've helped provide our customers with other warehouse-related jobs outside of racking, such as floor painting, installing door cages, repaving and more- whatever work is needed in your warehouse, we want Madzo to be the first number you call. Our flexibility and "customer first" mentality has helped us build long lasting relationships with our customers that we are proud of.

Brian founded Madzo in 2008- lovingly naming the company after his two daughters. With over 45 years of experience in the racking industry, Brian has built Madzo into a successful business with customers across Canada. He works closely with his wife Francine, our CFO, and has recently taken his daughter Maddy under his wing to teach her everything he has learned throughout his career. We are proudly family owned and operated.

Business and residential neighbors alike continue to voice their pleasure on how clean and well-maintained all Security Self-Storage locations are. Security Self-Storage strives to not only be a leader in the industry, but in the community.

Our Mission & Values
Our mission is to ensure satisfaction and value for our customers by providing convenient locations, competitive pricing, and dedicated storage professionals to ensure a quality storage experience.

Values
Security Self-Storage values, supports and rewards performance based on a team member's ethical values, teamwork, and continuous improvement while increasing value to our customers. Team members are offered the opportunity to grow and excel based on:

Providing excellent customer service

Accomplishment

La sede si estende su una superficie di 33.000 mq ed è situata alla periferia di Orta Nova (FG) nel cuore del Tavoliere delle Puglie e al centro di Strade Statali di grande comunicazione, autostrade e distante pochi km dall'importante porto industriale di Manfredonia. La struttura dello stabilimento comprende due palazzine di due livelli, una adibita ad uffici amministrativi, l'altra come abitazione del custode, un bilico a ponte elettronico, 16 silos in metallo da 500 tonnellate ciascuno, 15 silos in metallo da 1.500 tonnellate ciascuno, 2 tramogge con ribalta automezzi con una portata cadauna di tonnellate 110/ora che tramite linee di nastri trasportatori conferiscono il prodotto nella cella di destinazione. Per quanto riguarda i depositi, disponiamo di n. 4 capannoni e un ampio piazzale asfaltato. Tra i nostri servizi vi sono: l'insacco di prodotti per l'agricoltura e di pellets destinati al riscaldamento, il servizio di deposito conto terzi di questi prodotti, lo stoccaggio di cereai nei silos e la commercializzazione dei pellets.

Name: INVENTORYPRO
Description:
InventoryPRO основана в 2018 году, и специализируется на проведении независимых инвентаризаций любого уровня сложности. Сегодня компания ведет свою деятельность в Украине, Молдавии, Румынии. 

За период своего существования мы достигли существенных результатов развития, и имеем уникальный опыт в сфере инвентаризации ритейла, логистических центров, а также внедрения систем для автоматизации складских операций. 

Компания имеет собственный учебный центр, что позволяет постоянно повышать скорость и качество работы своих сотрудников. 
 
Учитывая наш опыт и пожелания наших европейских заказчиков, нами был разработан уникальный программный продукт. Инструменты которые мы используем позволяет быстро и точно провести инвентаризацию, а также быстро обработать и предоставить результаты заказчику. Результаты инвентаризации могут быть получены в реальном времени, и импортированы в учетную систему предприятия заказчика. Наличие данного инструмента позволяет нам сократить время проведения инвентаризации до 50%. В итоге это позволяет сократить задействованные человеческие ресурсы, что в свою очередь уменьшит стоимость работ.

Нами разработаны методологии проведения инвентаризаций для различных типов объектов, которые позволяют максимально эффективно и качественно провести инвентаризацию на объекте любой сложности. 
 
Основной упор мы делаем на точность конечных результатов, поэтому в процессе инвентаризации, данные проходят через несколько этапов контроля качества, которые позволяют достичь максимальной точности. 
Мы стремимся стать лидером в Восточноевропейском регионе, поэтому постоянно совершенствуем технологии проведения инвентаризаций и уделяем большое внимание обучению, повышению квалификации персонала, и внедрение новых технологий. Мы используем в своей работе не только 2D штрих коды, но и QR-коды, а также RFID метки.

Skladování lze realizovat do výšek 10 metrů. Hlavními produkty jsou jak stacionární, tak mobilní regály. Policové, paletové, bubnové, konzolové, stromečkové, spádové, drive-in, galerie, mezzaniny, včetně schodišť, archivy, uzamykatelné skříně, zásuvky, výsuvná síta na obrazy,...

Description:
We have been involved in the business of self storage ever since the concept was introduced into the UK in the early 1980s.

In 2003 we were fortunate to have the opportunity to acquire the Grade II Listed Swan Lane Mill on Higher Swan Lane, Bolton in the heartland of the former Lancashire cotton industry. At the time we took over, this glorious example of Victorian industrial architecture lay empty and in danger of dilapidation. It has been with great pleasure that we have been able to carefully restore and renovate the building, bringing it back to life to fulfil a vibrant role in Bolton and surrounding areas, in the provision of storage, light industrial and office units.

From the springboard of our success in Bolton we opened a further facility in Liverpool on Bridle Road, close to the Racecourse in Aintree. This has been fully refurbished into an ultra modern facility giving a high level of security and includes direct access (drive up) units. The property also benefits from a large yard with plenty of parking and under cover loading.

We are now pleased to announce we have crossed the Mersey into the Wirral and our latest venture is now open on Price Street, Birkenhead.

This former bank printing and distribution centre has been transformed to provide the residents of the Wirral with facilities similar to Bridle Road, with the added bonus of a recently installed internal ramp to give drive up access to undercover loading.

Our objective is to provide the best in quality and the best in value.

Name: Twenty4 Secure Storage
Description:
Welcome to Twenty4 Secure Storage, an easy, safe and affordable self storage solution with 24-hour access and individual, Drive-up walk-in storage units.

Twenty4 Secure Storage is located within minutes of Leeds city centre. We offer a new self-storage solution that allows you to drive up to your walk-in storage unit for a hassle-free experience. Forget trolleys, lifts and corridors, at Twenty4 Secure Storage you can drive right up to your personal walk-in storage unit and offload your belongings directly from your car boot. And you can do this 24/7, all year round.
Our site is manned 24/7 and additionally secured by CCTV. This means that you can relax at home knowing that your stuff is safe, and that you have access to your personal storage unit any time of the day and night to either drop off or collect stuff.

We are experts in self storage and as such we offer a good selection of quality boxes as well as other protective and packing materials onsite. Just ask our friendly staff and they will be able to pick the best materials to keep your items looking like new. And please leave the heavier stuff to us! Our professional heavy lifting equipment can lift up to 7 tonnes (equivalent to 2 medium-sized cars) and our helpful staff will be delighted to give you a hand anytime, which means that you can pop in on your own for greater flexibility.
Whether you need a long term or a shorter term storage solution for your home or business, Twenty4 Secure Storage offers you peace of mind and flexibility at the best rates.

Name: Locakase Le Mans
Description:
Locakase est votre partenaire de confiance pour le stockage, offrant des solutions pratiques et sécurisées aux particuliers et aux professionnels. Nous comprenons l'importance de libérer de l'espace pour permettre à nos clients de vivre et de travailler de manière plus efficace.

Que vous ayez besoin de dégager de la place à la maison, de stocker des biens saisonniers, ou que votre entreprise ait des besoins de stockage à long terme, nous avons la solution adaptée. Nos installations modernes et sécurisées sont conçues pour répondre à toutes les exigences de stockage, garantissant la protection de vos biens tout au long de leur séjour chez nous.

Ce qui distingue Locakase, c'est notre engagement envers la simplicité et la commodité. Nous comprenons que le processus de stockage peut être stressant, c'est pourquoi nous avons simplifié chaque étape, du choix de l'espace adéquat à l'accès à vos biens. Notre équipe dévouée est là pour vous guider à chaque étape, assurant une expérience sans tracas.

La sécurité est notre priorité absolue. Nos installations sont équipées de systèmes de surveillance 24h/24 et 7j/7 et des contrôles d'accès stricts. Vous pouvez avoir l'esprit tranquille en sachant que vos biens sont entre de bonnes mains.

Nous comprenons que chaque client a des besoins uniques, c'est pourquoi nous offrons une gamme de tailles allant de 1m² à 200m², pour s'adapter à toutes les exigences.

Chez Locakase, nous sommes fiers de créer une communauté de clients satisfaits. Notre engagement envers la transparence, la fiabilité et la satisfaction client est ce qui nous distingue dans l'industrie du stockage. Rejoignez nous et découvrez comment nous pouvons simplifier votre vie en libérant de l'espace pour ce qui compte vraiment. Votre espace, notre engagement !
